prompt:

English:Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.


Arabic:
gt: تمامًا مثلما يجذب القمر الأرض فيتسبب في حدوث المد والجزر، تجذب مجرة درب التبانة مجرة الرامي.
src_text: Just like the moon exerts a pull on the earth, causing tides, so does the Milky Way exert a force on the Sagittarius galaxy.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.


Arabic:
gt: تمّكن العلماء من استنتاج أن المادة الداكنة تؤثر على المادة الداكنة الأخرى بنفس الطريقة التي تؤثر بها المادة الطبيعية.
src_text: The scientists were able to conclude that the dark matter affect other dark matter in the same way regular matter does.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.


Arabic:
gt: توضح تلك النظرية أن معظم المادة المظلمة حول مجرةٍ ما تقع حولها فيما يشبه الهالة، ويكونها جسيمات صغيرة في أعداد كبيرة.
src_text: This theory says that most dark matter around a galaxy is located around a galaxy in a kind of halo, and is made of lots of small particles.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.


Arabic:
gt: يتصاعد من المصنع دخاناً أبيض، وهذا ما أظهرته تقارير تلفزيونية.
src_text: Television reports show white smoke coming from the plant.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.


Arabic:
gt: تحث السلطات المحلية القانطين بالقرب من المصنع على البقاء في منازلهم، وغلق مكيفات الهواء، وعدم شرب مياه الصنبور.
src_text: Local authorities are warning residents in the vicinity of the plant to stay indoors, turn off air-conditioners and not to drink tap water.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.


Arabic:
gt: ووفقًا للوكالة النّوويّة اليابانية، تمّ رصد سيزيوم مشعّ وأيودين في المحطّة.
src_text: According to Japan's nuclear agency, radioactive caesium and iodine has been identified at the plant.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.


Arabic:
gt: وتتكهن السلطات بأن ذلك يشير إلى أن الحاويات التي تحتوي على وقود اليورانيوم في الموقع ربما تكون قد انفجرت وتسربت.
src_text: Authorities speculate that this indicates that containers holding uranium fuel at the site may have ruptured and are leaking.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.


Arabic:
gt: اكتشفَ د. توني مول مرضَ السّل شديد المقاومةِ للأدويةِ أو ما بعرف ب (XDR-TB) في منطقةِ كوازولوناتال في جنوب إفريقيا.
src_text: Dr. Tony Moll discovered the Extremely Drug Resistant Tuberculosis (XDR-TB) in the South African region KwaZulu-Natal.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."


Arabic:
gt: لقد قال في مقابلة أن شكل البكتيريا المتغير الجديد "مثير للقلق ومروّع للغاية بسبب معدل الوفيات المرتفع جداً."
src_text: In an interview, he said the new variant was "very highly troubling and alarming because of the very high fatality rate."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.


Arabic:
gt: يعتقد د. مول أن بعض المرضى من بينهم اثنين من العاملين بالمستشفى يحتمل أن يكونوا قد أصيبوا بالفيروس داخل المستشفى.
src_text: Some patients might have contracted the bug in the hospital, Dr. Moll thinks, and at least two were hospital health workers.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.


Arabic:
gt: خلال عام واحد، قد يصيب الشخص المُصاب ما بين 10 إلى 15 من المختلطين القرباء.
src_text: In one year's time, an infected person may infect 10 to 15 close contacts.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.


Arabic:
gt: مع ذلك، فإن النسبة المئوية لمرض السلّ شديد المقاومة للأدوية في إجمالي مجموعة المصابين بالسلّ ما تزال مُنخفضة؛ حيث يُصاب 6000 من إجمالي 330000 شخص في أي لحظة محددة بجنوب إفريقيا.
src_text: However, the percentage of XDR-TB in the entire group of people with tuberculosis still seems to be low; 6,000 of the total 330,000 people infected at any particular moment in South Africa.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.


Arabic:
gt: كان هناك قمران يزن كلاً منهما ما يزيد عن 1000 رطل، ويسيران بسرعة ما يقرب من 17500 ميل/الساعة، اصطدما فوق الأرض بارتفاع 491 ميلاً.
src_text: The satellites, both of which weighed in excess of 1,000 pounds, and traveling at approximately 17,500 miles per hour, collided 491 miles above the Earth.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.


Arabic:
gt: يقول العلماء إن الانفجار الناجم عن الاصطدام كان مهولاً.
src_text: Scientists say the explosion caused by the collision was massive.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.


Arabic:
gt: ما زالوا يحاولون تحديد حجم التصادم وكيف ستتأثر الأرض.
src_text: They are still trying to determine just how large the crash was and how the Earth will be affected.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.


Arabic:
gt: تقوم القيادة الإستراتيجية الأمريكية لمكتب وزارة الدفاع الأمريكية بتعقب الأنقاض.
src_text: The United States Strategic Command of the U.S. Department of Defense office is tracking the debris.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.


Arabic:
gt: ستُنشر نتيجة التحليل البياني على موقع إلكتروني متاح للعامة.
src_text: The result of plotting analysis will be posted to a public website.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.


Arabic:
gt: بحسب السلطات في أوهايو فإن طبيبةً قد عملت في مستشفى الأطفال في بيتسبرغ في ولاية بنسلفانيا، ستتهمُ بجريمةِ القتل المتعمد بعد أن عُثِرَ على أمها ميتة في صندوق سيارتها يوم الأربعاء.
src_text: A doctor who worked at Children's Hospital of Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania will be charged with aggravated murder after her mother was found dead in the trunk of her car Wednesday, authorities in Ohio say.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.


Arabic:
gt: تم العثور على الدكتور مالار بالاسوبرامانيان -29 عاماً- في بلو آش، أوهايو، وهي ضاحية على بعد حوالي 15 ميلاً شمال سينسيناتي ملقاة على الأرض بجانب الطريق في قميص وملابس داخلية في حالة شديدة تحت تأثير الأدوية على ما يبدو.
src_text: Dr. Malar Balasubramanian, 29, was found in Blue Ash, Ohio, a suburb approximately 15 miles north of Cincinnati lying on the ground beside the road in a T-shirt and underwear in an apparently heavily medicated state.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.


Arabic:
gt: وجّهت الضباط إلى سيارتها من طراز اولدزموبيل انتريج التي كانت تقع على بعد 500 قدم.
src_text: She directed officers to her black Oldsmobile Intrigue which was 500 feet away.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.


Arabic:
gt: وهناك وجدوا جثة ساروجا بالاسوبرامانيان، 53 عاماً، مغطاة ببطانيات ملطخة بالدماء.
src_text: There, they found the body of Saroja Balasubramanian, 53, covered with blood-stained blankets.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.


Arabic:
gt: وقالت الشرطة إن الجثة بدت وكأنها كانت هناك منذ يوم تقريباً.
src_text: Police said that the body appeared to have been there for about a day.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.


Arabic:
gt: تم الإعلان عن أول حالات المرض هذا الموسم في نهاية شهر تموز.
src_text: The first cases of the disease this season were reported in late July.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.


Arabic:
gt: يتم نقل المرض من خلال الخنازير، والذي ينتقل بعد ذلك إلى البشر من خلال البعوض.
src_text: The disease is carried by pigs, which then migrates to humans through mosquitos.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.


Arabic:
gt: حضّ انتشار الوباء الحكومة الهندية على أن تتخذ إجراءات كنشر من يصطاد الخنازير في المناطق المصابة بشدة وكذلك أن توزع آلاف من ستائر البعوض وأن ترش مبيدات حشرية.
src_text: The outbreak has prompted the Indian government to undertake such measures as deployment of pig catchers in seriously affected areas, distributing thousands of mosquito curtains and spraying pesticides.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.


Arabic:
gt: ووعدت الحكومة بتوفير عدة ملايين من قوارير لقاح التهاب الدماغ، مما سيساعد في استعداد الوكالات الصحية للعام القادم.
src_text: Several million vials of encephalitis vaccine have also been promised by the government, which will help prepare health agencies for next year.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.


Arabic:
gt: تم تأجيل خطط توصيل اللقاحات إلى المناطق الأكثر تضرراً على مر التاريخ هذا العام بسبب نقص التمويل وتحديد أولوية منخفضة للمرض بالنسبة للأمراض الأخرى.
src_text: Plans for vaccines to be delivered to the historically most affected areas this year were delayed due to lack of funds and low prioritisation relative to other diseases.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.


Arabic:
gt: في سنة 1956 انتقل سلانيا إلى السويد حيث بدأ العمل مع مكتب البريد السويدي بعد ثلاث سنوات، ثم أصبح المسؤول عن تصميم ونقش القطع النقدية.
src_text: In 1956 Słania moved to Sweden, where three years later he began work for the Swedish Post Office and became their chief engraver.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.


Arabic:
gt: أصدر أكثر من 1,000 طابع للسويد و28 دولة أخرى.
src_text: He produced over 1,000 stamps for Sweden and 28 other countries.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.


Arabic:
gt: تتميز أعماله بجودة وتفاصيل مميزة لدرجة جعلته أحد "الأسماء المعروفة" القليلة للغاية بين هواة جمع الطوابع. تخصص البعض في جمع أعماله فقط.
src_text: His work is of such recognized quality and detail that he is one of the very few "household names" among philatelists. Some specialize in collecting his work alone.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.


Arabic:
gt: كان طابعه رقم 1000 "الأعمال العظيمة التي قام بها الملوك السويديون" من قبل ديفيد كلوكر إهرنشترال في سنة 2000، والتي تم إدراجها في موسوعة غينيس للأرقام القياسية العالمية.
src_text: His 1,000th stamp was the magnificent "Great Deeds by Swedish Kings" by David Klöcker Ehrenstrahl in 2000, which is listed in the Guinness Book of World Records.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.


Arabic:
gt: كان يعمل أيضاً في نقش الأوراق النقدية للعديد من البلدان، ومن الأمثلة الحديثة على عمله صور رئيس الوزراء على واجهة الأوراق النقدية الكندية الجديدة من فئة 5 دولارات و 100 دولار.
src_text: He was also engaged in engraving banknotes for many countries, recent examples of his work including the Prime Ministerial portraits on the front of the new Canadian $5 and $100 bills.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.


Arabic:
gt: بعد وقوع الحادث، نُقل "جبسون" إلى المستشفى، لكنه توفي بعدها بفترة قصيرة.
src_text: After the accident occurred, Gibson was transported to a hospital but died shortly afterwards.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.


Arabic:
gt: لم يُصب سائق الشاحنة البالغ من العمر 64 عاماً في حادث التحطم.
src_text: The truck driver, who is aged 64, was not injured in the crash.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.


Arabic:
gt: أُبعدت العربة من مكان الحادثة في الساعة 12:00 تقريباً بتوقيت جرينتش في نفس يوم وقوعها.
src_text: The vehicle itself was taken away from the scene of the accident at approximately 1200 GMT on the same day.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."


Arabic:
gt: وصرح شخصٌ يعمل في مرآبٍ قريب من مكان وقوع الحادث: "كان هناك أطفالٌ ينتظرون عبور الشارع وكلهم كانوا يصرخون ويبكون".
src_text: A person working in a garage near where the accident occurred said: "There were children waiting to cross the road and they were all screaming and crying."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They all ran back from where the accident had happened.


Arabic:
gt: فرّ جميعهم عائدين من حيث وقعت الحادثة.
src_text: They all ran back from where the accident had happened.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.


Arabic:
gt: تشمل الموضوعات الأخرى المدرجة على جدول أعمال بالي الحفاظ على الغابات المتبقية في العالم، وتبادل التكنولوجيات لمساعدة الدول النامية على النمو بطرق أقل تلويثاً
src_text: Other subjects on the agenda in Bali include saving the world's remaining forests, and sharing technologies to help developing nations grow in less-polluting ways.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.


Arabic:
gt: وتأمل الأمم المتحدة أيضاً في وضع اللمسات الأخيرة على صندوق لمساعدة البلدان المتأثرة من ظاهرة الاحتباس الحراري للتعامل مع آثاره.
src_text: The U.N. also hopes to finalize a fund to help countries affected by global warming to cope with the impacts.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن استغلال الأموال في تشيد منازل مقاومة للفيضانات، وإدارة المياه بشكل أفضل، وتنويع المحاصيل.
src_text: The money could go toward flood-proof houses, better water management, and crop diversification.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.


Arabic:
gt: كتب فلوك أن محاولات البعض للطغيان على النساء ليتوقفوا عن الحديث عن صحة النساء باءت بالفشل.
src_text: Fluke wrote that the efforts by some to drown out women from speaking out about women’s health were unsuccessful.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.


Arabic:
gt: لقد توصلتْ إلى هذا الاستنتاج بسبب كثرة التعليقات الإيجابية والتشجيعات التي أر سلها لها إناث وذكور يشجعون اعتبار أدوية منع الحمل ضرورة طبية.
src_text: She came to this conclusion due to the multitude of positive comments and encouragement sent to her by both female and male individuals urging that contraception medication be considered a medical necessity.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.


Arabic:
gt: عندما توقف القتال بعد نقل الجرحى إلى المستشفى، بقي حوالي 40 من السجناء الباقين في الفناء ورفضوا العودة إلى زنازينهم.
src_text: When the fighting ceased after the wounded were transported to the hospital, about 40 of the other remaining inmates stayed in the yard and refused to return to their cells.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.


Arabic:
gt: يحاول المتفاوضون تصحيح الوضع، ولكن مطالب السجناء غير واضحة.
src_text: Negotiators tried to rectify the situation, but the prisoners' demands are not clear.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.


Arabic:
gt: بين الساعة 10:00 إلى 11:00 مساءً بتوقيت الجبل، أُضرِمَ حريقٌ من قبل النزلاء في الفناء.
src_text: Between 10:00-11:00 pm MDT, a fire was started by the inmates in the yard.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.


Arabic:
gt: سرعان ما دخل ضباط مجهزون بعدة الشغب الساحة وحاصروا النزلاء بالغاز المسيل للدموع.
src_text: Soon, officers equipped with riot gear entered the yard and cornered the inmates with tear gas.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.


Arabic:
gt: وقد أخمدت فرق الإنقاذ النار في نهاية المطاف بحلول الساعة 11:35 مساء.
src_text: Fire rescue crews eventually doused the fire by 11:35 pm.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.


Arabic:
gt: بعد بناء السد عام 1963، توقفت الفيضانات الموسمية التي من شأنها أن تنشر الرواسب في جميع أنحاء النهر.
src_text: After the dam was built in 1963, the seasonal floods that would spread sediment throughout the river were halted.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.


Arabic:
gt: كانت تلك الرواسب ضروريةً لتكوين الحواجز الترابية والشواطئ، وهو ما شكّل موطناً للحياة البرية.
src_text: This sediment was necessary for creating sandbars and beaches, which served as wildlife habitats.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.


Arabic:
gt: ونتيجة لذلك، انقرض نوعان من الأسماك، وأصبح نوعان آخران معرضين للخطر، بما في ذلك الشوب الأحدب.
src_text: As a result, two fish species have become extinct, and two others have become endangered, including the humpback chub.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.


Arabic:
gt: رغم أن منسوب المياه سيرتفع بضعة أقدام فحسب بعد الفيضان، إلا أن المسؤولين يأملون أن يكون ذلك كافياً لاستعادة قضبان الرمال المتآكلة في اتجاه مجرى النهر.
src_text: Although the water level will only rise a few feet after the flood, officials are hoping it will be enough to restore eroded sandbars downstream.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.


Arabic:
gt: لم يصدر تحذير عن تسونامي، ووفقا لوكالة جاكرتا للجيوفيزياء، لن يصدر تحذير عن تسونامي لأن الزلزال لم يستوف متطلبات 6.5 درجة.
src_text: No tsunami warning has been issued, and according to the Jakarta geophysics agency, no tsunami warning will be issued because the quake did not meet the magnitude 6.5 requirement.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من عدم وجود خطر حدوث تسونامي، بدأ السكان في الذعر وبدأوا في مغادرة أعمالهم و منازلهم.
src_text: Despite there being no tsunami threat, residents started to panic and began to leave their businesses and homes.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أن وينفري كانت متأثرةً في وداعها، إلا أنها أوضحت لجمهورها أنها ستعود.
src_text: Although Winfrey was tearful in her farewell, she made it clear to her fans she will be back.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:"This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."


Arabic:
gt: "هذا لن يكون وداعاً. هذا هو إغلاق فصل وبداية فصل جديد."
src_text: "This is not going to be goodbye. This is the closing of one chapter and the opening of a new one."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.


Arabic:
gt: أشارت النتائج النهائية للانتخابات الرئاسية والبرلمانية في ناميبيا إلى إعادة انتخاب الرئيس الحالي هيفيكيبنيي بوهامبا بفارق كبير.
src_text: Final results from Namibian presidential and parliamentary elections have indicated that the incumbent president, Hifikepunye Pohamba, has been reelected by a large margin.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.


Arabic:
gt: كما احتفظ الحزب الحاكم، وهو المنظمة الشعبية لجنوب غرب أفريقيا (سوابو)، بالأغلبية في الانتخابات البرلمانية.
src_text: The ruling party, South West Africa People's Organisation (SWAPO), also retained a majority in the parliamentary elections.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.


Arabic:
gt: وقد تحركت قوات التحالف والقوات الأفغانية إلى المنطقة لتأمين الموقع وأرسلت طائرات التحالف الأخرى للمساعدة.
src_text: Coalition and Afghan troops moved into the area to secure the site and other coalition aircraft have been sent to assist.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.


Arabic:
gt: وقع حادث التحطم في أعالي التضاريس الجبلية، ويُعتقد أنه كان نتيجةً لنيران عدائية.
src_text: The crash occurred high up in mountainous terrain, and is believed to have been the result of hostile fire.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.


Arabic:
gt: تُواجَه جهود البحث عن موقع التحطم بسوء الأحوال الجوية والتضاريس القاسية.
src_text: Efforts to search for the crash site are being met by bad weather and harsh terrain.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.


Arabic:
gt: أعربت منظمة "مانجولا" الخيرية الطبية ومنظمة أطباء بلا حدود ومنظمة الصحة العالمية، إن هذا هو أسوأ تفشٍ مسجل في البلاد.
src_text: The medical charity Mangola, Medecines Sans Frontieres and the World Health Organisation say it is the worst outbreak recorded in the country.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.


Arabic:
gt: قال المتحدث باسم منظمة أطباء بلا حدود "ريتشارد فيرمان": "تتجه أنغولا نحو تفشي هو الأسوأ على الإطلاق ولا يزال الوضع سيئاً للغاية في أنغولا".
src_text: Spokesman for Medecines Sans Frontiere Richard Veerman said: "Angola is heading for its worst ever outbreak and the situation remains very bad in Angola," he said.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.


Arabic:
gt: بدأت الألعاب في تمام الساعة 10:00 صباحاً مع طقس رائع، وبغض النظر عن رذاذ منتصف الصباح الذي سرعان ما اختفى، فقد كان يوماً مثالياً لسباعيات الرجبي.
src_text: The games kicked off at 10:00am with great weather and apart from mid morning drizzle which quickly cleared up, it was a perfect day for 7's rugby.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.


Arabic:
gt: استهلت دولة جنوب أفريقيا -مصنفة البطولة الأولى- المنافسة كما ينبغي بتحقيقها فوز سهل بنتيجة 26 - 00 على زامبيا المصنفة الخامسة في البطولة.
src_text: Tournament top seeds South Africa started on the right note when they had a comfortable 26 - 00 win against 5th seeded Zambia.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أن الأداء الباهت الذي ظهر به الفريق في المباراة ضد أخواتهن الجنوبيات، إلا أن جنوب أفريقيا قد استمرت في التحسن مع تقدم البطولة.
src_text: Looking decidedly rusty in the game against their southern sisters, South Africa however steadily improved as the tournament progressed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.


Arabic:
gt: لقد جعل دفاع الفريق المنضبط ومهاراته في التعامل مع الكرة وعمله الجماعيُّ الممتاز، فريق متميز وكان من الواضح أن هذا هو الفريق الذي يجب التغلب عليه.
src_text: Their disciplined defence, ball handling skills and excellent team work made them stand out and it was clear that this was the team to beat.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.


Arabic:
gt: صرّح المسؤولون عن مدينة أمستردام ومتحف آن فرانك أن الشّجرة مصابة بالفطريات وتشكّل خطراً على الصحة العامة حيث يقولون إنها كانت على وشك السقوط.
src_text: Officials for the city of Amsterdam and the Anne Frank Museum state that the tree is infected with a fungus and poses a public health hazard as they argue that it was in imminent danger of falling over.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.


Arabic:
gt: كان من المقرر إعدامها يوم الثلاثاء، ولكن أنقذها حكم مستعجل من المحكمة.
src_text: It had been scheduled to be cut down on Tuesday, but was saved after an emergency court ruling.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.


Arabic:
gt: جميع مداخل الكهف، التي سُمّيت "الأخوات السبعة"، يبلغ قطرها على الأقل من 100 إلى 250 متراً (من 328 إلى 820 قدماً).
src_text: All of the cave entrances, which were named "The Seven Sisters", are at least 100 to 250 meters (328 to 820 feet) in diameter.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.


Arabic:
gt: تظهر صور الأشعة تحت الحمراء أن التغيرات في درجات الحرارة بين الليل والنهار تبين أنها كهوف محتملة.
src_text: Infrared images show that the temperature variations from night and day show that they are likely caves.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:"They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.


Arabic:
gt: "إنهم أبرد من السطح المحيط نهاراً وأكثر دفئاً منه في الليل."
src_text: "They are cooler than the surrounding surface in the day and warmer at night.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.


Arabic:
gt: إن سلوكهم الحراري ليس ثابتًا مثل الكهوف الكبيرة على الأرض التي غالبًا ما تحافظ على درجة حرارة ثابتة إلى حدٍ ما ، لكنه يتفق مع كونها ثقوباً عميقة في الأرض، "كما قال جلين كوشينغ من هيئة المساحة الجيولوجية الأمريكية (يو إس جي إس) ومن جامعة شمال أريزونا التي تقع في فلاغستاف، أريزونا.
src_text: Their thermal behavior is not as steady as large caves on Earth that often maintain a fairly constant temperature, but it is consistent with these being deep holes in the ground," said Glen Cushing of the United States Geological Survey (USGS) Astrogeology Team and of Northern Arizona University located in Flagstaff, Arizona.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.


Arabic:
gt: في فرنسا، كان التصويت بشكل تقليدي هو عبارة عن تجربة ذات تكنولوجيا منخفضة: حيث يعزل الناخبون أنفسهم في كشك، ويضعون ورقة مطبوعة بشكل مسبق مشيرة إلى مرشحهم المفضل في ظرف.
src_text: In France, voting has traditionally been a low-tech experience: voters isolate themselves in a booth, put a pre-printed sheet of paper indicating their candidate of choice into an envelope.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.


Arabic:
gt: بعد تحقق المسؤولين من هوية الناخب، يضع الناخب الظرف في صندوق الاقتراع، ويوقع على قائمة المصوتين.
src_text: After officials verify the voter's identity, the voter drops the envelope into the ballot box and signs the voting roll.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.


Arabic:
gt: يقنن القانون الانتخابي الفرنسي الإجراءات بصرامة غير محببة.
src_text: French electoral law rather strictly codifies the proceedings.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.


Arabic:
gt: ومنذ عام 1988، توجّب أن تكون صناديق الاقتراع شفافة بحيث يمكن للناخبين والمراقبين أن يتأكدوا من عدم وجود مغلفات في بداية التصويت، وأنه لا يتم إضافة مغلفات إلا مغلفات الناخبين المسجلين والمصرّح لهم حسب الأصول والمفوضين.
src_text: Since 1988, ballot boxes must be transparent so that voters and observers can witness that no envelopes are present at the start of the vote and that no envelopes are added except those of the duly counted and authorized voters.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن للمرشحين أن يرسلوا ممثلين ليشهدوا على كل جزء من العملية. وفي المساء، يتم عد الأصوات من قبل المتطوعين تحت إشراف مكثف باتباع إجراءات محددة.
src_text: Candidates can send representatives to witness every part of the process. In the evening, votes are counted by volunteers under heavy supervision, following specific procedures.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.


Arabic:
gt: أصبح Eee PC من ASUS الذي أُطلق في وقت سابق في جميع أنحاء العالم لعوامل توفير التكاليف والقدرة الوظيفية، موضوعاً مثيراً في شهر تكنولوجيا المعلومات في تايبيه لعام 2007.
src_text: ASUS Eee PC, earlier launched world-wide for cost-saving and functionality factors, became a hot topic in 2007 Taipei IT Month.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.


Arabic:
gt: لكن سوق المستهلكين لأجهزة الحاسوب المحمولة سيتنوع ويتغير جذرياً بعد أن حازت شركة أسوس في 2007 على جائزة تايوان للاستدامة المقدمة من القسم التنفيذي يوان من حكومة جمهورية الصين.
src_text: But the consumer market on laptop computer will be radically varied and changed after ASUS was awarded in the 2007 Taiwan Sustainable Award by Executive Yuan of the Republic of China.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"


Arabic:
gt: وصف موقع المحطّة الإلكتروني العمل بأنه "مسرح إذاعي على الطريقة القديمة، بانعطاف غريب الأطوار، جديد وصارخ!"
src_text: The station's web site describes the show as "old school radio theater with a new and outrageous geeky spin!"

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.


Arabic:
gt: في أيامه الأولى، أُذيع البرنامج حصراً على موقع راديو الإنترنت الموجود منذ فترة طويلة "توجي نت راديو"، وهو الموقع الذي يركز على الراديو الحواري.
src_text: In its early days, the show was featured solely at the long-running internet radio site TogiNet Radio, a site focused on talk radio.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.


Arabic:
gt: في أواخر عام 2015، أنشأت "توجي نت" راديو "أسترو نت " كمحطة إذاعية تابعة.
src_text: In late 2015, TogiNet established AstroNet Radio as a subsidiary station.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.


Arabic:
gt: عرض البرنامج في الأصل ممثلي صوت الهواة، من محلية إلى شرق تكساس.
src_text: The show originally featured amateur voice actors, local to East Texas.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.


Arabic:
gt: أفادت تقارير باستمرار أعمال النهب على نطاق واسع حتى صباح اليوم التالي وذلك لغياب ضباط إنفاذ القانون عن شوارع مدينة "بيشكك".
src_text: Widespread looting reportedly continued overnight, as law enforcement officers were not present on Bishkek's streets.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.


Arabic:
gt: وصف أحد المراقبين مدينة بيشكيك بأنها تغرق في حالة من "فقدان السيطرة"، حيث تجولت عصابات من الناس في الطرقات وقاموا بنهب مخازن السلع الاستهلاكية.
src_text: Bishkek was described as sinking into a state of "anarchy" by one observer, as gangs of people roamed the streets and plundered stores of consumer goods.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.


Arabic:
gt: حمّل العديد من سكان مدينة "بشكيك" المتظاهرين في الجنوب حالة الفوضى.
src_text: Several Bishkek residents blamed protesters from the south for the lawlessness.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.


Arabic:
gt: هزمت جنوب أفريقيا فريق الرجبي النيوزيلندي الملقب بالسود في مباراة اتحاد ثلاثي الأمم للرجبي في استاد رويال بافوكينج في روستنبرج بجنوب أفريقيا.
src_text: South Africa have defeated the All Blacks (New Zealand) in a rugby union Tri Nations match at the Royal Bafokeng Stadium in Rustenburg, South Africa.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.


Arabic:
gt: كانت النتيجة النهائية فوز بنقطة واحدة، 21 إلى 20، لتنهي مسيرة الفوز الخاصة بفريق أول بلاكس التي دامت ل15 مباراة.
src_text: The final score was a one-point victory, 21 to 20, ending the All Blacks' 15 game winning streak.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.


Arabic:
gt: بالنسبة لمنتخب جنوب أفريقيا للرغبي، أنهى هذا سلسلة هزائم استمرّت لخمس مباريات.
src_text: For the Springboks, it ended a five-match losing streak.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.


Arabic:
gt: كانت المباراة النهائية لـ "أول بلاكس"، الذين سبق لهم الفوز بالفعل باللقب قبل أسبوعين.
src_text: It was the final match for the All Blacks, who had already won the trophy two weeks ago.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.


Arabic:
gt: ستُعقد المباراة الأخيرة من السلسلة الأسبوع القادم في ملعب إليس بارك في جوهانسبرغ عندما يقابل منتخب جنوب أفريقيا للرغبي أستراليا.
src_text: The final match of the series will take place at Ellis Park in Johannesburg next week, when the Springboks play Australia.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.


Arabic:
gt: ضرب زلزال متوسط القوة مونتانا الغربية الساعة ١٠:٠٨ مساءً. يوم الاثنين.
src_text: A moderate earthquake shook western Montana at 10:08 p.m. on Monday.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.


Arabic:
gt: ولم ترد تقارير فورية عن وقوع أضرار من قبل هيئة المسح الجيولوجي الأمريكي (USGS) ومركز معلومات الزلازل الوطني التابع لها.
src_text: No immediate reports of damage have been received by the United States Geological Survey (USGS) and its National Earthquake Information Center.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.


Arabic:
gt: وكان مركز الزلزال على بعد حوالي 20 كم (15 ميلاً) بين شمال وشمال شرق ديلون، وحوالي 65 كم (40 ميلاً) جنوب بوتي.
src_text: The earthquake was centered about 20 km (15 miles) north-northeast of Dillon, and about 65 km (40 miles) south of Butte.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.


Arabic:
gt: تأكد إصابة بطة برية نافقة بسلالة إنفلونزا الطيور القاتلة للإنسان، H5N1، وقد عثر عليها يوم الاثنين، في مستنقعات بالقرب من ليون في شرق فرنسا.
src_text: The strain of bird flu lethal to humans, H5N1, has been confirmed to have infected a dead wild duck, found on Monday, in marshland near Lyon in the east of France.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.


Arabic:
gt: فرنسا هي البلد السابع ضمن الاتحاد الأوروبي الذي يعاني من هذا الفيروس؛ بعد النمسا وألمانيا وسلوفينيا وبلغاريا واليونان وإيطاليا.
src_text: France is the seventh country in the European Union to suffer this virus; following Austria, Germany, Slovenia, Bulgaria, Greece and Italy.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.


Arabic:
gt: وتبقى الحالات المشتبه في إصابتها بفيروس H5N1 في كرواتيا والدنمارك غير مؤكدة.
src_text: Suspected cases of H5N1 in Croatia and Denmark remain unconfirmed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."


Arabic:
gt: لقد رفع تشامبرز دعوى قضائيةً ضد الله بتهمة "انتشار الموت والدمار ترويع الملايين من سكان الأرض".
src_text: Chambers had sued God for "widespread death, destruction and terrorization of millions upon millions of the Earth's inhabitants."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."


Arabic:
gt: يزعم تشامبرز، وهو محايد في نظرته لوجود أو عدم وجود إله، أن قضيته "تافهة" وأن "أي شخص يستطيع مقاضاة أي شخص".
src_text: Chambers, an agnostic, argues that his lawsuit is "frivolous" and "anybody can sue anybody."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."


Arabic:
gt: القصة التي قُدمت بالأوبرا الفرنسية، لكاميل سان ساينز، هي قصة فنان "حياته محكومة بحب المخدرات واليابان."
src_text: The story presented in the French opera, by Camille Saint-Saens, is of an artist "whose life is dictated by a love for drugs and Japan."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.


Arabic:
gt: ونتيجة لذلك، يدخن الفنانون لفائف القنب على خشبة المسرح، ويشجع المسرح نفسه الجمهور على مشاركتهم في ذلك.
src_text: As a result, the performers smoke cannabis joints on stage, and the theatre itself is encouraging the audience to join in.

prompt:

src_text: After the results came in, Gingrich lauded Santorum, but had tough words for Romney, on whose behalf negative campaign advertisements were aired in Iowa against Gingrich.

prompt:

src_text: Perry stated that he would "return to Texas to assess the results of tonight's caucus, determine whether there is a path forward for myself in this race", but later said that he would remain in the race and compete in the January 21 South Carolina primary.

src_text: He was reportedly aged in his 20s. In a statement, Bieber said "[w]hile I was not present nor directly involved with this tragic accident, my thoughts and prayers are with the family of the victim."

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

gt: تبين موقع TMZ الإخباري الترفيهي أن المصور أوقف مركبته على الجانب الآخر من شارع سيبولفيدا بوليفارد وحاول التقاط صور لحاجز الشرطة قبل عبور الطريق والمتابعة، مما دفع ضابط شرطة دورية الطرق السريعة في كاليفورنيا إلى عمل توقيف لحركة المرور لأمره بالعودة مرتين.
src_text: Entertainment news website TMZ understands the photographer stopped his vehicle on the other side of Sepulveda Boulevard and attempted to take pictures of the police stop before crossing the road and continuing, prompting the California Highway Patrol police officer conducting the traffic stop to order him back across, twice.

src_text: According to police, the driver of the vehicle that hit the photographer is unlikely to face criminal charges.

prompt:

gt: حصلت "آنا يوكيمسن" ممثلة هولندا على المركز التاسع في فئة ترتيب السيدات في "سوبر-جي" يوم أمس، واحتلت فنلندا مع "كاتيا سارينن" المركز العاشر في نفس الحدث.
src_text: They include the Netherlands, with Anna Jochemsen finishing ninth in the women's standing class in the Super-G yesterday, and Finland with Katja Saarinen finishing tenth in the same event.

src_text: Australia's Mitchell Gourley finished eleventh in the men's standing Super-G. Czech competitor Oldrich Jelinek finished sixteenth in the men's sitting Super-G.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

src_text: Arly Velasquez of Mexico finished fifteenth in the men's sitting Super-G. New Zealand's Adam Hall finished ninth in the men's standing Super-G.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

src_text: Poland's men's visually impaired skier Maciej Krezel and guide Anna Ogarzynska finished thirteenth in the Super-G. South Korea's Jong Seork Park finished twenty-fourth in the men's sitting Super-G.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.


Arabic:
gt: يتمُّ إلقاء اللوم على قوات حفظ السلام التابعة للأمم المتحدة، الذين وصلوا إلى هايتي بعد زلزال ٢٠١٠، بسبب انتشار المرضِ الذي بدأ بالقرب من مُعسكر القوات.
src_text: UN peacekeepers, whom arrived in Haiti after the 2010 earthquake, are being blamed for the spread of the disease which started near the troop's encampment.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.


Arabic:
gt: وفقًا للدعوى القضائية، فإنّ نفايات معسكر الأمم المتّحدة لم تُعقَّم كما ينبغي، ممّا أدّى إلى تسلل البكتيريا إلى رافد نهر أرتيبونايت، أحد أكبر أنهار هايتي.
src_text: According to the lawsuit, waste from the UN camp was not properly sanitized, causing bacteria to enter the tributary of the Artibonite River, one of Haiti's largest.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.


Arabic:
gt: قبل وصول القوات، لم تواجه هايتي مشاكل متعلقة بالمرض منذ القرن التاسع عشر.
src_text: Prior to the arrival of troops, Haiti had not encountered problems related to the disease since the 1800s.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.


Arabic:
gt: قام المعهد الهايتي للعدالة والديمقراطية بالإشارة إلى دراساتٍ مُستقلّة تقترح أنه قد جلبت كتيبة حفظ السلام النيبالية التابعة للأمم المتحدة المرض بدون علم منها إلى هايتي.
src_text: The Haitian Institute for Justice and Democracy has referenced independent studies that suggest the Nepalese UN peacekeeping battalion unknowingly brought the disease to Haiti.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.


Arabic:
gt: صرحت دانييلا لانتين، إحدى خبراء المرض التابعين للأمم المتحدة أنه من المرجح أن يكون سبب تفشي المرض هو قوات حفظ السلام.
src_text: Danielle Lantagne, a UN expert on the disease, stated the outbreak was likely caused by the peacekeepers.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: أكد هاميلتون أن مستشفى جامعة هوارد استقبل المريض في حالة مستقرة.
src_text: Hamilton confirmed Howard University Hospital admitted the patient in stable condition.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: لقد زار المريض نيجيريا حيث سُجلت بعض حالات الإصابة بفيروس إيبولا.
src_text: The patient had been to Nigeria, where some cases of the Ebola virus have occurred.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: اتبعت المستشفى بروتوكول مكافحة العدوى، بما في ذلك فصل المريض عن الآخرين لمنع انتقال العدوى المحتملة للآخرين.
src_text: The hospital has followed protocol for infection control, including separating the patient from others to prevent possible infection of others.

prompt:

English:At Thursday's keynote presentation of the Tokyo Game Show, Nintendo president Satoru Iwata unveiled the controller design for the company's new Nintendo Revolution console.

gt: أثناء كلمته في معرض طوكيو لألعاب الفيديو يوم الخميس، أزاح رئيس شركة نينتندو ساتورو إواتا الستار عن تصميم نظام التحكم لكونسول نينتندو الثوري الجديد.

prompt:

gt: مشابهةً بجهاز التحكم عن بُعد للتلفاز، يستخدم جهاز التحكم مستشعرين موضوعين بالقرب من تلفزيون المستخدم لتحديد موقعه في الفضاء ثلاثي الأبعاد.
src_text: Resembling a television remote, the controller uses two sensors placed near the user's television to triangulate its position in three-dimensional space.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

gt: ادعت رئيسة الوزراء المؤقتة جوليا غيلارد خلال حملة الانتخابات الفيدرالية لعام 2010 أنها تعتقد أن أستراليا ينبغي أن تصبح جمهورية في نهاية عهد الملكة إليزابيث الثانية.

src_text: 34 per cent of those in the poll share this view, wanting Queen Elizabeth II to be Australia's last monarch.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

gt: وفيما يتعلق بطرفي النقيض في الاستطلاع، رأى 29% ممن شملهم الاستطلاع أن أستراليا يجب أن تصبح جمهورية في أسرع وقت، بينما أعتقد 31% أن أستراليا يجب ألا تكون جمهورية أبدًا.
src_text: At the extremes of the poll, 29 per cent of those surveyed believe Australia should become a republic as soon as possible, while 31 per cent believe Australia should never become a republic.

Arabic:
gt: ذكرت دراسة نُشرت يوم الخميس في مجلة "ساينس" عن نشأة نوع جديد من الطيور في جزر غالاباغوس الإكوادورية.
src_text: A study published on Thursday in the journal Science reported on formation of a new bird species on the Ecuadorean Galápagos Islands.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Researchers from Princeton University in the United States and Uppsala University in Sweden reported the new species evolved in just two generations, though this process had been believed to take much longer, due to breeding between an endemic Darwin finch, Geospiza fortes, and the immigrant cactus finch, Geospiza conirostris.


Arabic:
gt: أفاد باحثون من جامعة برينستون بالولايات المتحدة وجامعة أوبسالا بالسويد أن تطور الأنواع الجديدة استغرق جيلين فقط - على الرغم من أنه كان يعتقد أن هذه العملية تستغرق وقتاً أطول بكثير- بسبب التكاثر بين عصفور داروين المتوطن، وعصفور الأرض متوسط الحجم، وعصفور الصبار المهاجر، وعصفور الأرض ذو المنقار الحاد.
src_text: Researchers from Princeton University in the United States and Uppsala University in Sweden reported the new species evolved in just two generations, though this process had been believed to take much longer, due to breeding between an endemic Darwin finch, Geospiza fortes, and the immigrant cactus finch, Geospiza conirostris.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Gold may be worked into all sorts of shapes. It can be rolled into tiny shapes.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن تشكيل الذهب على شتى الأشكال. يمكن لفه في أشكالٍ صغيرة.
src_text: Gold may be worked into all sorts of shapes. It can be rolled into tiny shapes.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It can be pulled into thin wire, which can be twisted and plaited. It can be hammered or rolled into sheets.


Arabic:
gt: ويمكن سحبه إلى سلكٍ رفيعٍ يمكن لفّه وتجديله. يمكن أن يتم طرقه أو لفه على شكل أوراق.
src_text: It can be pulled into thin wire, which can be twisted and plaited. It can be hammered or rolled into sheets.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It can be made very thin, and stuck onto other metal. It can be made so thin that it was sometimes used to decorate the hand-painted pictures in books called "illuminated manuscripts".


Arabic:
gt: يمكن جعلها رقيقة للغاية، وإلصاقها على معدن آخر. ويمكن أن يكون رقيقاً لدرجة أنه كان يستخدم أحياناً لتزيين الصور المرسومة يدوياً في كتبٍ تدعى "المخطوطات المضيئة".
src_text: It can be made very thin, and stuck onto other metal. It can be made so thin that it was sometimes used to decorate the hand-painted pictures in books called "illuminated manuscripts".

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This is called a chemical's pH. You can make an indicator using red cabbage juice.


Arabic:
gt: يطلق عليه اسم رقم الأس الهيدروجيني للمادة الكيميائية، وبإمكانك صنع مؤشر لهذا الرقم باستخدام عصير الكرنب الأحمر.
src_text: This is called a chemical's pH. You can make an indicator using red cabbage juice.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The cabbage juice changes color depending on how acidic or basic (alkaline) the chemical is.


Arabic:
gt: يتغير لون عصير الملفوف اعتمادًا على مدى حمضية المادة الكيميائية أو قلويتها.
src_text: The cabbage juice changes color depending on how acidic or basic (alkaline) the chemical is.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The pH level is indicated by the amount of Hydrogen (the H in pH) ions in the tested chemical.


Arabic:
gt: يُقاس مستوى الأُسّ الهيدروجيني من خلال عدد أيونات الهيدروجين (حرف الH في pH) في المادة الكيميائية المُراد اختبارها.
src_text: The pH level is indicated by the amount of Hydrogen (the H in pH) ions in the tested chemical.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Hydrogen ions are protons that had their electrons stripped off them (since Hydrogen atoms consist of one proton and one electron).


Arabic:
gt: أيونات الهيدروجين هي بروتونات منزوعة الإلكترونات (حيث أن ذرات الهيدروجين تتكون من بروتون واحد وإلكترون واحد).
src_text: Hydrogen ions are protons that had their electrons stripped off them (since Hydrogen atoms consist of one proton and one electron).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Swirl the two dry powders together and then, with clean wet hands, squeeze them into a ball.


Arabic:
gt: قلّب المسحوقين الجافّين سوية ثم اعصرهما بأيدٍ مبللة نظيفة حتى تصبح على شكل كرة.
src_text: Swirl the two dry powders together and then, with clean wet hands, squeeze them into a ball.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The moisture on your hands will react with the outer layers, which will feel funny and form a sort of shell.


Arabic:
gt: سوف تتفاعل الرطوبة الموجودة على يديك مع الطبقات الخارجية، مما يعطيك شعوراً غريباً ويكوّن نوعاً من الغطاء.
src_text: The moisture on your hands will react with the outer layers, which will feel funny and form a sort of shell.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The cities of Harappa and Mohenjo-daro had a flush toilet in almost every house, attached to a sophisticated sewage system.


Arabic:
gt: كان لمدينتي هارابا وموهينجو دارو مرحاض مع آلية تصريف في كل منزل تقريبًا مرتبط بنظام صرف صحي متطور.
src_text: The cities of Harappa and Mohenjo-daro had a flush toilet in almost every house, attached to a sophisticated sewage system.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Remains of sewage systems have been found in the houses of the Minoan cities of Crete and Santorini in Greece.


Arabic:
gt: عُثر على بقايا أنظمة صرف صحي في منازل مدن مينوان في كريت وسانتوريني في اليونان.
src_text: Remains of sewage systems have been found in the houses of the Minoan cities of Crete and Santorini in Greece.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There were also toilets in ancient Egypt, Persia and China. In Roman civilization, toilets were sometimes part of public bath houses where men and women were together in mixed company.


Arabic:
gt: كانت هناك أيضاً مراحيض في مصر القديمة وبلاد فارس والصين. في الحضارة الرومانية، كانت المراحيض في بعض الأحيان جزءاً من الحمامات العامة حيث كان الرجال والنساء يرتادونها معاً في شركة مختلطة.
src_text: There were also toilets in ancient Egypt, Persia and China. In Roman civilization, toilets were sometimes part of public bath houses where men and women were together in mixed company.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When you call someone who is thousands of miles away, you are using a satellite.


Arabic:
gt: عند اتصالك بشخص ما على بعد آلاف الأميال، فإنك تستخدم قمراً صناعياً.
src_text: When you call someone who is thousands of miles away, you are using a satellite.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.


Arabic:
gt: يستقبل القمر الصناعي بالفضاء المكالمة ثم يعكسها في نفس اللحظة تقريباً.
src_text: The satellite in space gets the call and then reflects it back down, almost instantly.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The satellite was sent into space by a rocket. Scientists use telescopes in space because the Earth’s atmosphere distorts some of our light and view.


Arabic:
gt: أُرسل القمر الصناعي إلى الفضاء بواسطة صاروخ. يستخدم العلماء التلسكوبات في الفضاء لأن الغلاف الجوي لكوكب الأرض يشوه بعض الضوء والرؤية.
src_text: The satellite was sent into space by a rocket. Scientists use telescopes in space because the Earth’s atmosphere distorts some of our light and view.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It takes a giant rocket over a 100 feet high to put a satellite or telescope in space.


Arabic:
gt: يتطلب الأمر صاروخاً عملاقاً ارتفاعه أكثر من 100 قدم لوضع قمر اصطناعي أو منظار في الفضاء.
src_text: It takes a giant rocket over a 100 feet high to put a satellite or telescope in space.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The wheel has changed the world in incredible ways. The biggest thing that the wheel has done for us is given us much easier and faster transportation.


Arabic:
gt: غيرت العجلة شكل العالم بشكل مدهش؛ ولكن تبقى إتاحة وسيلة نقل أسهل وأسرع أهم ما أسهمت به لأجلنا.
src_text: The wheel has changed the world in incredible ways. The biggest thing that the wheel has done for us is given us much easier and faster transportation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It has brought us the train, the car, and many other transportation devices.


Arabic:
gt: لقد جلب لنا القطار، والسيارة، والعديد من أجهزة النقل الأخرى.
src_text: It has brought us the train, the car, and many other transportation devices.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Under them are more medium sized cats that eat medium sized prey ranging from rabbits to antelopes and deer.


Arabic:
gt: يوجد في مرتبة تحتهم المزيد من القطط متوسطة الحجم التي تتغذى على فرائس ذات حجم متوسط تتراوح ما بين الأرانب والظباء والغزلان.
src_text: Under them are more medium sized cats that eat medium sized prey ranging from rabbits to antelopes and deer.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Finally, there are many small cats (including loose pet cats) that eat the far more numerous small prey like insects, rodents, lizards, and birds.


Arabic:
gt: وأخيراً، يوجد العديد من القطط الصغيرة (بما فيهم القطط الأليفة السائبة) تأكل الفرائس الصغيرة الأكثر عدداً كالحشرات والقوارض والسحالي والطيور.
src_text: Finally, there are many small cats (including loose pet cats) that eat the far more numerous small prey like insects, rodents, lizards, and birds.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The secret to their success is the concept of the niche, a special job each cat holds that keeps it from competing with others.


Arabic:
gt: سر نجاحهم هو مفهوم المكانة، وظيفة خاصة لكل قطة تمنعها من التنافس مع الآخرين.
src_text: The secret to their success is the concept of the niche, a special job each cat holds that keeps it from competing with others.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Lions are the most social cats, living in large groups called prides.


Arabic:
gt: الأسود هي أكثر القطط اجتماعية وتعيش في مجموعات كبيرة تدعى قطعاناً.
src_text: Lions are the most social cats, living in large groups called prides.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Prides are made up of one to three related adult males, along with as many as thirty females and cubs.


Arabic:
gt: تتكون عائلة الأسود من واحد إلى ثلاثة ذكور بالغين، بالإضافة إلى ما يصل إلى ثلاثين أنثى وشبلاً.
src_text: Prides are made up of one to three related adult males, along with as many as thirty females and cubs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The females are usually closely related to each other, being a large family of sisters and daughters.


Arabic:
gt: عادة ما تكون الإناث أقرب إلى بعضهن البعض، كونهنّ عائلة كبيرة من الأخوات والبنات.
src_text: The females are usually closely related to each other, being a large family of sisters and daughters.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Lion prides act much like packs of wolves or dogs, animals surprisingly similar to lions (but not other big cats) in behavior, and also very deadly to their prey.


Arabic:
gt: قطيع الأسود يعمل مثل قطيع الذئاب أو الكلاب، والمفاجئ أن الحيوانات مشابهة للأسد (لكن ليس القطط الكبيرة الأخرى) في السلوك ومميتة جداً لفرائسها.
src_text: Lion prides act much like packs of wolves or dogs, animals surprisingly similar to lions (but not other big cats) in behavior, and also very deadly to their prey.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A well rounded athlete, the tiger can climb (though not well), swim, leap great distances and pull with five times the force of a strong human.


Arabic:
gt: بصفته رياضيّاً شاملاً، يمكن للنّمر التّسلق (وإن لم يكن ذلك بشكلٍ جيد) والسّباحة والقفز لمسافاتٍ طويلةٍ والسّحب بقوّة خمسة أضعاف قوّة الإنسان.
src_text: A well rounded athlete, the tiger can climb (though not well), swim, leap great distances and pull with five times the force of a strong human.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The tiger is in the same group (Genus Panthera) as lions, leopards, and jaguars. These four cats are the only ones who can roar.


Arabic:
gt: يقع النمر في نفس المجموعة (جنس النمور) مع الأسود، والنمور المرقطة، واليغور. هؤلاء الأربعة هم الوحيدون اللذين يمكنهم الزئير.
src_text: The tiger is in the same group (Genus Panthera) as lions, leopards, and jaguars. These four cats are the only ones who can roar.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The tiger's roar is not like the full-voiced roar of a lion, but more like a sentence of snarly, shouted words.


Arabic:
gt: زئير النمر ليس كزئير الأسد كامل الصوت، لكنه أقرب إلى الصياح بكلمات غاضبة.
src_text: The tiger's roar is not like the full-voiced roar of a lion, but more like a sentence of snarly, shouted words.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Ocelots like to eat small animals. They will catch monkeys, snakes, rodents and birds if they can. Almost all of the animals that the ocelot hunts are far smaller than it is.


Arabic:
gt: تحبّ حيوانات النّمر القزم أكل الحيوانات الصغيرة، فهي تصطاد القرود والثعابين والقوارض والطّيور إذا استطاعت ذلك. تقريباً جميع الحيوانات التي يصطادها النّمر القزم تصغره حجماً.
src_text: Ocelots like to eat small animals. They will catch monkeys, snakes, rodents and birds if they can. Almost all of the animals that the ocelot hunts are far smaller than it is.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Scientists think that ocelots follow and find animals to eat (prey) by smell, sniffing for where they've been on the ground.


Arabic:
gt: يعتقد العلماء أن قطط الأصلوت تتعقب وتجد حيوانات تأكلها (فريسة) عن طريق حاسة الشم؛ فتشم أين كانوا على الأرض.
src_text: Scientists think that ocelots follow and find animals to eat (prey) by smell, sniffing for where they've been on the ground.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They can see very well in the dark with night vision, and move very stealthily, too. Ocelots hunt their prey by blending in with their surroundings then pouncing on their prey.


Arabic:
gt: يمكنها الرؤية جيداً في الظلام بواسطة الرؤية الليلية، والتحرّك بخلسة شديدة أيضاً. تصطاد حيوانات النمر القزم فرائسها من خلال التماهي مع محيطها ثم الانقضاض عليهم.
src_text: They can see very well in the dark with night vision, and move very stealthily, too. Ocelots hunt their prey by blending in with their surroundings then pouncing on their prey.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When a small group of living things (a small population) gets separated from the main population that they came from (like if they move over a mountain range or a river, or if they move to a new island so that they can't easily move back) they will often find themselves in a different environment than they were in before.


Arabic:
gt: عند فصل مجموعة صغيرة من الكائنات الحية (عدد قليل من السكان) عن المجموعة الرئيسية من السكان التي ينتمون إليها (على سبيل المثال إذا انتقلوا عبر سلسلة جبال أو نهر، أو انتقلوا إلى جزيرة جديدة بحيث لا يمكنهم العودة بسهولة)، فسوف يجدون أنفسهم، في غالب الأحيان، في بيئة مختلفة عن البيئة التي كانوا فيها في السابق.
src_text: When a small group of living things (a small population) gets separated from the main population that they came from (like if they move over a mountain range or a river, or if they move to a new island so that they can't easily move back) they will often find themselves in a different environment than they were in before.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This new environment has different resources and different competitors, so the new population will need different features or adaptations to be a strong competitor than what they had needed before.


Arabic:
gt: نظراً لاحتواء هذه البيئة الجديدة على موارد ومنافسين مختلفين، ستحتاج المجموعة حديثة العهد إلى خواص مختلفة أو سبل تكيف لكي تصبح منافس أقوي مقارنة بما احتاجت من قوة سابقاً.
src_text: This new environment has different resources and different competitors, so the new population will need different features or adaptations to be a strong competitor than what they had needed before.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The original population hasn't changed at all, they still need the same adaptations as before.


Arabic:
gt: لم يطرأ أي تغيير على السكان الأصليين إطلاقاً، فلا زالوا يحتاجون إلى نفس طرق التكيّف كما عهدناهم.
src_text: The original population hasn't changed at all, they still need the same adaptations as before.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Over time, as the new population begins to adapt to their new environment, they start to look less and less like the other population.


Arabic:
gt: بمرور الوقت، بينما يبدأ السكان الجدد في التكيّف مع بيئتهم الجديدة، يقل تشابههم مع السكان الآخرين تدريجيًا.
src_text: Over time, as the new population begins to adapt to their new environment, they start to look less and less like the other population.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Eventually, after thousands or even millions of years, the two populations will look so different that they can't be called the same species.


Arabic:
gt: في النهاية، بعد آلاف أو حتى ملايين السنين، ستبدو المجموعتين مختلفتين إلى الحد الذي لا يمكن أن ندعوهما نفس النوع.
src_text: Eventually, after thousands or even millions of years, the two populations will look so different that they can't be called the same species.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:We call this process speciation, which just means the formation of new species. Speciation is an unavoidable consequence and a very important part of evolution.


Arabic:
gt: نسمي هذه العملية نشوء الأنواع، والتي تعني ببساطة تكوين أجناس جديدة. يعتبر نشوء الأنواع نتيجة حتمية وجزء مهم للغاية من التطور.
src_text: We call this process speciation, which just means the formation of new species. Speciation is an unavoidable consequence and a very important part of evolution.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Plants make oxygen which humans breathe, and they take in carbon-dioxide which humans exhale (that is, breathe out).


Arabic:
gt: تنتج النباتات الأكسجين الذي يتنفسه البشر، ويمتصون ثاني أكسيد الكربون الذي يخلفه البشر (أي الزفير).
src_text: Plants make oxygen which humans breathe, and they take in carbon-dioxide which humans exhale (that is, breathe out).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Plants make their food from the sun by photosynthesis. They also provide shade.


Arabic:
gt: تصنع النباتات طعامها من الشمس من خلال التمثيل الضوئي. كما يوفرون الظل.
src_text: Plants make their food from the sun by photosynthesis. They also provide shade.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:We make our houses from plants and make clothes from plants. Most foods that we eat are plants. Without plants, animals could not survive.


Arabic:
gt: نصنع بيوتنا وملابسنا من النباتات . معظم الطعام الذي نتناوله من النباتات كذلك. بدون النباتات، لا يمكن للحيوانات البقاء.
src_text: We make our houses from plants and make clothes from plants. Most foods that we eat are plants. Without plants, animals could not survive.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Mosasaurus was the apex predator of its time, so it feared nothing, except other mosasaurs.


Arabic:
gt: كان الموزاصور هو المفترس المهيمن في عصره، لذلك لم يكن يهاب أي شيء، باستثناء الموزاصورات الأخرى.
src_text: Mosasaurus was the apex predator of its time, so it feared nothing, except other mosasaurs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Its long jaws were studded with more than 70 razor-sharp teeth, along with an extra set in the roof of its mouth, meaning that there was no escape for anything that crossed its path.


Arabic:
gt: فكّاها الطويلان كانا مرصعين بأكثر من 70 سناً يشبه الشفرات بالإضافة إلى مجموعة أخرى في سقف فمها، وهذا يعني أنه ليس هناك مفر لأي شيء يقف في طريقها.
src_text: Its long jaws were studded with more than 70 razor-sharp teeth, along with an extra set in the roof of its mouth, meaning that there was no escape for anything that crossed its path.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:We don't know for sure, but it may have had a forked tongue. Its diet included turtles, large fish, other mosasaurs, and it may even have been a cannibal.


Arabic:
gt: لا نعرف على وجه اليقين، لكن ربما كان لديه لسان متشعب. شمل نظامه الغذائي السلاحف والأسماك الكبيرة والموزاصور الأخرى، وربما كان من آكلي اللحوم.
src_text: We don't know for sure, but it may have had a forked tongue. Its diet included turtles, large fish, other mosasaurs, and it may even have been a cannibal.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It also attacked anything that entered the water; even a giant dinosaur such as T. rex would be no match for it.


Arabic:
gt: كما قامت بالهجوم على كل ما يدخل المياه؛ حتى ديناصور عملاق مثل تي ريكس لم يضاهيها.
src_text: It also attacked anything that entered the water; even a giant dinosaur such as T. rex would be no match for it.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:While most of their food would be familiar to us, Romans did have their share of strange or unusual feast items, including wild boar, peacock, snails, and a type of rodent called a dormouse


Arabic:
gt: في حين أن معظم طعامهم سيكون مألوفًا لنا، فإن الرومان لديهم نصيبهم من عناصر العيد الغريبة أو غير العادية، بما في ذلك الخنازير البرية، والطاووس، والقواقع، ونوع من القوارض يسمى الزغبة
src_text: While most of their food would be familiar to us, Romans did have their share of strange or unusual feast items, including wild boar, peacock, snails, and a type of rodent called a dormouse

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Another difference was that while the poor people and the woman ate their food while sitting in chairs, the rich men liked to have banquets together where they would lounge on their sides while they ate their meals.


Arabic:
gt: كان هناك تباين آخر هو أنه بينما كان الفقراء والنساء يأكلون طعامهم وهم جالسون على المقاعد، كان الرجال الأغنياء يحبون إقامة الولائم سوية حيث يتكئون على جانبهم أثناء تناولهم واجباتهم.
src_text: Another difference was that while the poor people and the woman ate their food while sitting in chairs, the rich men liked to have banquets together where they would lounge on their sides while they ate their meals.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Ancient Roman meals couldn't have included foods that came to Europe from America or from Asia in later centuries.


Arabic:
gt: لم يكن من الممكن أن تتضمن الوَجَباتِ الرومانية القديمةِ الأطعمةَ التي جاءت إلى أوروبا من أمريكا أو من آسيا في القرون اللاحقة.
src_text: Ancient Roman meals couldn't have included foods that came to Europe from America or from Asia in later centuries.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For instance, they didn't have corn, nor tomatoes, nor potatoes, nor cocoa, and no ancient Roman ever tasted a turkey.


Arabic:
gt: على سبيل المثال، لم يكن لديهم ذرة، أو طماطم، أو بطاطس، أو كاكاو ولم يتذوق أي من الرومان القدامى الديك الرومي.
src_text: For instance, they didn't have corn, nor tomatoes, nor potatoes, nor cocoa, and no ancient Roman ever tasted a turkey.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Babylonians built each of their gods a primary temple that was considered the home of the god.


Arabic:
gt: بنى البابليون لكل إله من آلهتهم معبداً رئيسياً وكان يُعتبر بيت الإله.
src_text: The Babylonians built each of their gods a primary temple that was considered the home of the god.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:People would bring sacrifices to the gods and the priests would try to attend to the needs of the gods through ceremonies and festivals.


Arabic:
gt: كان الناس يقدمون القرابين إلى الآلهة، ويحاول الكهنة تلبية احتياجات الآلهة خلال الاحتفالات والأعياد.
src_text: People would bring sacrifices to the gods and the priests would try to attend to the needs of the gods through ceremonies and festivals.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Each temple had an open temple courtyard and then an inner sanctuary that only the priests could enter.


Arabic:
gt: لكل معبد ساحة مفتوحة تؤدي إلى خلوة آمنة يمكن للكهنة فقط أن يدخلوها.
src_text: Each temple had an open temple courtyard and then an inner sanctuary that only the priests could enter.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: بُنيت أحيانًا أبراج فريدة على شكل أهرامات تسمى زقورة لتكون جزء من المعابد.
src_text: Sometimes special pyramid shaped towers, called ziggurats, were built to be a part of the temples.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The top of the tower was special sanctuary for the god.


Arabic:
gt: كانت قمة البرج ملاذاً آمناً للإله.
src_text: The top of the tower was special sanctuary for the god.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the warm climate of the Middle East, the house was not so important.


Arabic:
gt: في مناخ الشرق الأوسط الدافئ، لم يكن للمنزل أهميّة كبيرة.
src_text: In the warm climate of the Middle East, the house was not so important.

prompt:

src_text: Most of the life of the Hebrew family happened in the open air.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
