gt: كانت النساء تطبخ في الفناء؛ كانت المتاجر مجرد أنضاد مفتوحة تطل على الشارع. استُخدم الحجر في بناء المنازل.
src_text: Women did the cooking in the yard; stores were just open counters looking into the street. Stone was used for building houses.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There were no large forests in the land of Canaan, so wood was extremely expensive.


Arabic:
gt: لم تكن هناك غابات كبيرة في أرض كنعان، لذلك كان الخشب باهظ الثمن.
src_text: There were no large forests in the land of Canaan, so wood was extremely expensive.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Greenland was settled sparsely. In the Norse sagas they say that Erik the Red was exiled from Iceland for murder, and when travelling further west, found Greenland and named it Greenland.


Arabic:
gt: لقد سكن البشر غرينلاند بشكل متفرق.  يُحكى في الملحمات الإسكندنافية أن إريك الأحمر نُفى من أيسلندا بتهمة القتل، وعندما سافر غرباً، وجد غرينلاند وأطلق عليها غرينلاند.
src_text: Greenland was settled sparsely. In the Norse sagas they say that Erik the Red was exiled from Iceland for murder, and when travelling further west, found Greenland and named it Greenland.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: بغض النظر عن اكتشافه فإن قبائل الإسكيمو كانت تعيش هناك سابقاً.
src_text: But regardless of his discovery, Eskimo tribes were already living there at the time.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Though each country was 'Scandinavian', there were many differences between the people, kings, customs and history of Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Iceland.


Arabic:
gt: كانت هناك اختلافات كثيرة بين الناس والملوك والعادات والتاريخ في دول "الدنمارك" و"السويد" و"النرويج" و"أيسلندا"،على الرغم من أن كل دولة كانت "إسكندنافية".
src_text: Though each country was 'Scandinavian', there were many differences between the people, kings, customs and history of Denmark, Sweden, Norway and Iceland.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you have watched the movie National Treasure, you may think a treasure map was written on the back of the Declaration of Independence.


Arabic:
gt: إذا كنت قد شاهدت فيلم الكنز الوطني، فقد تعتقد أن خريطة كنز قد كُتبَت على ظهر إعلان الاستقلال.
src_text: If you have watched the movie National Treasure, you may think a treasure map was written on the back of the Declaration of Independence.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, that is not true. Although there is something written on the back of the document, it is not a treasure map.


Arabic:
gt: لكن هذا غير صحيح. فعلى الرغم من وجود شيء مكتوب على ظهر المستند، فإنه ليس خريطةً لكنز.
src_text: However, that is not true. Although there is something written on the back of the document, it is not a treasure map.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Written on the back of the Declaration of Independence were the words "Original Declaration of Independence dated 4th July 1776". The text appears on the bottom of the document, upside down.


Arabic:
gt: كُتب على ظهر إعلان الاستقلال عبارة "إعلان الاستقلال الأصلي بتاريخ 4 تموز 1776". يظهر النص في أسفل المستند، مقلوباً.
src_text: Written on the back of the Declaration of Independence were the words "Original Declaration of Independence dated 4th July 1776". The text appears on the bottom of the document, upside down.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:While no one knows for certain who wrote it, it is known that early in its life, the large parchment document (it measures 29¾ inches by 24½ inches) was rolled up for storage.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أن كاتب هذا الجزء من النص غير معروف تحديداً، ولكننا نعلم أن المخطوطة الكبيرة (ذات مقاسات 29¾ بوصة × 24½ بوصة) كانت مخزّنة مطوية في بداية وجودها.
src_text: While no one knows for certain who wrote it, it is known that early in its life, the large parchment document (it measures 29¾ inches by 24½ inches) was rolled up for storage.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:So, it is likely that the notation was added simply as a label.


Arabic:
gt: لذا، فمن المرجح أنه تمت إضافة الرمز ببساطة كتسمية.
src_text: So, it is likely that the notation was added simply as a label.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The D-Day landings and the following battles had freed the north of France, but the south still wasn't free.


Arabic:
gt: قد أدت عمليات الإنزال في اليوم المشهود والمعارك التالية له إلى تحرير شمال فرنسا، لكن الجنوب لم يكن قد حُرر بعد.
src_text: The D-Day landings and the following battles had freed the north of France, but the south still wasn't free.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It was ruled by the "Vichy" French. These were French people who had made peace with the Germans in 1940 and worked with the invaders instead of fighting them.


Arabic:
gt: كان يحكم فرنسا "فيشي". هؤلاء هم الشعب الفرنسي الذين صنعوا السلام مع الألمان في عام 1940 وعملوا مع الغزاة بدلاً من محاربتهم.
src_text: It was ruled by the "Vichy" French. These were French people who had made peace with the Germans in 1940 and worked with the invaders instead of fighting them.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:On 15 August 1940, the Allies invaded southern France, the invasion was called "Operation Dragoon".


Arabic:
gt: في 15 آب 1940، غزا الحلفاء جنوب فرنسا، وسُمِّيَ الغَزْوُ بـ"عملية دراغون".
src_text: On 15 August 1940, the Allies invaded southern France, the invasion was called "Operation Dragoon".

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In just two weeks the Americans and Free French forces had liberated southern France and were turning towards Germany.


Arabic:
gt: في أسبوعين فقط، حرر الأمريكيون والقوات الفرنسية الحرة جنوب فرنسا، وكانوا في طريقهم نحو ألمانيا.
src_text: In just two weeks the Americans and Free French forces had liberated southern France and were turning towards Germany.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A civilization is a singular culture shared by a significant large group of people who live and work co-operatively, a society.


Arabic:
gt: الحضارة هي ثقافةٌ فرديةٌ مشتركةٌ بين مجموعةٍ كبيرة من الناس الذين يعيشون ويعملون بشكل تعاوني، مجتمع.
src_text: A civilization is a singular culture shared by a significant large group of people who live and work co-operatively, a society.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The word civilization comes from the Latin civilis, meaning civil, related to the Latin civis, meaning citizen, and civitas, meaning city or city-state, and that also somehow defines the size of the society.


Arabic:
gt: أصل كلمة حضارة من اللاتينية civilis، والتي تعني مدني، والتي تتعلق باللاتينية سيفيس، وتعني مواطن، وسيفيتاس، تعني مدينة أو دولة المدينة، وهذا أيضاً يحدد بطريقة الكتلة المجتمعية.
src_text: The word civilization comes from the Latin civilis, meaning civil, related to the Latin civis, meaning citizen, and civitas, meaning city or city-state, and that also somehow defines the size of the society.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:City-states are the precursors of nations. A civilizational culture implies the passing on of knowledge across several generations, a lingering cultural footprint and fair dissemination.


Arabic:
gt: إن المدن المستقلة ذاتياً هي بمثابة أسلاف الأمم. إن الثقافة الحضارية تعني ضمناً نقل المعرفة عبر عدة أجيال، بصمة ثقافية متبقية ونشر المعرفة بشكل عادل.
src_text: City-states are the precursors of nations. A civilizational culture implies the passing on of knowledge across several generations, a lingering cultural footprint and fair dissemination.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Minor cultures often vanish without leaving relevant historic evidence and fail to be recognized as proper civilizations.


Arabic:
gt: تتلاشى الثقافات الصغرى في كثير من الأحيان دون أن تترك أي دليل تاريخي فعلي ولا يُعترف بها باعتبارها حضارات حقيقية.
src_text: Minor cultures often vanish without leaving relevant historic evidence and fail to be recognized as proper civilizations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:During the Revolutionary War, the thirteen states first formed a weak central government—with the Congress being its only component—under the Articles of Confederation.


Arabic:
gt: أثناء الحرب الثورية، شكلت الولايات الثلاث عشرة أولاً حكومة مركزية ضعيفة ـ وكان الكونغرس يشكل العنصر الوحيد فيها ـ في ظل النظام الأساسي للاتحاد الفيدرالي.
src_text: During the Revolutionary War, the thirteen states first formed a weak central government—with the Congress being its only component—under the Articles of Confederation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Congress lacked any power to impose taxes, and, because there was no national executive or judiciary, it relied on state authorities, who were often uncooperative, to enforce all its acts.


Arabic:
gt: كان الكونجرس يفتقر إلى أي سلطة لفرض الضرائب، وبسبب عدم وجود سلطة تنفيذية وطنية أو قضائية، فقد اعتمد على سلطات الدولة، التي كانت في الغالب غير متعاونة، لفرض جميع قوانيه.
src_text: Congress lacked any power to impose taxes, and, because there was no national executive or judiciary, it relied on state authorities, who were often uncooperative, to enforce all its acts.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It also had no authority to override tax laws and tariffs between states.


Arabic:
gt: بالإضافة إلى ذلك، لا تملك سلطة تجاوز القوانين الضريبيّة والتعريفات المفروضة بين الولايات.
src_text: It also had no authority to override tax laws and tariffs between states.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Articles required unanimous consent from all the states before they could be amended and states took the central government so lightly that their representatives were often absent.


Arabic:
gt: تطلبت المواد الموافقة بالإجماع من قبل جميع الولايات قبل أن تُعدل واستهزأت الولايات من الحكومة المركزية لدرجة أن ممثليهم غالباً ما كانوا غائبين.
src_text: The Articles required unanimous consent from all the states before they could be amended and states took the central government so lightly that their representatives were often absent.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Italy's national football, along with German national football team is the second most successful team in the world and were the FIFA World Cup champions in 2006.


Arabic:
gt: تعد كرة القدم الوطنية الإيطالية، إلى جانب المنتخب الألماني لكرة القدم ثاني أكثر الفرق نجاحاً في العالم وكانوا أبطال كأس العالم لكرة القدم في عام 2006.
src_text: Italy's national football, along with German national football team is the second most successful team in the world and were the FIFA World Cup champions in 2006.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Popular sports include football, basketball, volleyball, water-polo, fencing, rugby, cycling, ice hockey, roller hockey and F1 motor racing.


Arabic:
gt: تشمل الرياضات الشعبية كرة القدم، وكرة السلة، والكرة الطائرة، وكرة الماء، والمبارزة، والرجبي، وركوب الدراجات، وهوكي الجليد، وهوكي الإنزلاق وسباق السيارات F1.
src_text: Popular sports include football, basketball, volleyball, water-polo, fencing, rugby, cycling, ice hockey, roller hockey and F1 motor racing.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Winter sports are most popular in the Northern regions, with Italians competing in international games and Olympic events.


Arabic:
gt: الرياضات الشتوية هي الأكثر شعبية في المناطق الشمالية، حيث يتنافس الإيطاليون في الألعاب الدولية والأحداث الأولمبية.
src_text: Winter sports are most popular in the Northern regions, with Italians competing in international games and Olympic events.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Japans holds nearly 7,000 islands (the biggest being Honshu), making Japan the 7th largest island in the world!


Arabic:
gt: تضم اليابان ما يقرب من 7,000 جزيرة (أكبرها جزيرة هونشو)، ما يجعل اليابان سابع أكبر جزيرة في العالم!
src_text: Japans holds nearly 7,000 islands (the biggest being Honshu), making Japan the 7th largest island in the world!

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Due to the cluster/group of islands Japan has, Japan is often referred to, on a geographical stance, as an "archipelago"


Arabic:
gt: بسبب عنقود/مجموعة الجزر التي تمتلكها اليابان، فغالباً ما يُشار إلى اليابان -من منظور جغرافي- على أنها "أرخبيل"
src_text: Due to the cluster/group of islands Japan has, Japan is often referred to, on a geographical stance, as an "archipelago"

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Taiwan beginning start way back in 15th century where European sailors passing by record the island’s name as Ilha Formosa, or beautiful island.


Arabic:
gt: بدأت تايوان في طريق العودة في القرن الخامس عشر حيث سجّل البحارة الأوروبيين الذين يمرون اسم الجزيرة lha Formosa، أو الجزيرة الجميلة.
src_text: Taiwan beginning start way back in 15th century where European sailors passing by record the island’s name as Ilha Formosa, or beautiful island.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1624,Dutch East India Company establishes a base in southwestern Taiwan, initiating a transformation in aboriginal grain production practices and employing Chinese laborers to work on its rice and sugar plantations.


Arabic:
gt: في عام 1624، أنشأت شركة الهند الشرقية الهولندية قاعدة في جنوب غرب تايوان وبدأت في تغيير ممارسات إنتاج الحبوب الأصلية وتوظيف العمال الصينيين للعمل في مزارع الأرز والسكر.
src_text: In 1624,Dutch East India Company establishes a base in southwestern Taiwan, initiating a transformation in aboriginal grain production practices and employing Chinese laborers to work on its rice and sugar plantations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1683, Qing dynasty (1644-1912) forces take control of Taiwan’s western and northern coastal areas and declared Taiwan as a province of the Qing Empire in 1885.


Arabic:
gt: عام 1683، هيمنت جيوش أسرة تشينغ (1644-1912) على المناطق الساحلية الغربية والشمالية في تايوان وأعلنت تايوان مقاطعةً تابعةً لإمبراطورية تشينغ سنة 1885.
src_text: In 1683, Qing dynasty (1644-1912) forces take control of Taiwan’s western and northern coastal areas and declared Taiwan as a province of the Qing Empire in 1885.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1895, after defeat in the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), the Qing government signs the Treaty of Shimonoseki, by which it cedes sovereignty over Taiwan to Japan, which rules the island until 1945.


Arabic:
gt: في عام 1895 وبعد هزيمتها في الحرب الصينية اليابانية الأولى ما بين 1894 و 1895 وقعت حكومة تشينغ معاهدة شيمونوسكي، والتي تنازلت من خلالها عن سيادتها على التايوان لصالح اليابان التي حكمت الجزيرة حتى عام 1945.
src_text: In 1895, after defeat in the First Sino-Japanese War (1894-1895), the Qing government signs the Treaty of Shimonoseki, by which it cedes sovereignty over Taiwan to Japan, which rules the island until 1945.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Machu Picchu consist of three main structures, namely Intihuatana, the Temple of the Sun, and the Room of the Three Windows.


Arabic:
gt: تتكون مدينة ماتشو بيتشو من ثلاثة مبانٍ رئيسية، وهي إنتيهواتانا، ومعبد الشمس، وغرفة النوافذ الثلاثة.
src_text: Machu Picchu consist of three main structures, namely Intihuatana, the Temple of the Sun, and the Room of the Three Windows.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most of the buildings on the edges of the complex have been rebuilt in order to give tourists a better idea of how they originally appeared.


Arabic:
gt: أُعيد بناء معظم المباني الموجودة على حواف المجمع من أجل إعطاء السياح فكرة أفضل عن كيفية ظهورها في الأصل.
src_text: Most of the buildings on the edges of the complex have been rebuilt in order to give tourists a better idea of how they originally appeared.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:By 1976, thirty percent of Machu Picchu had been restored and restoration continues till today.


Arabic:
gt: وبحلول عام 1976، تمت استعادة ثلاثين في المائة من ماتشو بيتشو واستمرت أعمال الترميم حتى اليوم.
src_text: By 1976, thirty percent of Machu Picchu had been restored and restoration continues till today.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For example, the most common still image photography format in the world is 35mm, which was the dominant film size at the close of the analog film era.


Arabic:
gt: فعلى سبيل المثال، تنسيق تصوير الصور الساكنة الأكثر شيوعاً في العالم هو 35 ميليمتراً، وهو حجم الفيلم المسيطر في نهاية عصر الفيلم التناظري.
src_text: For example, the most common still image photography format in the world is 35mm, which was the dominant film size at the close of the analog film era.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is still produced today, but more importantly its aspect ratio has been inherited by digital camera image sensor formats.


Arabic:
gt: إن إنتاجها ما زال مستمراً حتى يومنا الحاضر، ولكن الأهم من ذلك هو أن هيئة مستشعرات الصور في الكاميرات الرقمية قد ورثت نسبة عرض الصورة الى ارتفاعها.
src_text: It is still produced today, but more importantly its aspect ratio has been inherited by digital camera image sensor formats.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The 35mm format is actually, somewhat confusingly, 36mm in width by 24mm in height.


Arabic:
gt: إن نموذج الـ35 مم هو في الحقيقة، مربك بعض الشيء، بعرض 36 مم وارتفاع 24 مم.
src_text: The 35mm format is actually, somewhat confusingly, 36mm in width by 24mm in height.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

src_text: The aspect ratio of this format (dividing by twelve to obtain the simplest whole-number ratio) is therefore said to be 3:2.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many common formats (APS family of formats, for example) are equal to or closely approximate this aspect ratio.


Arabic:
gt: تساوي أو تقارب العديد من الصيغ الشائعة (مجموعة صيغ نظام الصور المتقدم، على سبيل المثال) نسبةَ العرض إلى الارتفاع هذه.
src_text: Many common formats (APS family of formats, for example) are equal to or closely approximate this aspect ratio.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The much-abused and often-ridiculed rule of thirds is a simple guideline creating dynamism while keeping a measure of order in an image.


Arabic:
gt: قاعدة التثليث التي يُساء استخدامها والتي كثيراً ما يتم السخرية منها، تشكل مبدأ توجيهياً بسيطاً يعمل على خلق الديناميكية في حين يحافظ على قدر من النظام في صورة واضحة.
src_text: The much-abused and often-ridiculed rule of thirds is a simple guideline creating dynamism while keeping a measure of order in an image.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally (see example).


Arabic:
gt: يذكر أن أكثر مكان مؤثر للموضوع الرئيسي هو عند تقاطع الخطوط التي تقسم الصورة إلى أثلاث عمودياً وأفقياً (انظر المثال).
src_text: It states that the most effective place for the main subject is at the intersection of lines dividing the image into thirds vertically and horizontally (see example).

src_text: During this period of European history, the Catholic Church, which had become rich and powerful, came under scrutiny.

English:For over a thousand years the Christian religion had bound European states together despite differences in language and customs. I

src_text: For over a thousand years the Christian religion had bound European states together despite differences in language and customs. I

prompt:

Arabic:
gt: من بين المبادئ المسيحية الرئيسية أن الثروة لابد وأن تُستخدم لتخفيف المعاناة والفقر، وأن الأموال النقدية للكنيسة موجودة بشكل خاص لهذا السبب.
src_text: One of the main Christian tenets is that wealth should be used to alleviate suffering and poverty and that the monetary funds of the church are there specifically for that reason.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The central authority of the church had been in Rome for over a thousand years and this concentration of power and money led many to question whether this tenet was being met.


Arabic:
gt: كانت السلطة المركزية للكنيسة في روما لأكثر من ألف عام، وقد أدى هذا التركيز للسلطة والمال إلى تساؤل الكثيرين عن مدى الوفاء بمتطلبات العقيدة.
src_text: The central authority of the church had been in Rome for over a thousand years and this concentration of power and money led many to question whether this tenet was being met.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Soon after the outbreak of hostilities, Britain initiated a naval blockade of Germany.


Arabic:
gt: سرعان ما بادرت بريطانيا بمحاصرة ألمانيا بحرًيا بعد اندلاع المناوشات.
src_text: Soon after the outbreak of hostilities, Britain initiated a naval blockade of Germany.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The strategy proved effective, cutting off vital military and civilian supplies, although this blockade violated generally accepted international law codified by several international agreements of the past two centuries.


Arabic:
gt: أثبتت الإستراتيجية فاعليتها؛ قطع الإمدادات الحيوية العسكرية والمدنية، على الرغم من انتهاك هذا الحصار للقانون الدولي المقبول بشكل عام والذي دُوّن ونُسّق في عدة اتفاقيات دولية خلال القرنين الماضيين.
src_text: The strategy proved effective, cutting off vital military and civilian supplies, although this blockade violated generally accepted international law codified by several international agreements of the past two centuries.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Britain mined international waters to prevent any ships from entering entire sections of ocean, causing danger to even neutral ships.


Arabic:
gt: فقد لغمت بريطانيا المياه الدولية لمنع أي سفينة من دخول قطاعاتٍ كاملةٍ من المحيطات، الأمر الذي يهدد حتى السفن المحايدة.
src_text: Britain mined international waters to prevent any ships from entering entire sections of ocean, causing danger to even neutral ships.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since there was limited response to this tactic, Germany expected a similar response to its unrestricted submarine warfare.


Arabic:
gt: نظراً لوجود استجابة محدودة لهذا التكتيك، توقعت ألمانيا رداً مشابهاً على حرب الغواصات غير المقيدة الخاصة بها.
src_text: Since there was limited response to this tactic, Germany expected a similar response to its unrestricted submarine warfare.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:During the 1920s, the prevailing attitudes of most citizens and nations was that of pacifism and isolation.


Arabic:
gt: خلال العشرينيات من القرن الماضي، كانت المواقف السائدة عند معظم المواطنين والأمم هي المسالمة والعزلة.
src_text: During the 1920s, the prevailing attitudes of most citizens and nations was that of pacifism and isolation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After seeing the horrors and atrocities of war during World War I, nations desired to avoid such a situation again in the future.

gt: بعد رؤية أهوال وفظائع الحرب خلال الحرب العالمية الأولى، أرادت الدول تجنب هذا الموقف مرة أخرى في المستقبل.
src_text: After seeing the horrors and atrocities of war during World War I, nations desired to avoid such a situation again in the future.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1884, Tesla moved to the United States of America to accept a job with the Edison Company in New York City.


Arabic:
gt: في سنة 1884 انتقل تيسلا إلى الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية للعمل مع شركة إديسون في مدينة نيويورك.
src_text: In 1884, Tesla moved to the United States of America to accept a job with the Edison Company in New York City.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:He arrived in the US with 4 cents to his name, a book of poetry, and a letter of recommendation from Charles Batchelor (his manager in his previous job) to Thomas Edison.


Arabic:
gt: وصل إلى الولايات المتحدة ومعه 4 سنتات، وكتاب شعر، وخطاب توصية من تشارلز باتشيلور (مديره في وظيفته السابقة) إلى توماس إديسون.
src_text: He arrived in the US with 4 cents to his name, a book of poetry, and a letter of recommendation from Charles Batchelor (his manager in his previous job) to Thomas Edison.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Ancient China had a unique way of showing different time periods; each stage of China or each family that was in power was a distinctive dynasty.


Arabic:
gt: كان لدى الصين القديمة طريقةٌ فريدةٌ لعرض الفترات الزمنية المختلفة؛ كانت كل مرحلة من مراحل الصين أو كل أسرة كانت في السلطة من نوعٍ مختلفٍ.
src_text: Ancient China had a unique way of showing different time periods; each stage of China or each family that was in power was a distinctive dynasty.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best-known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin Dynasty.


Arabic:
gt: بالإضافة إلى ذلك، كان هناك بين كل سلالة حاكمة عصرٌ غير مستقرٍ من المقاطعات المقسمة. أشهر هذه الفترات كانت حقبة الممالك الثلاث التي دامت 60 عاماً بين أسرة هان وسلالة جين.
src_text: Also between each dynasty was an unstable age of divided provinces. The best-known of these periods was the Three Kingdoms epoch taking place for 60 years between the Han and the Jin Dynasty.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:During these periods fierce warfare took place between many nobles fighting for the throne.


Arabic:
gt: نشأت خلال هذه الفترات حرب شرسة بين العديد من النبلاء سعيًا إلى العرش.
src_text: During these periods fierce warfare took place between many nobles fighting for the throne.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Three Kingdoms was one of the bloodiest eras in Ancient China’s history thousands of people died fighting to sit in the highest seat in the grand palace at Xi’an.


Arabic:
gt: حقبة الممالك الثلاثة هي واحدة من أكثر الحقب دمويةً في تاريخ الصين القديمة مات آلاف من الناس خلال القتال في سبيل الجلوس على أعلى المقاعد في القصر الكبير في شيان.
src_text: The Three Kingdoms was one of the bloodiest eras in Ancient China’s history thousands of people died fighting to sit in the highest seat in the grand palace at Xi’an.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are a lot of social and political effects such as the use of metric system, a shift from absolutism to republicanism, nationalism and the belief the country belongs to the people not to one sole ruler.


Arabic:
gt: هناك الكثير من الآثار الاجتماعية والسياسية مثل استخدام النظام المتري، والتحول من الاستبداد إلى النظام الجمهوري، والقومية، والاعتقاد بأن البلاد ملك للشعب وليس للحاكم وحده.
src_text: There are a lot of social and political effects such as the use of metric system, a shift from absolutism to republicanism, nationalism and the belief the country belongs to the people not to one sole ruler.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Also after the Revolution occupations were open to all male applicants allowing the most ambitious and successful to succeed.


Arabic:
gt: كما أنه من بعد الثورة، كانت المهن مفتوحةً لجميع المتقدّمين الذكور ممّا سمح للأكثر طموحاً ونجاحاً بالنجاح.
src_text: Also after the Revolution occupations were open to all male applicants allowing the most ambitious and successful to succeed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Same goes for the military because instead of army rankings being based on class they were now based on cailaber.


Arabic:
gt: الشيء نفسه ينطبق على الجيش لأنه بدلاً من أن تستند تصنيفات الجيش إلى الطبقة، فقد أصبحت الآن تعتمد على الأعيرة.
src_text: Same goes for the military because instead of army rankings being based on class they were now based on cailaber.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The French Revolution also inspired many other repressed working class people of other country's to began their own revolutions.


Arabic:
gt: لقد ألهمت الثورة الفرنسية أيضاً العديد من أبناء الطبقة العاملة المُضطهدة الآخرين في البلدان الأخرى لنزع فتيل ثوراتهم.
src_text: The French Revolution also inspired many other repressed working class people of other country's to began their own revolutions.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Muhammad was deeply interested in matters beyond this mundane life. He used to frequent a cave that became known as “Hira‘” on the Mountain of “Noor” (light) for contemplation.


Arabic:
gt: كان محمد مهتمّاً بشدة بالأمور التي تتجاوز هذه الحياة الدنيويّة. اعتاد التردّد على غار أصبح يعرف بـ"حراء" فوق جبل "النور" للتأمّل.
src_text: Muhammad was deeply interested in matters beyond this mundane life. He used to frequent a cave that became known as “Hira‘” on the Mountain of “Noor” (light) for contemplation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:he cave itself, which survived the times, gives a very vivid image of Muhammad’s spiritual inclinations.


Arabic:
gt: يقدم الغار نفسه، الذي بقى على مر العصور، صورة حية للغاية عن ميول النبي محمد الروحية.
src_text: he cave itself, which survived the times, gives a very vivid image of Muhammad’s spiritual inclinations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Resting on the top of one of the mountains north of Mecca, the cave is completely isolated from the rest of the world.


Arabic:
gt: يقع الكهف على قمة أحد الجبال شمال مكة، وهو معزول تماماً عن بقية العالم.
src_text: Resting on the top of one of the mountains north of Mecca, the cave is completely isolated from the rest of the world.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In fact, it is not easy to find at all even if one knew it existed. Once inside the cave, it is a total isolation.


Arabic:
gt: وفي الحقيقة، فليس من السهل العثور عليه على الإطلاق حتى لو كنت تعلم بوجوده. فبمجرد الدخول إلى الكهف ، تصبح في عزلةٍ تامةٍ.
src_text: In fact, it is not easy to find at all even if one knew it existed. Once inside the cave, it is a total isolation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Nothing can be seen other than the clear, beautiful sky above and the many surrounding mountains. Very little of this world can be seen or heard from inside the cave.


Arabic:
gt: ولا شيء يمكن رؤيته غير السماء الصافية الجميلة فوق الجبال الكثيرة المحيطة. لا يمكن مشاهدة أو سماع سوى القليل جداً من هذا العالم داخل الكهف.
src_text: Nothing can be seen other than the clear, beautiful sky above and the many surrounding mountains. Very little of this world can be seen or heard from inside the cave.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Great Pyramid at Giza is the only one of the seven wonders that is still standing today.


Arabic:
gt: يعد الهرم الأكبر في محافظة "الجيزة" هو الوحيد من العجائب السبع التي لا تزال قائمة حتى يومنا هذا.
src_text: The Great Pyramid at Giza is the only one of the seven wonders that is still standing today.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Built by the Egyptians in the third century BCE, the Great Pyramid is one of many large pyramid structures built to honor dead Pharaoh.


Arabic:
gt: تم بناؤه من قِبل المصريين في القرن الثالث من الحقبة الحالية، يعتبر الهرم الأعظم واحداً من الأهرام الضخمة المبنية على شرف الفرعون الميت.
src_text: Built by the Egyptians in the third century BCE, the Great Pyramid is one of many large pyramid structures built to honor dead Pharaoh.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.


Arabic:
gt: تحتوي هضبة الجيزة، أو "مدينة الجيزة الجنائزية" بوادي الموتى المصري، على عدة أهرامات (أكبرها الهرم الأكبر) ومقابر صغيرة ومعابد وأبو الهول.
src_text: The Giza Plateau, or "Giza Necropolis" in the Egyptian Valley of the Dead contains several pyramids (of which the great pyramid is the largest), several small tombs, several temples, and the great Sphinx.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The great pyramid was created to honor the Pharaoh Khufu, and many of the smaller pyramids, tombs, and temples were built to honor Khufu's wives and family members.


Arabic:
gt: تم إنشاء الهرم الأكبر لتكريم الفرعون خوفو، وتم بناء العديد من الأهرامات والمقابر والمعابد الأصغر لتكريم زوجات خوفو وأفراد أسرته.
src_text: The great pyramid was created to honor the Pharaoh Khufu, and many of the smaller pyramids, tombs, and temples were built to honor Khufu's wives and family members.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The "up bow" mark looks like a V and the "down bow mark" like a staple or a square missing its bottom side.


Arabic:
gt: تبدو علامة "الوتر لأعلى" مثل حرف الـV وتبدو علامة "الوتر لأسفل" مثل الدباسة أو مربّع بدون الجانب السفلي منه.
src_text: The "up bow" mark looks like a V and the "down bow mark" like a staple or a square missing its bottom side.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Up means you should start at the tip and push the bow, and down means you should start at the frog (which is where your hand is holding the bow) and pull the bow.


Arabic:
gt: تفيد علامة أعلى بوجوب البدء من الطرف ودفع القوس، بينما تعني علامة أسفل وجوب البدء من نهاية القوس (حيث تمسك يدك بالقوس) وسحبه.
src_text: Up means you should start at the tip and push the bow, and down means you should start at the frog (which is where your hand is holding the bow) and pull the bow.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:An up-bow usually generates a softer sound, while a down-bow is stronger and more assertive.


Arabic:
gt: يوّلد القوس العلوي في العادة صوتاً أكثر نعومة، بينما يكون القوس السفلي أقوى وأكثر حزماً
src_text: An up-bow usually generates a softer sound, while a down-bow is stronger and more assertive.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Feel free to pencil in your own marks, but remember the printed bowing marks are there for a musical reason, so they should usually be respected.


Arabic:
gt: لا تتردد في رسم علاماتك الخاصة بالقلم الرصاص، ولكن تذكر أن العلامات المطبوعة المنحنية موجودة لسبب موسيقي، لذلك يجب احترامها عادة.
src_text: Feel free to pencil in your own marks, but remember the printed bowing marks are there for a musical reason, so they should usually be respected.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The terrified King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette their two young children (11 year old Marie Therese and four year old Louis-Charles) and the King's sister, Madam Elizabeth, on the 6th October 1789 were forced back to Paris from Versailles by a mob of market women.


Arabic:
gt: مرعوبين، أُجبر الملك لويس السادس عشر والملكة ماري أنطوانيت وطفلاهما الصغيران (ماري تيريزذات الـ11 عاماً ولويس تشارلز ذو الأربع أعوام) وأخت الملك، السيدة إليزابيث، في السادس من تشرين الأول عام 1789، على الرجوع من فرساي إلى باريس بواسطة حشد من غوغاء نسوة السوق.
src_text: The terrified King Louis XVI, Queen Marie Antoinette their two young children (11 year old Marie Therese and four year old Louis-Charles) and the King's sister, Madam Elizabeth, on the 6th October 1789 were forced back to Paris from Versailles by a mob of market women.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In a carriage, they traveled back to Paris surrounded by a mob of people screaming and shouting threats against the King and Queen.


Arabic:
gt: سافروا عودةً إلى باريس في عربة يحيط بهم حشد كبير من الناس الذين يصرخون ويهتفون ضد الملك والملكة.
src_text: In a carriage, they traveled back to Paris surrounded by a mob of people screaming and shouting threats against the King and Queen.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The mob of people forced the King And Queen to have their carriage windows wide open.


Arabic:
gt: تمكنت مجموعة من الجماهير من إجبار الملك والملكة على فتح نوافذ سيارتهم على مصراعيها.
src_text: The mob of people forced the King And Queen to have their carriage windows wide open.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:At one point a member of the mob waved the head of a royal guard killed at Versailles in front of the terrified Queen.


Arabic:
gt: قام أحد أفراد العصابة في وقت ما بالتلويح برأس أحد أفراد الحرس الملكي المقتولين في فرساي أمام الملكة المذعورة.
src_text: At one point a member of the mob waved the head of a royal guard killed at Versailles in front of the terrified Queen.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The war expenditures of U.S. imperialism in the conquest of the Philippines were paid for by the Filipino people themselves.


Arabic:
gt: تكبد الشعب الفلبيني نفقات حرب إمبريالية الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية في غزوها للفلبين.
src_text: The war expenditures of U.S. imperialism in the conquest of the Philippines were paid for by the Filipino people themselves.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They were compelled to pay taxes to the U.S. colonial regime to defray a major part of the expenditures and the interest on bonds floated in the name of the Philippine government through the Wall Street banking houses.


Arabic:
gt: اضطر هؤلاء إلى دفع الضرائب للنظام الاستعماري الأميركي لتغطية جزء كبير من النفقات والفوائد على السندات التي طرحت باسم الحكومة الفلبينية عبر المنازل المصرفية وول ستريت.
src_text: They were compelled to pay taxes to the U.S. colonial regime to defray a major part of the expenditures and the interest on bonds floated in the name of the Philippine government through the Wall Street banking houses.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Of course, the superprofits derived from the protracted exploitation of the Filipino people would constitute the basic gains of U.S. imperialism.


Arabic:
gt: بطبيعة الحال، فإن الأرباح الفائقة المستمدة من الاستغلال المطول للشعب الفلبيني ستشكل المكاسب الأساسية للإمبريالية الأمريكية.
src_text: Of course, the superprofits derived from the protracted exploitation of the Filipino people would constitute the basic gains of U.S. imperialism.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:To understand the Templars one must understand the context that prompted the creation of the order.


Arabic:
gt: علينا فهم السياق الدافع لإنشاء التنظيم، لكي نستوعب فرسان المعبد.
src_text: To understand the Templars one must understand the context that prompted the creation of the order.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The age where the events took place is commonly referred as the High Middle Ages the period of European history in the 11th, 12th, and 13th centuries (AD 1000–1300).


Arabic:
gt: العصر الذي دارت فيه تلك الأحداث كان يُعرف بالعصور الوسطى العليا وهي الفترة من التاريخ الأوروبي في القرن الحادي عشر والثاني عشر والثالث عشر (1000-1300 بعد الميلاد).
src_text: The age where the events took place is commonly referred as the High Middle Ages the period of European history in the 11th, 12th, and 13th centuries (AD 1000–1300).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The High Middle Ages were preceded by the Early Middle Ages and followed by the Late Middle Ages, which by convention ends around 1500.


Arabic:
gt: سُبقت العصور الوسطى العليا بالعصور الوسطى المبكرة وتبعها أواخر العصور الوسطى، والتي تنتهي بمجملها حوالي عام ١٥٠٠.
src_text: The High Middle Ages were preceded by the Early Middle Ages and followed by the Late Middle Ages, which by convention ends around 1500.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Technological determinism is a term that encompasses a wide range of ideas in practice, from technology-push or the technological imperative to a strict sense that human destiny is driven by an underlying logic associated with scientific laws and their manifestation in technology.


Arabic:
gt: الحتمية التكنولوجية هي مصطلح يشمل مجموعة واسعة من الأفكار في الممارسة، من دفع التكنولوجيا أو الضرورة التكنولوجية إلى الشعور الصارم بأن مصير الإنسان مدفوع بمنطق أساسي مرتبط بالقوانين العلمية ومظاهرها في التكنولوجيا.
src_text: Technological determinism is a term that encompasses a wide range of ideas in practice, from technology-push or the technological imperative to a strict sense that human destiny is driven by an underlying logic associated with scientific laws and their manifestation in technology.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most interpretations of technological determinism share two general ideas: that the development of technology itself follows a path largely beyond cultural or political influence, and that technology in turn has "effects" on societies that are inherent, rather than socially conditioned.


Arabic:
gt: هناك فكرتان عامّتان مشترَكتان في معظمِ تفسيرات الحتميةِ التكنولوجيّة: أنّ تطوّر التّكنولوجيا نفسها يتبع مساراً إلى حدٍ كبيرٍ يتجاوز التّأثير الثّقافي أو السّياسي، وأن هذه التكنولوجيا بدورها لها "تأثيراتٍ" على المجتمعات المتأصّلة، بدلاً من المرتبطةِ بالمجتمع.
src_text: Most interpretations of technological determinism share two general ideas: that the development of technology itself follows a path largely beyond cultural or political influence, and that technology in turn has "effects" on societies that are inherent, rather than socially conditioned.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For example, one might say that the motor car necessarily leads to the development of roads.


Arabic:
gt: على سبيل المثال، قد يقول المرء أن محرك السيارة يؤدي بالضرورة إلى تطوير الطرق.
src_text: For example, one might say that the motor car necessarily leads to the development of roads.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, a nationwide road network is not economically viable for just a handful of cars, so new methods of production are developed to reduce the cost of car ownership.


Arabic:
gt: ولكن إنشاء شبكة طرق بامتداد البلاد ليس ذا جدوى اقتصادية لحفنة من السيارات، لذا يتم تطوير طرق جديدة لتقليل تكلفة ملكية سيارة.
src_text: However, a nationwide road network is not economically viable for just a handful of cars, so new methods of production are developed to reduce the cost of car ownership.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Mass car ownership also leads to a higher incidence of accidents on the roads, which leads to the invention of new techniques in healthcare for repairing damaged bodies.


Arabic:
gt: يؤدي الامتلاك الجماعي للسيارات أيضاً إلى ارتفاع معدل الحوادث على الطرق، مما يؤدي إلى ابتكار تقنيات جديدة في الرعاية الصحية لعلاج الأجسام المتضررة.
src_text: Mass car ownership also leads to a higher incidence of accidents on the roads, which leads to the invention of new techniques in healthcare for repairing damaged bodies.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Romanticism had a large element of cultural determinism, drawn from writers such as Goethe, Fichte, and Schlegel.


Arabic:
gt: كان للرومانسية عنصراً كبيراً من الحتمية الثقافية مستمدة من كتّاب مثل جوته وفيشت وشليغل.
src_text: Romanticism had a large element of cultural determinism, drawn from writers such as Goethe, Fichte, and Schlegel.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the context of Romanticism, the geography molded individuals, and over time customs and culture related to that geography arose, and these, being in harmony with the place of the society, were better than arbitrarily imposed laws.


Arabic:
gt: في سياق الحركة الرومانسية، شكلت الجغرافيا الأفراد، وبمرور الوقت نشأت العادات والثقافة المتصلة بتلك الجغرافيا، وكان هؤلاء، باعتبارهم في وئام مع مكان المجتمع، أفضل من القوانين المفروضة تعسفيًا.
src_text: In the context of Romanticism, the geography molded individuals, and over time customs and culture related to that geography arose, and these, being in harmony with the place of the society, were better than arbitrarily imposed laws.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the manner that Paris is known as the fashion capital of the contemporary world, Constantinople was regarded as the fashion capital of feudal Europe.


Arabic:
gt: كما تشتهر باريس بكونها عاصمة الموضة في العالم المعاصر، كانت القسطنطينيّة تُعتبر عاصمة الموضة في أوروبا الإقطاعيّة.
src_text: In the manner that Paris is known as the fashion capital of the contemporary world, Constantinople was regarded as the fashion capital of feudal Europe.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Its renown for being an epicenter of luxury began in about 400 A.D. and lasted up until about 1100 A.D.


Arabic:
gt: شهرتها بكونها مركز الفخامة بدأت في عام 400 بعد الميلاد واستمرت حتى عام 1100 بعد الميلاد.
src_text: Its renown for being an epicenter of luxury began in about 400 A.D. and lasted up until about 1100 A.D.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Its status declined during the twelfth century mainly due to the fact that Crusaders had returned bearing gifts such as silks and spices that were valued more than what Byzantine markets offered.


Arabic:
gt: انحدرت حالتها خلال القرن الثاني عشر في الأساس بسبب حقيقة أن الحملات الصليبية قد عادت وهي تحمل معها هدايا مثل الحرير والتوابل والتي كانت ذات قيمة أعلى مما كانت تقدمه الأسواق البيزنطية.
src_text: Its status declined during the twelfth century mainly due to the fact that Crusaders had returned bearing gifts such as silks and spices that were valued more than what Byzantine markets offered.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It was at this time that the transfer of the title of Fashion Capital from Constantinople to Paris was made.


Arabic:
gt: وفي هذا الوقت أُطلق لقب عاصمة الموضة على باريس بدلا من القسطنطينية.
src_text: It was at this time that the transfer of the title of Fashion Capital from Constantinople to Paris was made.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Gothic style peaked in the period between the 10th - 11th centuries and the 14th century.


Arabic:
gt: بلغ الطراز القوطي ذروته في فترة ما بين القرنين العاشر أو الحادي عشر إلى القرن الرابع عشر.
src_text: Gothic style peaked in the period between the 10th - 11th centuries and the 14th century.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:At the beginning dress was heavily influenced by the Byzantine culture in the east.


Arabic:
gt: في البداية، أثرت الثقافة البيزنطية في الشرق على الملابس تأثيرًا شديدًا.
src_text: At the beginning dress was heavily influenced by the Byzantine culture in the east.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, due to the slow communication channels, styles in the west could lag behind by 25 to 30 year.


Arabic:
gt: وعلى الرغم من ذلك، فنظرا لبطء قنوات التواصل، قد تتأخر الأنماط في الغرب قدر ما يقارب 25 إلى 30 سنة.
src_text: However, due to the slow communication channels, styles in the west could lag behind by 25 to 30 year.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:towards the end of the Middle Ages western Europe began to develop their own style. one of the biggest developments of the time as a result of the crusades people began to use buttons to fasten clothing.


Arabic:
gt: في نهاية العصور الوسطى، بدأت أوروبا الغربية في تطوير أسلوبها الخاص. واحدة من أكبر التطورات في ذلك الوقت نتيجة للحروب الصليبية بدأ الناس في استخدام الأزرار لربط الملابس.
src_text: towards the end of the Middle Ages western Europe began to develop their own style. one of the biggest developments of the time as a result of the crusades people began to use buttons to fasten clothing.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Subsistence agriculture is agriculture carried out for the production of enough food to meet just the needs of the agriculturalist and his/her family.


Arabic:
gt: زراعةُ الكِفافِ هي الزّراعة التي يتمّ إجراؤها لإنتاجِ ما يكفي من الغذاء لتلبيةِ ما يحتاجه المزارعُ وعائلته فقط.
src_text: Subsistence agriculture is agriculture carried out for the production of enough food to meet just the needs of the agriculturalist and his/her family.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Subsistence agriculture is a simple, often organic, system using saved seed native to the ecoregion combined with crop rotation or other relatively simple techniques to maximize yield.


Arabic:
gt: تعتبر زراعة الكفاف -والتي غالباً ما تكون عضويةً- نظاماً بسيطاً تستخدم فيه البذور المخزّنة التي تتناسب والنظام البيئي للمنطقة، بالإضافة لأسلوب تناوب المحاصيل أو غيرها من التقنيات البسيطة نسبياً بهدف زيادة الناتج.
src_text: Subsistence agriculture is a simple, often organic, system using saved seed native to the ecoregion combined with crop rotation or other relatively simple techniques to maximize yield.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Historically most farmers were engaged in subsistence agriculture and this is still the case in many developing nations.


Arabic:
gt: عمل معظم المزارعين تاريخياً في زراعة الكفاف، ولا تزال هذه هي الحال في العديد من الدول النامية.
src_text: Historically most farmers were engaged in subsistence agriculture and this is still the case in many developing nations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Subcultures bring together like-minded individuals who feel neglected by societal standards and allow them to develop a sense of identity.


Arabic:
gt: تقوم الثّقافات الفرعيّة بالتّوفيق بين الأفراد المتشابهين في التفكير والذين يشعرون بالإهمال من قِبل المعايير المجتمعيّة وتسمح لهم بتطوير شعور بالهويّة.
src_text: Subcultures bring together like-minded individuals who feel neglected by societal standards and allow them to develop a sense of identity.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Subcultures can be distinctive because of the age, ethnicity, class, location, and/or gender of the members.


Arabic:
gt: يحتمل أن تكون الثقافات الفرعية مُمَيِّزة بسبب العمر والعِرق والطبقة والموقع و/أو جنس الأعضاء.
src_text: Subcultures can be distinctive because of the age, ethnicity, class, location, and/or gender of the members.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The qualities that determine a subculture as distinct may be linguistic, aesthetic, religious, political, sexual, geographical, or a combination of factors.


Arabic:
gt: ربما تكون الصفات التي تحدد تميز ثقافة فرعية هي لغوية، أو جمالية، أو دينية، أو سياسية، أو جنسية، أو جغرافية، أو مجموعة من العوامل.
src_text: The qualities that determine a subculture as distinct may be linguistic, aesthetic, religious, political, sexual, geographical, or a combination of factors.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Members of a subculture often signal their membership through a distinctive and symbolic use of style, which includes fashions, mannerisms, and argot.


Arabic:
gt: يشير أعضاء الثقافات الفرعية إلى عضويتهم من خلال استخدام مختلف ورمزي للأسلوب الذي يتضمن الملابس، والتكلف، والاصطلاح.
src_text: Members of a subculture often signal their membership through a distinctive and symbolic use of style, which includes fashions, mannerisms, and argot.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:One of the most common methods used to illustrate the importance of socialization is to draw upon the few unfortunate cases of children who were, through neglect, misfortune, or wilful abuse, not socialized by adults while they were growing up.


Arabic:
gt: ومن بين أكثر الطرق شيوعاً التي تستخدم لتوضيح أهمية التنشئة الاجتماعية، الاعتماد على الحالات القليلة المؤسفة للأطفال الذين عانوا، من خلال الإهمال أو سوء الحظ أو الإيذاء المتعمد، غير مرتبطين اجتماعياً من جانب البالغين أثناء نشأتهم.
src_text: One of the most common methods used to illustrate the importance of socialization is to draw upon the few unfortunate cases of children who were, through neglect, misfortune, or wilful abuse, not socialized by adults while they were growing up.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Such children are called "feral" or wild. Some feral children have been confined by people (usually their own parents); in some cases this child abandonment was due to the parents' rejection of a child's severe intellectual or physical impairment.


Arabic:
gt: ويطلق على هؤلاء الأطفال اسم "المتوحش" أو البريّ. تمّ حبسُ بعضِ الأطفال الضّالين من قبل أشخاصٍ (عادةً والديهم)؛ في بعضِ الحالات، كان التّخلي عن الطّفل بسبب رفض الوالدين لإعاقة الطّفل العقليّة أو الجسديّة الشديدة.
src_text: Such children are called "feral" or wild. Some feral children have been confined by people (usually their own parents); in some cases this child abandonment was due to the parents' rejection of a child's severe intellectual or physical impairment.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Feral children may have experienced severe child abuse or trauma before being abandoned or running away.


Arabic:
gt: ربما تعرض الأطفال المتوحشون إلى إساءة معاملة أثناء الطفولة أو صدمات شديدة قبل التخلي عنهم أو هروبهم.
src_text: Feral children may have experienced severe child abuse or trauma before being abandoned or running away.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Others are alleged to have been brought up by animals; some are said to have lived in the wild on their own.


Arabic:
gt: وآخرون يُزعم أنه تمت تربيتهم من قبل الحيوانات؛ فيما يقال أن البعض عاش في البرية بمفرده.
src_text: Others are alleged to have been brought up by animals; some are said to have lived in the wild on their own.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When completely brought up by non-human animals, the feral child exhibits behaviors (within physical limits) almost entirely like those of the particular care-animal, such as its fear of or indifference to humans.


Arabic:
gt: عندما تتم تربيته من قبل حيوانات غير بشرية، يظهر الطفل الوحشي سلوكيات (ضمن الحدود المادية) تشبه تماماً سلوكيات حيوان الرعاية الخاصة، مثل الخوف من البشر أو عدم الاكتراث بهم.
src_text: When completely brought up by non-human animals, the feral child exhibits behaviors (within physical limits) almost entirely like those of the particular care-animal, such as its fear of or indifference to humans.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:While project based learning should make learning easier and more interesting, scaffolding goes a step beyond.


Arabic:
gt: بينما يجب أن يجعل التعلم المستند إلى المشاريع عملية التعلم أسهل وأكثر إثارة للاهتمام، فإن المساندة تتجاوز ذلك.
src_text: While project based learning should make learning easier and more interesting, scaffolding goes a step beyond.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Scaffolding is not a method of learning but rather an aid that provides support to individuals whom are undergoing a new learning experience such as using a new computer program or beginning a new project.


Arabic:
gt: التعلم التفاعلي ليس طريقة للتعلم ولكنها بالأحرى وسيلة مساعدة تقدم الدعم للأفراد الذين يمرون بتجربة تعليمية جديدة مثل استخدام برنامج كمبيوتر جديد أو بدء مشروع جديد.
src_text: Scaffolding is not a method of learning but rather an aid that provides support to individuals whom are undergoing a new learning experience such as using a new computer program or beginning a new project.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Scaffolds can be both virtual and real, in other words, a teacher is a form of scaffold but so is the little paperclip man in Microsoft Office.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن أن يكون التعلم التفاعلي افتراضياً وعلى أرض الواقع، وبصياغةٍ أخرى، المعلم هو شكل من أشكال التعلم التفاعلي، وكذلك رجل مشبك الورق في مايكروسوفت أوفيس.
src_text: Scaffolds can be both virtual and real, in other words, a teacher is a form of scaffold but so is the little paperclip man in Microsoft Office.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Virtual Scaffolds are internalized in the software and are meant to question, prompt, and explain procedures that may have been to challenging for the student to handle alone.


Arabic:
gt: يتمُّ دعْم التعلُّم التفاعليّ في البرنامج داخليًا ويهدف إلى طرح الأسئلة والتحفيز وشرح الإجراءاتِ التي قد يكون من الصعب على الطالب التعامل معها بمفرده.
src_text: Virtual Scaffolds are internalized in the software and are meant to question, prompt, and explain procedures that may have been to challenging for the student to handle alone.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Children are placed in Foster Care for a wide variety of reasons that range from neglect, to abuse, and even to extortion.


Arabic:
gt: ويوضع الأطفال في إطار الرعاية الحاضنة لأسباب متنوعة تتراوح بين الإهمال والإيذاء وحتى الابتزاز.
src_text: Children are placed in Foster Care for a wide variety of reasons that range from neglect, to abuse, and even to extortion.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:No child should ever have to grow up in an environment that is not nurturing, caring, and educational, but they do.


Arabic:
gt: لا ينبغي لأي طفل أبداً أن ينمو في بيئة لا تقوم على التنشئة والرعاية والتعليم، ولكنهم يفعلون ذلك.
src_text: No child should ever have to grow up in an environment that is not nurturing, caring, and educational, but they do.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:We perceive the Foster Care System to be a safety zone for these children.


Arabic:
gt: ندرك أن نظام الرعاية البديلة يعد منطقة الأمان لهؤلاء الأطفال.
src_text: We perceive the Foster Care System to be a safety zone for these children.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Our foster care system is supposed to provide safe homes, loving caregivers, stable education, and reliable health care.


Arabic:
gt: يُفترض نظامنا للرعاية بالتبني أن يوفر منازل آمنة، ومقدمي رعاية محبين، وتعليمًا مستقرًا، ورعاية صحية يمكن الاعتماد عليها.
src_text: Our foster care system is supposed to provide safe homes, loving caregivers, stable education, and reliable health care.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Foster care is supposed to provide all the necessities that were lacking in the home they were previously taken from.


Arabic:
gt: يجب على الرعاية البديلة توفير كل الضروريّات التي افتقدوها في البيوت التي خرجوا منها سابقاً.
src_text: Foster care is supposed to provide all the necessities that were lacking in the home they were previously taken from.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Internet combines elements of both mass and interpersonal communication.


Arabic:
gt: يجمع الإنترنت بين عناصر كلٍّ من التواصل الجماهيري والشخصي.
src_text: The Internet combines elements of both mass and interpersonal communication.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The distinct characteristics of the Internet lead to additional dimensions in terms of the uses and gratifications approach.


Arabic:
gt: تؤدي الخصائص المميزة للإنترنت إلى أبعاد إضافية من حيث نهج الاستخدامات وطرق الإشباع.
src_text: The distinct characteristics of the Internet lead to additional dimensions in terms of the uses and gratifications approach.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For example, “learning” and “socialization” are suggested as important motivations for Internet use (James et al., 1995).


Arabic:
gt: فعلى سبيل المثال، يقترح البعض "التعلم" و"التنشئة الاجتماعية" كدوافع مهمّة لاستخدام شبكة الإنترنت (جيمس وغيره، 1995).
src_text: For example, “learning” and “socialization” are suggested as important motivations for Internet use (James et al., 1995).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:“Personal involvement” and “continuing relationships” were also identified as new motivation aspects by Eighmey and McCord (1998) when they investigated audience reactions to websites.


Arabic:
gt: تم التعرف على "المشاركة الشخصية" و "العلاقات المستمرة" كجوانب تحفيزية جديدة بواسطة إيمي ومكورد (1998) عندما درسوا رد فعل الجمهور على مواقع الويب.
src_text: “Personal involvement” and “continuing relationships” were also identified as new motivation aspects by Eighmey and McCord (1998) when they investigated audience reactions to websites.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The use of video recording has led to important discoveries in the interpretation of micro-expressions, facial movements which last a few milliseconds.


Arabic:
gt: أدى استخدام تسجيلات الفيديو إلى اكتشافات هامة في مجال تفسير التعابير الدقيقة للوجه، وهي حركات للوجه تستمر لبضع أجزاء من الثانية الواحدة.
src_text: The use of video recording has led to important discoveries in the interpretation of micro-expressions, facial movements which last a few milliseconds.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In particular, it is claimed that one can detect whether a person is lying by interpreting micro-expressions correctly.


Arabic:
gt: ويُدّعى على وجه الخصوص أن المرء يستطيع أن يكتشف ما إذا كان الشخص يكذب من خلال تفسير التعبيرات الدقيقة بشكل صحيح.
src_text: In particular, it is claimed that one can detect whether a person is lying by interpreting micro-expressions correctly.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Oliver Sacks, in his paper The President's Speech, indicated how people who are unable to understand speech because of brain damage are nevertheless able to assess sincerity accurately.


Arabic:
gt: وقد أشارَ أوليفر ساكس في ورقته إلى أنّ خطاب الرّئيس يشير إلى أنّ الأشخاص غير القادرين على فهم الكلام بسبب تلفِ الدّماغ يكونون قادرين على تقييم الصّدق بدقةٍ.
src_text: Oliver Sacks, in his paper The President's Speech, indicated how people who are unable to understand speech because of brain damage are nevertheless able to assess sincerity accurately.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:He even suggests that such abilities in interpreting human behavior may be shared by animals such as domestic dogs.


Arabic:
gt: بل إنه يطرح فكرة أن تكون هذه القدرات في تحليل السلوك البشري مشتركة مع بعض الحيوانات، مثل الكلاب الأليفة.
src_text: He even suggests that such abilities in interpreting human behavior may be shared by animals such as domestic dogs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Twentieth century research has shown that there are two pools of genetic variation: hidden and expressed.


Arabic:
gt: أوضحت أبحاث القرن العشرين وجود مجموعتين من التنوعات الچينية:- مجموعة مستترة وأخرى ظاهرة.
src_text: Twentieth century research has shown that there are two pools of genetic variation: hidden and expressed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Mutation adds new genetic variation, and selection removes it from the pool of expressed variation.


Arabic:
gt: تضيف الطفرة اختلافات وراثيّة جديدة، ويزيلها الانتقاء من تجميعة الاختلافات التعبيريّة.
src_text: Mutation adds new genetic variation, and selection removes it from the pool of expressed variation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Segregation and recombination shuffle variation back and forth between the two pools with each generation.


Arabic:
gt: تعمل عمليتا الفصل وإعادة التركيب على جعل التباين عشوائياً ذهاباً وإياباً بين المجموعتين مع كل جيل.
src_text: Segregation and recombination shuffle variation back and forth between the two pools with each generation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Out on the savanna, it is hard for a primate with a digestive system like that of humans to satisfy its amino-acid requirements from available plant resources.


Arabic:
gt: في السافانا، يصعب على الرئيسيات التي لديها جهاز هضمي مشابه للبشر تلبية متطلباتها من الأحماض الأمينية من الموارد النباتية المتاحة.
src_text: Out on the savanna, it is hard for a primate with a digestive system like that of humans to satisfy its amino-acid requirements from available plant resources.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Moreover, failure to do so has serious consequences: growth depression, malnutrition, and ultimately death.


Arabic:
gt: كما أن الفشل في فعل ذلك سيؤدي إلى عواقب وخيمة: اكتئاب النمو، ونقص التغذية، وفي النهاية الموت.
src_text: Moreover, failure to do so has serious consequences: growth depression, malnutrition, and ultimately death.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The most readily accessible plant resources would have been the proteins accessible in leaves and legumes, but these are hard for primates like us to digest unless they are cooked.


Arabic:
gt: وكانت الموارد النباتية التي يسهل الوصول إليها بكثرة هي البروتينات التي يمكن الحصول عليها من الأوراق والبقول، ولكن هذه البروتينات يصعب على الرئيسيات مثلنا هضمها ما لم يتم طهيها .
src_text: The most readily accessible plant resources would have been the proteins accessible in leaves and legumes, but these are hard for primates like us to digest unless they are cooked.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In contrast, animal foods (ants, termites, eggs) not only are easily digestible, but they provide high-quantity proteins that contain all the essential amino acids.


Arabic:
gt: وعلى النقيض، فإن الأطعمة الحيوانية (النمل والنمل الأبيض والبيض) ليست فقط سهلة الهضم، بل توفر بروتيناتٍ بكميات عالية وتحتوي على جميع الأحماض الأمينية الأساسية.
src_text: In contrast, animal foods (ants, termites, eggs) not only are easily digestible, but they provide high-quantity proteins that contain all the essential amino acids.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:All things considered, we should not be surprised if our own ancestors solved their "protein problem" in somewhat the same way that chimps on the savanna do today.


Arabic:
gt: عند أخذ كل الأشياء بعين الاعتبار، لا ينبغي لنا أن نندهش إذا قام أسلافنا بحل "مشكلة البروتين" لديهم بطريقة ما على نفس النحو التي يقوم بها الشمبانزي في السافانا.
src_text: All things considered, we should not be surprised if our own ancestors solved their "protein problem" in somewhat the same way that chimps on the savanna do today.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Sleep interruption is the process of purposefully awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later (10–60 minutes).


Arabic:
gt: انقطاع النوم هو عملية الاستيقاظ عن عمد خلال فترة نومك الطبيعية والنوم بعد فترة قصيرة (من 10 إلى 60 دقيقة).
src_text: Sleep interruption is the process of purposefully awakening during your normal sleep period and falling asleep a short time later (10–60 minutes).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This can be easily done by using a relatively quiet alarm clock to bring you to consciousness without fully waking you.


Arabic:
gt: ويمكن القيام بذلك بسهولة باستخدام منبه هادئة نسبياً ليُعيدك إلى وعيك دون إيقاظك كلياً.
src_text: This can be easily done by using a relatively quiet alarm clock to bring you to consciousness without fully waking you.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you find yourself resetting the clock in your sleep, it can be placed on the other side of the room, forcing you to get out of bed to turn it off.


Arabic:
gt: إذا وجدت نفسك تعيد ضبط الساعة خلال نومك، فيمكنك وضعها على الناحية الأخرى من الغرفة، مما يُجبرك على النهوض من السرير لإيقافها.
src_text: If you find yourself resetting the clock in your sleep, it can be placed on the other side of the room, forcing you to get out of bed to turn it off.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Other biorhythm-based options involve drinking lots of fluid (particularly water or tea, a known diuretic) prior to sleep, forcing one to get up to urinate.


Arabic:
gt: تتضمن الخيارات الأخرى، المبنية على النظم الحيوية، شرب الكثير من السوائل (خاصة الماء أو الشاي، إحدى مُدرّات البول المعروفة) قبل النوم، مما يجبر الشخص على النهوض للتبول.
src_text: Other biorhythm-based options involve drinking lots of fluid (particularly water or tea, a known diuretic) prior to sleep, forcing one to get up to urinate.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The amount of inner peace a person possesses correlates oppositely to the amount of tension in one’s body and spirit.


Arabic:
gt: يرتبط مقدارُ السلام الداخلي الذي يملكه الشخص بشكل عكسي بمقدار التوتر في جسده وروحه.
src_text: The amount of inner peace a person possesses correlates oppositely to the amount of tension in one’s body and spirit.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The lower the tension, the more positive the life force present. Every person has the potential to find absolute peace and contentment.


Arabic:
gt: كلما قل التوتر، كلما زادت الإيجابيّة التي تمنحها قوة الحياة. كل شخص لديه القدرة الكامنة على إيجاد السلام والرضا التامين.
src_text: The lower the tension, the more positive the life force present. Every person has the potential to find absolute peace and contentment.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Everyone can achieve enlightenment. The only thing standing in the way of this goal is our own tension and negativity.


Arabic:
gt: يستطيع أن يصل الجميع إلى التنوير. الشيء الوحيد الذي يعيقنا في الطريق إلى هذا الهدف هو توترنا وسلبيتنا.
src_text: Everyone can achieve enlightenment. The only thing standing in the way of this goal is our own tension and negativity.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Tibetan Buddhism is based on the teachings of Buddha, but were extended by the mahayana path of love and by a lot of techniques from Indian Yoga.


Arabic:
gt: تستند البوذية التبتية على تعاليم بوذا، لكنها امتدت من خلال طريق ماهايا للحب وتقنيات أخرى من اليوغا الهندية.
src_text: The Tibetan Buddhism is based on the teachings of Buddha, but were extended by the mahayana path of love and by a lot of techniques from Indian Yoga.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In principle the Tibetan Buddhism is very simple. It consists of Kundalini Yoga, meditation and the path of all-embracing love.


Arabic:
gt: إن البوذية التبتية بسيطة للغاية من حيث المبدأ. وهي تتألف من يوغا الكونداليني والتأمل ومسار الحب الذي يحتضن الجميع.
src_text: In principle the Tibetan Buddhism is very simple. It consists of Kundalini Yoga, meditation and the path of all-embracing love.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.


Arabic:
gt: تستيقظ طاقة "كونداليني" (طاقة التنوير) من خلال وقفات اليوجا وتمارين التنفس والترانيم والتخيلات، مع "كونداليني يوجا".
src_text: With Kundalini Yoga the Kundalini energy (enlightenment energy) is awakened through yoga postures, breathing exercises, mantras and visualizations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The center of Tibetan meditation is the Deity Yoga. Through the visualization of various deities the energy channels are cleaned, the chakras are activated and the enlightenment consciousness is created.


Arabic:
gt: مركز التأمل التبتي هو الإله يوجا. من خلال تصور الآلهة المختلفة، يتم تنظيف قنوات الطاقة، وتنشيط الشاكرا، وخلق وعي التنوير.
src_text: The center of Tibetan meditation is the Deity Yoga. Through the visualization of various deities the energy channels are cleaned, the chakras are activated and the enlightenment consciousness is created.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Germany was a common enemy in World War 2, leading to cooperation between the USSR and USA. With the end of the war the clashes of system, process and culture led to the countries falling out.


Arabic:
gt: مثلت ألمانيا عدواً مشتركاً في الحرب العالمية الثانية، وهو ما أدى إلى التعاون بين الاتحاد السوفيتي والولايات المتحدة الأمريكية، ولكن مع نهاية الحرب، أدى تصادم الأنظمة والإجراءات والثقافات إلى اندلاع الصراع بين الدولتين.
src_text: Germany was a common enemy in World War 2, leading to cooperation between the USSR and USA. With the end of the war the clashes of system, process and culture led to the countries falling out.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:With two years of the end of the war, the former allies were now enemies and the Cold War began.


Arabic:
gt: مع مرور عامين على نهاية الحرب، و أصبح الحلفاء السابقون أعداء الآن وبدأت الحرب الباردة.
src_text: With two years of the end of the war, the former allies were now enemies and the Cold War began.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It was to last for the next 40 years and would be fought for real, by proxy armies, on battlefields from Africa to Asia, in Afghanistan, Cuba and many other places.


Arabic:
gt: كان من المفترض أن تستمر هذه الحرب طيلة الأربعين عاماً القادمة، وأن يكون القتال على أرض الواقع، بواسطة جيوش بالوكالة، في ساحات القتال من أفريقيا إلى آسيا، وفي أفغانستان، وكوبا، والعديد من الأماكن الأخرى.
src_text: It was to last for the next 40 years and would be fought for real, by proxy armies, on battlefields from Africa to Asia, in Afghanistan, Cuba and many other places.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:By September 17, 1939, the Polish defense was already broken, and the only hope was to retreat and reorganise along the Romanian bridgehead.


Arabic:
gt: وبحلول 17 أيلول من عام 1939، كان الدفاع البولندي قد انهار بالفعل، وكان الأمل الوحيد هو التراجع وإعادة التنظيم على طول الجسر الروماني.
src_text: By September 17, 1939, the Polish defense was already broken, and the only hope was to retreat and reorganise along the Romanian bridgehead.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, these plans were rendered obsolete nearly overnight, when over 800,000 soldiers from the Soviet's Union Red Army entered and created the Belarussian and Ukrainian fronts after invading the eastern regions of Poland in violation of the Riga Peace Treaty, the Soviet-Polish Non-Aggression Pact, and other international treaties, both bilateral and multilateral.


Arabic:
gt: ومع ذلك، فقد أصبحت هذه الخطط قديمة بين عشية وضحاها، عندما دخل أكثر من 800000 جندي من الجيش الأحمر للاتحاد السوفيتي وكوّنوا الجبهتين البيلاروسية والأوكرانية بعد غزو المناطق الشرقية من بولندا في انتهاك لمعاهدة ريغا للسلام واتفاقية عدم الاعتداء السوفيتية البولندية والمعاهدات الدولية الأخرى، الثنائية والمتعددة الأطراف.
src_text: However, these plans were rendered obsolete nearly overnight, when over 800,000 soldiers from the Soviet's Union Red Army entered and created the Belarussian and Ukrainian fronts after invading the eastern regions of Poland in violation of the Riga Peace Treaty, the Soviet-Polish Non-Aggression Pact, and other international treaties, both bilateral and multilateral.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Using ships to transport goods is by far the most efficient way to move large amounts of people and goods across oceans.


Arabic:
gt: يُعدُّ استخدامَ السُفن لنقلِ البضائع الطريقة الأكثر فاعلية لنقل كمياتٍ كبيرةٍ من الأشخاصِ والبضائعِ عبر المحيطات.
src_text: Using ships to transport goods is by far the most efficient way to move large amounts of people and goods across oceans.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The job of navies has traditionally been to ensure that your country maintains the ability to move your people and goods, while at the same time, interfering with your enemy's ability to move his people and goods.


Arabic:
gt: جرت التقاليد على أن وظيفة القوّات البحريّة هي ضمان قدرة بلدك على نقل شعبك وبضائعه، بينما في الوقت نفسه، اعتراض قدرة عدوّك على نقل شعبه وبضائعه.
src_text: The job of navies has traditionally been to ensure that your country maintains the ability to move your people and goods, while at the same time, interfering with your enemy's ability to move his people and goods.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:One of the most noteworthy recent examples of this was the North Atlantic campaign of WWII. The Americans were trying to move men and materials across the Atlantic Ocean to help Britain.


Arabic:
gt: من الأمثلة الحديثة الأكثر جدارةً بالملاحظة هي حملة شمال الأطلسي في الحرب العالمية الثانية. حيث حاول الأمريكيون نقل الأفراد والمواد عبر المحيط الأطلسي في سبيل مساعدة بريطانيا.
src_text: One of the most noteworthy recent examples of this was the North Atlantic campaign of WWII. The Americans were trying to move men and materials across the Atlantic Ocean to help Britain.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:At the same time, the German navy, using mainly U-boats, was trying to stop this traffic.


Arabic:
gt: وفي الوقت ذاته، كانت البحرية الألمانية تحاول التصدي لهذا الغزو قوامها في هذا استخدام الغواصات.
src_text: At the same time, the German navy, using mainly U-boats, was trying to stop this traffic.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Had the Allies failed, Germany probably would have been able to conquer Britain as it had the rest of Europe.


Arabic:
gt: لو فشل الحلفاء، لتمكنت ألمانيا على الأرجح من غزو بريطانيا كما فعلت مع بقية أوروبا.
src_text: Had the Allies failed, Germany probably would have been able to conquer Britain as it had the rest of Europe.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Goats seem to have been first domesticated roughly 10,000 years ago in the Zagros Mountains of Iran.


Arabic:
gt: يبدو أن الماعز قد دُجّن للمرة الأولى منذ ما يقرب من 10 آلاف عام في جبال زاغروس الإيرانية.
src_text: Goats seem to have been first domesticated roughly 10,000 years ago in the Zagros Mountains of Iran.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Ancient cultures and tribes began to keep them for easy access to milk, hair, meat, and skins.


Arabic:
gt: بدأت الثقافات والقبائل القديمة في الاحتفاظ بها لسهولة الوصول إلى الحليب والشعر واللحوم والجلود.
src_text: Ancient cultures and tribes began to keep them for easy access to milk, hair, meat, and skins.

prompt:
