Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Domestic goats were generally kept in herds that wandered on hills or other grazing areas, often tended by goatherds who were frequently children or adolescents, similar to the more widely known shepherd. These methods of herding are still used today.


Arabic:
gt: كانت الماعز الداجنة تُربى عموماً في قطعان تجولت على التلال أو مناطق الرعي الأخرى، وغالباً ما تُرعى بواسطة رعاة الماعز الذين كانوا في الغالب أطفالاً أو مراهقين، على غرار الراعي المعروف على نطاق واسع. ولا تزال طرق الرعي هذه مستخدمة حتى اليوم.
src_text: Domestic goats were generally kept in herds that wandered on hills or other grazing areas, often tended by goatherds who were frequently children or adolescents, similar to the more widely known shepherd. These methods of herding are still used today.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Wagonways were built in England as early as the 16th Century.


Arabic:
gt: أُنشئت طرق العربات في إنجلترا في وقت يرجع إلى القرن السادس عشر.
src_text: Wagonways were built in England as early as the 16th Century.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Although wagonways merely consisted of parallel planks of wood, they allowed horses pulling them to achieve greater speeds and pull larger loads than on the slightly more rough roads of the day.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أن عربات السكك الحديدية القديمة كانت تتكون فقط من ألواحٍ خشبيةٍ متوازيةٍ، إلا أنها سمحت للخيول بسحبها لتحقيق سرعاتٍ أكبر وسحب أحمالٍ أكبر مقارنة بالطرق التي كانت تعتبر أكثر من وعرةٍ في ذلك التوقيت.
src_text: Although wagonways merely consisted of parallel planks of wood, they allowed horses pulling them to achieve greater speeds and pull larger loads than on the slightly more rough roads of the day.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Crossties were introduced fairly early to hold the tracks in place. Gradually, however, it was realised that tracks would be more efficient if they had a stip of iron on the top.


Arabic:
gt: تم اختراع قضبان القطارات في وقت مبكر نسبياً لتثبيت المسارات، ولكن اتضح بعد ذلك مع الوقت أن وضع شريط حديدي أعلى المسار يجعله أكثر فاعلية.
src_text: Crossties were introduced fairly early to hold the tracks in place. Gradually, however, it was realised that tracks would be more efficient if they had a stip of iron on the top.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This became common practice, but the iron caused more wear on the wooden wheels of the wagons.


Arabic:
gt: وقد أصبح ذلك عرف متبع، إلا أن الحديد أدى إلى المزيد من التآكل للعجلات الخشبية للعربات.
src_text: This became common practice, but the iron caused more wear on the wooden wheels of the wagons.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Eventually, wooden wheels were replaced by iron wheels. In 1767, the first full-iron rails were introduced.


Arabic:
gt: وفي النهاية، تم استبدال العجلات الخشبية بعجلات حديدية. في عام 1767، تم إدخال أول قضبان حديدية كاملة.
src_text: Eventually, wooden wheels were replaced by iron wheels. In 1767, the first full-iron rails were introduced.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The first known transportation was walking, humans began walking upright two million years ago with the emergence of Homo Erectus (meaning upright man).


Arabic:
gt: كان المشي أول وسيلة مواصلات، بدأ البشر المشي بانتصاب منذ مليوني عام بالتزامن مع ظهور الهومو إريكتوس (تعني الإنسان المنتصب)
src_text: The first known transportation was walking, humans began walking upright two million years ago with the emergence of Homo Erectus (meaning upright man).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Their predecessors, the Australopithecus did not walk upright as habitually.


Arabic:
gt: أسلافهم، أسترالوبيثكس، لم يمشوا بشكل مستقيم على نحوٍ ثابتٍ.
src_text: Their predecessors, the Australopithecus did not walk upright as habitually.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Bipedal specializations are found in Australopithecus fossils from 4.2-3.9 million years ago, although Sahelanthropus may have walked on two legs as early as seven million years ago.


Arabic:
gt: عُثر على فصائل ذات قدمين في حفريات أسترالوبيثكس من 4.2 إلى 3.9 مليون سنةٍ مضت، على الرغم من أن ساحيلانثروبوس قد يكون قد مشى على قدمين منذ سبعة ملايين سنةٍ.
src_text: Bipedal specializations are found in Australopithecus fossils from 4.2-3.9 million years ago, although Sahelanthropus may have walked on two legs as early as seven million years ago.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:We can start living more friendly to the environment, we can join to the environmental movement, and we can even be activists in order to reduce the future suffering in some degree.


Arabic:
gt: يمكننا أن نبدأ في العيش بشكل أكثر تناسباً مع البيئة، ويمكننا الانضمام إلى الحركة البيئية، ويمكننا حتى أن نكون نشطاء من أجل تقليل المعاناة المستقبلية بدرجة ما.
src_text: We can start living more friendly to the environment, we can join to the environmental movement, and we can even be activists in order to reduce the future suffering in some degree.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This is just like symptomatic treatment in many cases. However, if we do not only want a temporary solution, then we should find the root of the problems, and we should deactivate them.


Arabic:
gt: هذا هو تماماً مثل علاج الأعراض في كثير من الحالات. ومع ذلك، إذا كنا لا نريد حلاً مؤقتاً فقط، فعلينا أن نجد جذر المشكلات، ويجب علينا إنهائها.
src_text: This is just like symptomatic treatment in many cases. However, if we do not only want a temporary solution, then we should find the root of the problems, and we should deactivate them.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is obvious enough that the world has changed much because of humankind's scientific and technological advancements, and problems have become greater because of overpopulation and mankind's extravagant lifestyle.


Arabic:
gt: إنه من الواضح بشكل كاف أن العالم تغير كثيراً بسبب التقدم العلمي والتقنية للبشرية، وأصبحت المشاكل أكبر بسبب زيادة السكاني ونمط الحياة المترف للإنسان.
src_text: It is obvious enough that the world has changed much because of humankind's scientific and technological advancements, and problems have become greater because of overpopulation and mankind's extravagant lifestyle.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After its adoption by Congress on July 4, a handwritten draft signed by the President of Congress John Hancock and the Secretary Charles Thomson was then sent a few blocks away to the printing shop of John Dunlap.


Arabic:
gt: بعد تبنيه من قبل الكونغرس في 4 تموز، أُرسلت مسودةٌ مكتوبةٌ بخط اليد وقعها رئيس الكونغرس جون هانكوك وأمين السر تشارلز طومسون على بعد البعض من الأبنية إلى مطبعة جون دونلاب.
src_text: After its adoption by Congress on July 4, a handwritten draft signed by the President of Congress John Hancock and the Secretary Charles Thomson was then sent a few blocks away to the printing shop of John Dunlap.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Through the night between 150 and 200 copies were made, now known as "Dunlap broadsides".


Arabic:
gt: وخلال الليل تم عمل ما بين 150 و200 نسخة، تعرف الآن باسم "نشرات دنلاب النقدية".
src_text: Through the night between 150 and 200 copies were made, now known as "Dunlap broadsides".

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The first public reading of the document was by John Nixon in the yard of Independence Hall on July 8.


Arabic:
gt: كانت أول قراءة عامة للوثيقة بواسطة جون نيكسون في باحة قاعة الاستقلال في الثامن من تموز.
src_text: The first public reading of the document was by John Nixon in the yard of Independence Hall on July 8.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:One was sent to George Washington on July 6, who had it read to his troops in New York on July 9. A copy reached London on August 10.


Arabic:
gt: أُرسلت واحدة منهم إلى جورج واشنطن في السادس من يوليو، وقد قرأها على قوّاته في نيويورك في التاسع من تموز. ووصلت نسخة منها إلى لندن في العاشر من آب.
src_text: One was sent to George Washington on July 6, who had it read to his troops in New York on July 9. A copy reached London on August 10.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The 25 Dunlap broadsides still known to exist are the oldest surviving copies of the document. The original handwritten copy has not survived.


Arabic:
gt: تمثل مطويات دنلاب الخمس والعشرون أقدم النسخ الباقية من مستند إعلان الاستقلال الأمريكي، ولكن النسخة الأصلية المكتوبة بخط اليد لم يُكتب لها النجاة.
src_text: The 25 Dunlap broadsides still known to exist are the oldest surviving copies of the document. The original handwritten copy has not survived.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many paleontologists today believe that one group of dinosaurs survived and is alive today. We call them birds.


Arabic:
gt: يعتقد العديد من علماء الحفريات اليوم أن مجموعة واحدة من الديناصورات قد نجت وهي على قيد الحياة اليوم. ونسميها الطيور.
src_text: Many paleontologists today believe that one group of dinosaurs survived and is alive today. We call them birds.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many people don't think about them as dinosaurs because they have feathers and can fly.


Arabic:
gt: لا يفكر العديد فيها باعتبارها ديناصورات لأن لديها ريشًا ويمكنها الطيران.
src_text: Many people don't think about them as dinosaurs because they have feathers and can fly.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:But there are a lot of things about birds that still look like a dinosaur.


Arabic:
gt: لكن هناك الكثير من الأشياء حول الطيور التي لا تزال تبدو مثل الديناصورات.
src_text: But there are a lot of things about birds that still look like a dinosaur.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They have feet with scales and claws, they lay eggs, and they walk on their two back legs like a T-Rex.


Arabic:
gt: لديها أقدام ذات طبقات حماية خارجية ومخالب، وتضع البيض، وتمشي على سيقانها الخلفية مثل التيرانوصور.
src_text: They have feet with scales and claws, they lay eggs, and they walk on their two back legs like a T-Rex.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Virtually all computers in use today are based on the manipulation of information which is coded in the form of binary numbers.


Arabic:
gt: تعتمد جميعُ أجهزة الحاسوبِ المستخدمة اليوم افتراضياً على معالجة المعلومات المشفرة في شكل أرقامٍ ثُنائية.
src_text: Virtually all computers in use today are based on the manipulation of information which is coded in the form of binary numbers.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A binary number can have only one of two values, i.e. 0 or 1, and these numbers are referred to as binary digits - or bits, to use computer jargon.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن أن تكون قيمة الرقم الثنائي قيمة واحدة فقط من قيمتين، وهما 0 أو 1، ويُشار إلى هذه الأرقام على أنها أرقام ثنائية - أو بتّات، إذا استخدمنا لغة الحاسوب الاصطلاحية.
src_text: A binary number can have only one of two values, i.e. 0 or 1, and these numbers are referred to as binary digits - or bits, to use computer jargon.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Internal poisoning may not be immediately apparent. Symptoms, such as vomiting are sufficiently general that an immediate diagnosis cannot be made.


Arabic:
gt: التسمم الداخلي قد لا تظهر عوارضه فوراً. التشخيص الفوري لا يمكن بناؤه عند ظهور أعراض كالتقيؤ والتي هي عامة بشكل كافٍ.
src_text: Internal poisoning may not be immediately apparent. Symptoms, such as vomiting are sufficiently general that an immediate diagnosis cannot be made.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The best indication of internal poisoning may be the presence of an open container of medication or toxic household chemicals.


Arabic:
gt: قد يكون أفضل مؤشر للتسمم الداخلي وجود حاوية مفتوحة للأدوية أو المواد الكيميائية المنزلية السامة.
src_text: The best indication of internal poisoning may be the presence of an open container of medication or toxic household chemicals.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Check the label for specific first aid instructions for that specific poison.


Arabic:
gt: راجع الملصق للتعرف على إرشادات الإسعافات الأولية الخاصة بالسم المحدد.
src_text: Check the label for specific first aid instructions for that specific poison.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The term bug is used by entomologists in a formal sense for this group of insects.


Arabic:
gt: علماء الحشرات يستخدمون مصطلح "البق" بمعناه الرسمي للإشارة لهذه المجموعة من الحشرات.
src_text: The term bug is used by entomologists in a formal sense for this group of insects.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This term derives from ancient familiarity with Bed-bugs, which are insects highly adapted to parasitize humans.


Arabic:
gt: هذا المصطلح مشتق من المعرفة القديمة ببق الفراش، وهي حشرات تكيفت بشكل كبير على التطفل على البشر.
src_text: This term derives from ancient familiarity with Bed-bugs, which are insects highly adapted to parasitize humans.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Both Assassin-bugs and Bed-bugs are nidicolous, adapted to living in nest or housing of their host.


Arabic:
gt: يتسم كل من "البق القاتل" و"بق الفراش" بطول مدة الحضانة، ويتكيفان مع العيش في عش أو سكن مضيفهم.
src_text: Both Assassin-bugs and Bed-bugs are nidicolous, adapted to living in nest or housing of their host.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Across the United States of America, there are approximately 400,000 known cases of Multiple Sclerosis (MS), leaving it as the leading neurological disease in younger and middle aged adults.


Arabic:
gt: في الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية هناك ما يقارب 400,000 حالة معروفة من مرض التصلب المتعدد (ت م) مما يجعله أكثر الأمراض العصبية انتشاراً بين الشباب والبالغين ذوي الأعمار المتوسطة.
src_text: Across the United States of America, there are approximately 400,000 known cases of Multiple Sclerosis (MS), leaving it as the leading neurological disease in younger and middle aged adults.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:MS is a disease that affects the central nervous system, which is made up of the brain, the spinal cord and the optic nerve.


Arabic:
gt: مرض التصلب العصبي المتعدد هو مرض يصيب الجهاز العصبي المركزي، والذي يتكون من الدماغ والحبل الشوكي والعصب البصري.
src_text: MS is a disease that affects the central nervous system, which is made up of the brain, the spinal cord and the optic nerve.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Research has found that females are two times more likely to have MS then males.


Arabic:
gt: أظهرت الأبحاث أن إمكانية إصابة الإناث بمرض التصلب المتعدد تزيد بمرتين عن الذكور.
src_text: Research has found that females are two times more likely to have MS then males.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A couple may decide it is not in their best interest, or in the interest of their child, to raise a baby.


Arabic:
gt: قد يقرر زوجان أنه ليس من مصلحتهما أو من مصلحة طفلهما أن يربيا طفلاً رضيعًا.
src_text: A couple may decide it is not in their best interest, or in the interest of their child, to raise a baby.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:These couples may choose to make an adoption plan for their baby.


Arabic:
gt: قد يختار هؤلاء الأزواج وضع خطة تبني لأطفالهم.
src_text: These couples may choose to make an adoption plan for their baby.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In an adoption, the birth parents terminate their parental rights so that another couple may parent the child.


Arabic:
gt: ضمن عملية التبنّي، ينهي الوالدان الأصليان حقوقهما الأبوية حتى يتمكن زوجان آخران من رعاية الطفل.
src_text: In an adoption, the birth parents terminate their parental rights so that another couple may parent the child.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Science’s main goal is to figure out the way the world works through the scientific method. This method in fact guides most scientific research.


Arabic:
gt: الهدف الرئيسي للعلم هو معرفة الطريقة التي يعمل بها العالم من خلال منهجٍ علميٍ. هذه الطريقة في الواقع ترشد معظم البحث العلمي.
src_text: Science’s main goal is to figure out the way the world works through the scientific method. This method in fact guides most scientific research.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It isn’t alone though, experimentation, and an experiment is a test that is used to eliminate one or more of the possible hypotheses, asking questions, and making observations also guide scientific research.


Arabic:
gt: وهي بالرغم من ذلك ليست متفردة في هذا الشأن، يعتبر التجريب والتجربة اختباراً يمكن استخدامه لتفنيد واحدة أو أكثر من الفرضيات المحتملة؛ طرح الأسئلة وإجراء الملاحظات يوجه البحث العلمي أيضاً.
src_text: It isn’t alone though, experimentation, and an experiment is a test that is used to eliminate one or more of the possible hypotheses, asking questions, and making observations also guide scientific research.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Naturalists and philosophers focused on classical texts and, in particular, on the Bible in Latin.


Arabic:
gt: ركّز علماء الطبيعة والفلاسفة على النصوص القديمة و، بصورة خاصّة، على الإنجيل باللغة اللاتينيّة.
src_text: Naturalists and philosophers focused on classical texts and, in particular, on the Bible in Latin.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Accepted were Aristotle's views on all matters of science, including psychology.


Arabic:
gt: تم قبول آراء أرسطو حول جميع المسائل العلمية، بما في ذلك علم النفس.
src_text: Accepted were Aristotle's views on all matters of science, including psychology.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As knowledge of Greek declined, the West found itself cut off from its Greek philosophical and scientific roots.


Arabic:
gt: بينما انحدرت المعرفة لدى اليونانيين، وجد الغرب نفسه معزولاً عن جذوره الفلسفية والعلمية اليونانية.
src_text: As knowledge of Greek declined, the West found itself cut off from its Greek philosophical and scientific roots.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many observed rhythms in physiology and behavior often crucially depend on the presence of endogenous cycles and their production through biological clocks.


Arabic:
gt: يعتمد كثير من الإيقاعات المرصودة في علم وظائف الأعضاء والسلوك بشكل حاسم في كثير من الأحيان على وجود دورات ذاتية وإنتاجها من خلال الساعات البيولوجية.
src_text: Many observed rhythms in physiology and behavior often crucially depend on the presence of endogenous cycles and their production through biological clocks.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Periodic rhythms, which are not simply responses to external periodic cues, have been documented for most living beings, including bacteria, fungi, plants, and animals.


Arabic:
gt: تم توثيق الإيقاعات الدورية، التي ليست مجرد استجابات للإشارات الدورية الخارجية، لمعظم الكائنات الحية، بما في ذلك الخاصة بالبكتيريا والفطريات والنباتات والحيوانات.
src_text: Periodic rhythms, which are not simply responses to external periodic cues, have been documented for most living beings, including bacteria, fungi, plants, and animals.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Biological clocks are self sustaining oscillators which will continue a period of free-running cycling even in the absence of external cues.


Arabic:
gt: الساعات البيولوجية هي متذبذبات ذاتية ستستمر لفترات من الدورات المتتابعة حتى في حالة عدم وجود مؤثراتٍ خارجية.
src_text: Biological clocks are self sustaining oscillators which will continue a period of free-running cycling even in the absence of external cues.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Hershey and Chase experiment was one of the leading suggestions that DNA was a genetic material.


Arabic:
gt: كانت تجربة هيرشي وتشيس واحدة من الدلائل الرئيسية على أن الحمض النووي مادة وراثية.
src_text: The Hershey and Chase experiment was one of the leading suggestions that DNA was a genetic material.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Hershey and Chase used phages, or viruses, to implant their own DNA into a bacterium.


Arabic:
gt: استخدم هيرشي وتشيس العاثيات أو الفيروسات لإدخال الحمض النوويّ الخاصّ بهما إلى الجراثيم.
src_text: Hershey and Chase used phages, or viruses, to implant their own DNA into a bacterium.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They did two experiments marking either the DNA in the phage with a radioactive phosphorus or the protein of the phage with radioactive sulfur.


Arabic:
gt: قاموا بتجربتين لوسم إما حمض العاثيات النووي مستخدمين فوسفور مشع أو بروتينها بكبريت مشع.
src_text: They did two experiments marking either the DNA in the phage with a radioactive phosphorus or the protein of the phage with radioactive sulfur.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Mutations can have a variety of different effects depending on the type of mutation, the significance of the piece of genetic material affected and whether the cells affected are germ-line cells.


Arabic:
gt: قد يكون للطفرات مجموعة متنوعة من الآثار المختلفة، على حسب نوع الطفرة، وأهميّة قطعة المادّة الوراثيّة المتأثّرة، وما إذا كانت الخلايا المتأثرة من خلايا الخط الإنتاشي.
src_text: Mutations can have a variety of different effects depending on the type of mutation, the significance of the piece of genetic material affected and whether the cells affected are germ-line cells.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Only mutations in germ-line cells can be passed on to children, while mutations elsewhere can cause cell-death or cancer.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن فقط نقل الطفرات في خلايا الخط الجرثومي إلى الأطفال، بينما يمكن أن تسبب الطفرات في أماكن أخرى موت الخلايا أو السرطان.
src_text: Only mutations in germ-line cells can be passed on to children, while mutations elsewhere can cause cell-death or cancer.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Nature-based tourism attracts people interested in visiting natural areas for the purpose of enjoying the scenery, including plant and animal wildlife.


Arabic:
gt: تجذب السياحة الطبيعيّة الناس المهتمّين بزيارة المناطق الطبيعيّة بغرض الاستمتاع بالمناظر، بما فيها الحياة البريّة النباتيّة والحيوانيّة.
src_text: Nature-based tourism attracts people interested in visiting natural areas for the purpose of enjoying the scenery, including plant and animal wildlife.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Examples of on-site activities include hunting, fishing, photography, bird watching, and visiting parks and studying information about the ecosystem.


Arabic:
gt: تتضمن الأمثلة على الأنشطة التي يمكن القيام بها في الموقع الصيد، وصيد الأسماك، والتصوير، ومشاهدة الطيور، وزيارة الحدائق، ودراسة المعلومات عن النظام البيئي.
src_text: Examples of on-site activities include hunting, fishing, photography, bird watching, and visiting parks and studying information about the ecosystem.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:An example is visiting, photographing, and learning about organgatuangs in Borneo.


Arabic:
gt: مثالٌ على ذلك هو زيارة وتصوير ومعرفة المعلومات عن هذا النّوع من القردة (organgatuangs) في بورنيو.
src_text: An example is visiting, photographing, and learning about organgatuangs in Borneo.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Every morning, people leave small country towns in cars to go their workplace and are passed by others whose work destination is the place they have just left.


Arabic:
gt: يُغادر الناس المدن الصغيرة في سياراتهم في كل صباح ليذهبوا إلى أماكن عملهم ويقابلهم في الطريق الآخرون العاملون في المكان الذي غادروه للتو.
src_text: Every morning, people leave small country towns in cars to go their workplace and are passed by others whose work destination is the place they have just left.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In this dynamic transport shuttle everyone is somehow connected with, and supporting, a transport system based on private cars.


Arabic:
gt: في وسيلة النقل المفعمة بالحيويّة هذه، كل واحد يدعم ويرتبط نوعاً ما بمنظومة نقل أساسها السيّارات الخاصّة.
src_text: In this dynamic transport shuttle everyone is somehow connected with, and supporting, a transport system based on private cars.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Science now indicates that this massive carbon economy has dislodged the biosphere from one of its stable states that has supported human evolution for the past two million years.


Arabic:
gt: يشير العلم الآن إلى أن هذا الاقتصاد الضخم المعتمد على الكربون قد أزاح المحيط الحيوي من إحدى حالاته المستقرة التي دعمت التطور البشري على مدى المليوني سنةٍ الماضية.
src_text: Science now indicates that this massive carbon economy has dislodged the biosphere from one of its stable states that has supported human evolution for the past two million years.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Everyone participates in society and uses transportation systems. Almost everyone complains about transportation systems.


Arabic:
gt: يشارك الجميع في المجتمع ويستخدمون أنظمة المواصلات. يشتكي الجميع من أنظمة المواصلات.
src_text: Everyone participates in society and uses transportation systems. Almost everyone complains about transportation systems.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In developed countries you seldom hear similar levels of complaints about water quality or bridges falling down.


Arabic:
gt: نادراً ما تسمع في البلدان المتقدمة مستويات مماثلة من الشكاوى حول جودة المياه أو الجسور التي تسقط.
src_text: In developed countries you seldom hear similar levels of complaints about water quality or bridges falling down.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Why do transportation systems engender such complaints, why do they fail on a daily basis? Are transportation engineers just incompetent? Or is something more fundamental going on?


Arabic:
gt: لماذا تولد أنظمة النقل مثل هذه الشكاوى، ولماذا تفشل بشكل يومي؟ هل مهندسو النقل غير أكفاء؟ أم أن هناك شيئاً أكثر جوهرية يحدث؟
src_text: Why do transportation systems engender such complaints, why do they fail on a daily basis? Are transportation engineers just incompetent? Or is something more fundamental going on?

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Traffic Flow is the study of the movement of individual drivers and vehicles between two points and the interactions they make with one another.


Arabic:
gt: حركة المرور هي دراسة حركة السائقين و المركبات الفردية بين نقطتين والتفاعلات التي يقومون بها مع بعضهم البعض.
src_text: Traffic Flow is the study of the movement of individual drivers and vehicles between two points and the interactions they make with one another.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Unfortunately, studying traffic flow is difficult because driver behavior cannot be predicted with one-hundred percent certainty.


Arabic:
gt: للأسف، دراسة حركة السير صعبة لأنه لا يمكن توقع سلوك السائق بيقين مائة في المئة.
src_text: Unfortunately, studying traffic flow is difficult because driver behavior cannot be predicted with one-hundred percent certainty.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Fortunately, drivers tend to behave within a reasonably consistent range; thus, traffic streams tend to have some reasonable consistency and can be roughly represented mathematically.


Arabic:
gt: لحسن الحظ، يميل السائقون إلى التصرّف في نطاق معقول الاتساق؛ بهذا، تتمتع حركة المرور باتساق معقول، ويمكن التعبير عنها رياضيّاً بشكل تقريبي.
src_text: Fortunately, drivers tend to behave within a reasonably consistent range; thus, traffic streams tend to have some reasonable consistency and can be roughly represented mathematically.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:To better represent traffic flow, relationships have been established between the three main characteristics: (1) flow, (2) density, and (3) velocity.


Arabic:
gt: ولتوضيح تدفق حركة المرور بشكل أفضل، أقيمت علاقات بين الخصائص الرئيسية الثلاثة: (1) التدفق (2) الكثافة، و (3) السرعة.
src_text: To better represent traffic flow, relationships have been established between the three main characteristics: (1) flow, (2) density, and (3) velocity.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:These relationships help in planning, design, and operations of roadway facilities.


Arabic:
gt: تساعد هذه العلاقات في تخطيط مرافق الطرق وتصميمها وتشغيلها.
src_text: These relationships help in planning, design, and operations of roadway facilities.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Insects were the first animals to take to the air. Their ability to fly helped them evade enemies more easily and find food and mates more efficiently.


Arabic:
gt: وكانت الحشرات أول الحيوانات التي تطير في الهواء. فقد ساعدتهم قدرتهم على الطيران على الهروب من الأعداء بسهولة أكبر والعثور على الغذاء والأزواج على نحو أكثر كفاءة.
src_text: Insects were the first animals to take to the air. Their ability to fly helped them evade enemies more easily and find food and mates more efficiently.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most insects have the advantage of being able to fold their wings back along the body.


Arabic:
gt: تتميّز معظمُ الحشراتِ بقُدرتها على ثَني أجنحتِها للخلفِ بطولِ الجسدِ.
src_text: Most insects have the advantage of being able to fold their wings back along the body.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This gives them a wider range of small places to hide from predators.


Arabic:
gt: وهذا يمنحهم مجموعة أكبر من الأماكن الصغيرة للاختباء من الحيوانات المفترسة.
src_text: This gives them a wider range of small places to hide from predators.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Today, the only insects that cannot fold back their wings are dragon flies and mayflies.


Arabic:
gt: الحشرات الوحيدة التي لا يُمكنها طي أجنحتها اليوم هي اليعسوب وذبابة مايو.
src_text: Today, the only insects that cannot fold back their wings are dragon flies and mayflies.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Thousands of years ago, a man called Aristarchus said that the Solar System moved around the Sun.


Arabic:
gt: منذ آلاف السنين، قال رجل يُدعى أرسطرخس أن النظام الشمسي يدور حول الشمس.
src_text: Thousands of years ago, a man called Aristarchus said that the Solar System moved around the Sun.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some people thought he was right but many people believed the opposite; that the Solar System moved around the Earth, including the Sun (and even the other stars).


Arabic:
gt: رأى البعض أنه على حق ولكن العديد من الناس اعتقدوا بعكس ذلك؛ أن النظام الشمسي يدور حول الأرض بما فيها الشمس (وحتى النجوم الأخرى).
src_text: Some people thought he was right but many people believed the opposite; that the Solar System moved around the Earth, including the Sun (and even the other stars).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This seems sensible, because the Earth doesn't feel as if it's moving, does it?


Arabic:
gt: يبدو هذا منطقياً، لأنك لا تشعر أن الأرض تتحرك، أليس كذلك؟
src_text: This seems sensible, because the Earth doesn't feel as if it's moving, does it?

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Amazon River is the second longest and the biggest river on Earth. It carries more than 8 times as much water as the second biggest river.


Arabic:
gt: نهر الأمازون هو ثاني أطول نهر وأكبر نهر في العالم. يحمل مياه أكثر بثمان مرات من ثاني أكبر نهر في العالم.
src_text: The Amazon River is the second longest and the biggest river on Earth. It carries more than 8 times as much water as the second biggest river.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Amazon is also the widest river on Earth, at times six miles wide.


Arabic:
gt: نهر الأمازون هو أيضاً أعرض نهر على الأرض، يصل عرضه في أوقات إلى 6 أميال.
src_text: The Amazon is also the widest river on Earth, at times six miles wide.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A full 20 percent of the water that pours out of the planet's rivers into the oceans comes from the Amazon.


Arabic:
gt: تأتي 20٪ من المياه التي تصب من أنهار الكوكب في المحيطات من نهر الأمازون.
src_text: A full 20 percent of the water that pours out of the planet's rivers into the oceans comes from the Amazon.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The main Amazon River is 6,387 km (3,980 miles). It collects water from thousands of smaller rivers.


Arabic:
gt: نهر الأمازون الرئيسي طوله 6,387 كم (3,980 ميلاً). وهو يجمع المياه من آلاف الأنهار الصغيرة.
src_text: The main Amazon River is 6,387 km (3,980 miles). It collects water from thousands of smaller rivers.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Although pyramid-building in stone continued until the end of the Old Kingdom, the pyramids of Giza were never surpassed in their size and the technical excellence of their construction.


Arabic:
gt: بالرغم من استمرار بناء الأهرامات الحجرية حتى نهاية المملكة المصرية القديمة، إلا أن الأهرامات في الجيزة لم يتفوق عليها من حيث الحجم والتميز الفني في البناء شيء.
src_text: Although pyramid-building in stone continued until the end of the Old Kingdom, the pyramids of Giza were never surpassed in their size and the technical excellence of their construction.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:New Kingdom ancient Egyptians marvelled at their predecessors monuments, which were then well over a thousand year old.


Arabic:
gt: اندهش المصريون القدامى في المملكة الحديثة من آثار أسلافهم، والتي عمرت لما يزيد على ألف سنة.
src_text: New Kingdom ancient Egyptians marvelled at their predecessors monuments, which were then well over a thousand year old.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Vatican City's population is around 800. It is the smallest independent country in the world and the country with the lowest population.


Arabic:
gt: يبلغ عدد سكان مدينة الفاتيكان حوالي ٨٠٠. وهي أصغر دولة مستقلة في العالم وأقل تعدادٍ سكانيِّ.
src_text: Vatican City's population is around 800. It is the smallest independent country in the world and the country with the lowest population.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Vatican City uses Italian in its legislation and official communications.


Arabic:
gt: تستخدم مدينة الفاتيكان اللغةَ الإيطالية في وضع تشريعاتها واتّصالاتها الرّسمية.
src_text: Vatican City uses Italian in its legislation and official communications.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Italian is also the everyday language used by most of those who work in the state while Latin is often used in religious ceremonies.


Arabic:
gt: الإيطاليّة أيضاً هي لغة الحياة اليوميّة التي يستخدمها معظم العاملين بالدولة، بينما تُستخدم اللاتينيّة عادةً في المراسم الدينيّة.
src_text: Italian is also the everyday language used by most of those who work in the state while Latin is often used in religious ceremonies.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:All citizens of Vatican City are Roman Catholic.


Arabic:
gt: جميع سكان مدينة الفاتيكان من الروم الكاثوليك.
src_text: All citizens of Vatican City are Roman Catholic.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:People have known about basic chemical elements such as gold, silver, and copper from antiquity, as these can all be discovered in nature in native form and are relatively simple to mine with primitive tools.


Arabic:
gt: لقد عرف الناس بوجود العناصر الكيميائية الأساسية مثل الذهب والفضة والنحاس منذ العصور القديمة، حيث يمكن اكتشاف كل هذه العناصر في الطبيعة في شكلها الأصلي ويمكن استخراجها بطريقة سهلة نسبياً باستخدام أدوات بدائية.
src_text: People have known about basic chemical elements such as gold, silver, and copper from antiquity, as these can all be discovered in nature in native form and are relatively simple to mine with primitive tools.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Aristotle, a philosopher, theorised that everything is made up of a mixture of one or more of four elements. They were earth, water, air, and fire.


Arabic:
gt: افترض الفيلسوف أرسطو أن كل شيء يتكون من مزيج من عنصر أو أكثر من أربعة عناصر هي الأرض والماء والهواء والنار.
src_text: Aristotle, a philosopher, theorised that everything is made up of a mixture of one or more of four elements. They were earth, water, air, and fire.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This was more like the four states of matter (in the same order): solid, liquid, gas, and plasma, though he also theorised that they change into new substances to form what we see.


Arabic:
gt: كان هذا أشبه بالحالات الأربع للمادة (بنفس الترتيب): الصلبة والسائلة والغازية والبلازما، على الرغم من افتراضه أيضاً أنها تتحول إلى مواد جديدة لتشكيل ما نراه.
src_text: This was more like the four states of matter (in the same order): solid, liquid, gas, and plasma, though he also theorised that they change into new substances to form what we see.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Alloys are basically a mixture of two or more metals. Don't forget that there are many elements on the periodic table.


Arabic:
gt: السبائك هي بشكل أساسي خليط من اثنين أو أكثر من المعادن. لا تنسَ أن هناك العديد من العناصر في الجدول الدوري.
src_text: Alloys are basically a mixture of two or more metals. Don't forget that there are many elements on the periodic table.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Elements like calcium and potassium are considered metals. Of course, there are also metals like silver and gold.


Arabic:
gt: تعتبر عناصر مثل الكالسيوم والبوتاسيوم من المعادن. وهناك بالطبع معادن مثل الفضة والذهب أيضاً.
src_text: Elements like calcium and potassium are considered metals. Of course, there are also metals like silver and gold.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:You can also have alloys that include small amounts of non-metallic elements like carbon.


Arabic:
gt: يمكنك أيضاً أن تحصل على سبائك تحتوي على كميات صغيرة من العناصر غير المعدنية مثل الكربون.
src_text: You can also have alloys that include small amounts of non-metallic elements like carbon.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Everything in the Universe is made of matter. All matter is made of tiny particles called atoms.


Arabic:
gt: خُلِق كل شيء في الكون من مادة. خُلِقت كل المواد من جزيئات صغيرة تُسمي بالذرات.
src_text: Everything in the Universe is made of matter. All matter is made of tiny particles called atoms.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Atoms are so incredibly tiny that trillions of them could fit into the period at the end of this sentence.


Arabic:
gt: الذرات صغيرة للغاية حتى أن تريليونات منها يمكنها أن تشغل حيز النقطة الموجودة في نهاية هذه الجملة.
src_text: Atoms are so incredibly tiny that trillions of them could fit into the period at the end of this sentence.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Thus, the pencil was a good friend to many people when it came out.


Arabic:
gt: ومن ثمّ، كان القلم الرصاص صديقاً جيداً لكثير من الناس عندما ظهر.
src_text: Thus, the pencil was a good friend to many people when it came out.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Sadly, as newer methods of writing have emerged, the pencil has been relegated to lesser status and uses.


Arabic:
gt: للأسف، مع ظهور أدوات جديدة للكتابة، تم إحلال قلم الرصاص إلى مكانةٍ واستخداماتٍ أقل.
src_text: Sadly, as newer methods of writing have emerged, the pencil has been relegated to lesser status and uses.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:People now write messages on computer screens, never having to come close to a sharpener.


Arabic:
gt: يكتب الناس الآن رسائل على شاشات الكمبيوتر، دون الاحتياج إلى استخدام المباراة.
src_text: People now write messages on computer screens, never having to come close to a sharpener.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:One can only wonder what the keyboard will become when something newer comes along.


Arabic:
gt: ولا يملك المرء إلا أن يتساءل عما قد تصبح عليه لوحة المفاتيح حين يأتي شيء أحدث منها.
src_text: One can only wonder what the keyboard will become when something newer comes along.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The fission bomb works on the principle that it takes energy to put together a nucleus with many protons and neutrons.


Arabic:
gt: تعمل القنبلة الانشطارية على أساس أنها تجمع الطاقة لتكوِّن نواة مليئة بالبروتونات والنيوترونات.
src_text: The fission bomb works on the principle that it takes energy to put together a nucleus with many protons and neutrons.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Sort of like rolling a heavy cart up a hill. Splitting the nucleus up again then releases some of that energy.


Arabic:
gt: مثل دحرجة عربة ثقيلة أعلى تل. تنشق النواة مرة أخرى وينطلق جزء من تلك الطاقة.
src_text: Sort of like rolling a heavy cart up a hill. Splitting the nucleus up again then releases some of that energy.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some atoms have unstable nuclei which means that they tend to break apart with little or no nudging.


Arabic:
gt: تضم بعض الذرّات نوى غير مستقرّةٍ مما يعني أنها تميل إلى التفكك مع حركة بسيطة أو بدونها.
src_text: Some atoms have unstable nuclei which means that they tend to break apart with little or no nudging.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The surface of the Moon is made of rocks and dust. The outer layer of the Moon is called the crust.


Arabic:
gt: سطح القمر يتكون من الصخور والغبار. تُسمى الطبقة الخارجية للقمر القشرة.
src_text: The surface of the Moon is made of rocks and dust. The outer layer of the Moon is called the crust.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The crust is about 70 km thick on the near side and 100 km thick on the far side.


Arabic:
gt: يبلغ سمك القشرة حوالي 70 كيلومتراً على الجانب القريب و100 كيلومتر على الجانب البعيد.
src_text: The crust is about 70 km thick on the near side and 100 km thick on the far side.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is thinner under the maria and thicker under the highlands.


Arabic:
gt: إنه أنحف تحت ماريا وأكثر سمكاً تحت المرتفعات.
src_text: It is thinner under the maria and thicker under the highlands.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There may be more maria on the near side because the crust is thinner. It was easier for lava to rise up to the surface.


Arabic:
gt: قد يكون هناك المزيد من البحار القمرية على الجانب القريب لأن القشرة أقل سمكاً. كان من الأسهل على الحمم أن تخرج إلى السطح.
src_text: There may be more maria on the near side because the crust is thinner. It was easier for lava to rise up to the surface.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Content theories are centered on finding what makes people tick or appeals to them.


Arabic:
gt: تدور نظريات المحتوى حول إيجاد ما يثير الناس أو يجذبهم.
src_text: Content theories are centered on finding what makes people tick or appeals to them.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:These theories suggest that people have certain needs and/or desires which have been internalized as they mature to adulthood.


Arabic:
gt: تقترح هذه النظريات أن الناس لديهم احتياجات أو رغباتٍ معينة تظهر ذاتياً عند وصولهم إلى مرحلة البلوغ.
src_text: These theories suggest that people have certain needs and/or desires which have been internalized as they mature to adulthood.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:These theories look at what it is about certain people that make them want the things that they do and what things in their environment will make them do or not do certain things.


Arabic:
gt: تبحث هذه النظريات في الشيء الذي يجعل بعض الأشخاص يريدون الأشياء التي يفعلونها والأشياء في بيئتهم المحيطة التي تجعلهم يفعلون أو لا يفعلون أشياء معينة.
src_text: These theories look at what it is about certain people that make them want the things that they do and what things in their environment will make them do or not do certain things.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Two popular content theories are Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs Theory and Hertzberg's Two Factor Theory.


Arabic:
gt: نظريتان شائعتان للمحتوى هما تسلسل ماسلو الهرمي للاحتياجات و نظرية العامل الثاني لهيرزبرج.
src_text: Two popular content theories are Maslow's Hierarchy of Needs Theory and Hertzberg's Two Factor Theory.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Generally speaking, two behaviors can emerge as managers begin to lead their former peers. One end of the spectrum is trying to remain “one of the guys” (or gals).


Arabic:
gt: بصفة عامة، يمكن أن يظهر سلوكان عندما يبدأ المديرون في قيادة أقرانهم السابقين أحدهما هو محاولة البقاء "مثل الآخرين" (أو الأخريات).
src_text: Generally speaking, two behaviors can emerge as managers begin to lead their former peers. One end of the spectrum is trying to remain “one of the guys” (or gals).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This type of manager has difficulty making unpopular decisions, performing disciplinary action, performance evaluations, assigning responsibility, and holding people accountable.


Arabic:
gt: يُوَاجه هذا النوع من المديرين صعوبةً في اتّخاذ قراراتٍ غيرَ محببةٍ، وتنفيذ الإجراءات التأديبيةِ، وتقييمات الأداءِ، وتحديد المسؤوليةِ، ومحاسبةِ الأشْخاصِ.
src_text: This type of manager has difficulty making unpopular decisions, performing disciplinary action, performance evaluations, assigning responsibility, and holding people accountable.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:At the other end of the spectrum, one morphs into an unrecognizable individual that feels he or she must change everything the team has been doing and make it their own.


Arabic:
gt: وعلى الطرف النقيض، يتحول الفرد إلى شخص لا يمكن التعرف عليه يشعر أن عليه/عليها تغيير كل ما كان الفريق يقوم به وامتلاكه.
src_text: At the other end of the spectrum, one morphs into an unrecognizable individual that feels he or she must change everything the team has been doing and make it their own.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:After all, the leader is ultimately responsible for the success and failure of the team.


Arabic:
gt: ففي نهاية الأمر، القائد هو المسؤول الأساسي عن نجاح وفشل الفريق.
src_text: After all, the leader is ultimately responsible for the success and failure of the team.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This behavior oftentimes results in rifts between the leaders and the rest of the team.


Arabic:
gt: ويؤدي هذا السلوك في أوقات كثيرة إلى خلافات بين القادة وبقية أعضاء الفريق.
src_text: This behavior oftentimes results in rifts between the leaders and the rest of the team.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Virtual teams are held to the same standards of excellence as conventional teams, but there are subtle differences.


Arabic:
gt: تخضع الفرقُ الافتراضية إلى نفس معاييرِ التميّز مثل الفرق التقليدية، ولكن هناك اختلافات دقيقة.
src_text: Virtual teams are held to the same standards of excellence as conventional teams, but there are subtle differences.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Virtual team members often function as the point of contact for their immediate physical group.


Arabic:
gt: غالباً ما يعمل أعضاء الفريق الافتراضي كنقطة اتصال لمجموعاتهم المادية الفورية.
src_text: Virtual team members often function as the point of contact for their immediate physical group.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They often have more autonomy than conventional team members as their teams may meet according to varying time zones which may not be understood by their local management.


Arabic:
gt: وغالبا ما يكون لديهم استقلالية أكبر من أعضاء الفرق التقليدية حيث أن فرقهم قد تجتمع وفقا لمناطق زمنية مختلفة قد لا تكون مفهومة من قبل إدارتهم المحلية.
src_text: They often have more autonomy than conventional team members as their teams may meet according to varying time zones which may not be understood by their local management.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The presence of a true “invisible team” (Larson and LaFasto, 1989, p109) is also a unique component of a virtual team.


Arabic:
gt: وُصِف وجود "فريق خفي" حقيقي من (لارسون ولافاستو ,1989, p109) بأنه مكون فريد لفريق إفتراضي.
src_text: The presence of a true “invisible team” (Larson and LaFasto, 1989, p109) is also a unique component of a virtual team.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The “invisible team” is the management team to which each of the members report. The invisible team sets the standards for each member.


Arabic:
gt: يرفع كلُّ عضوٍ تقاريره إلى فريق الإدارة "الفريق غير المرئي". حيث يضع "الفريق غير المرئي" المعايير لكلِّ عضو.
src_text: The “invisible team” is the management team to which each of the members report. The invisible team sets the standards for each member.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Why would an organization want to go through the time consuming process of establishing a learning organization? One goal for putting organizational learning concepts into practice is innovation.


Arabic:
gt: لما قد ترغب منظمة ما إنشاء منظمة تعليمية في عملية تستهلك وقتاً طويلاً؟ إنّ الابتكار يُعتبر أحد أهداف تطبيق مفاهيم التعلم المؤسّسي.
src_text: Why would an organization want to go through the time consuming process of establishing a learning organization? One goal for putting organizational learning concepts into practice is innovation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When all available resources are effectively used across the functional departments of an organization, creativity and ingenuity can transpire.


Arabic:
gt: عند استغلال جميع الموارد المتاحة بشكل فعال عبر الإدارات الوظيفية في المنظمة، يمكن أن يتحقق الإبداع والبراعة.
src_text: When all available resources are effectively used across the functional departments of an organization, creativity and ingenuity can transpire.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As a result, the process of an organization working together to overcome an obstacle can lead to a new innovative process to serve the customer's need.


Arabic:
gt: ونتيجة لذلك، يمكن أن يُسفر التآزر داخل المنظمة للتغلب على العقبات إلى نشوء إجراءات مبتكرة جديدة تُلبي احتياجات العميل.
src_text: As a result, the process of an organization working together to overcome an obstacle can lead to a new innovative process to serve the customer's need.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

prompt:

prompt:

Arabic:
gt: يدعم الترابط بين علم أمراض الدماغ والسلوك العلماء في أبحاثهم.

prompt:

English:It has been known for a long time that different types of brain damage, traumas, lesions, and tumours affect behaviour and cause changes in some mental functions.

gt: من المعروف منذ فترة طويلة أن الأنواع المختلفة من تلف الدماغ، والصدمات، والآفات، والأورام تؤثر على السلوك وتسبب تغيرات في بعض الوظائف العقلية.
src_text: It has been known for a long time that different types of brain damage, traumas, lesions, and tumours affect behaviour and cause changes in some mental functions.

prompt:

src_text: The rise of new technologies allows us to see and investigate brain structures and processes never seen before.

prompt:

src_text: This provides us with a lot of information and material to build simulation models which help us to understand processes in our mind.

prompt:

src_text: Research in AI involves making machines to automate tasks that require intelligent behavior.

prompt:

src_text: Examples include control, planning and scheduling, the ability to answer customer diagnoses and questions, as well as handwriting recognition, voice and face.

src_text: Such things have become separate disciplines, which focus on providing solutions to real life problems.

src_text: The AI ​​system is now often used in the fields of economics, medicine, engineering and the military, as has been built in several home computer and video game software applications.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Field trips are a large part of any classroom. Quite often a teacher would love to take her students places to which a bus trip is not an option.


Arabic:
gt: تعتبر الرحلات الميدانية جزءاً كبيراً من أي فصل دراسي. في كثير من الأحيان قد تحب المعلمة اصطحاب طلابها إلى أماكن يُعتبر الذهاب إليها بالحافلة أمراً غير وارد.
src_text: Field trips are a large part of any classroom. Quite often a teacher would love to take her students places to which a bus trip is not an option.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Technology offers the solution with virtual field trips. Students can look at museum artifacts, visit an aquarium, or admire beautiful art while sitting with their class.


Arabic:
gt: تتيح التقنية الحل من خلال الزيارات الميدانية الافتراضية. يمكن للطلاب مشاهدة القطع الأثرية بالمتحف أو زيارة حوض الأسماك أو الاستمتاع بالفن الجميل أثناء جلوسهم زملائهم في الصف.
src_text: Technology offers the solution with virtual field trips. Students can look at museum artifacts, visit an aquarium, or admire beautiful art while sitting with their class.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Sharing a field trip virtually is also a great way to reflect a on a trip and share experiences with future classes.


Arabic:
gt: كما أن مشاركة رحلة ميدانية افتراضية طريقة رائعة لاسترجاع رحلة معينة وتبادل الخبرات مع الفصول المستقبلية.
src_text: Sharing a field trip virtually is also a great way to reflect a on a trip and share experiences with future classes.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For example, each year students from Bennet School in North Carolina design a website about their trip to the State Capital, each year the website gets remodeled, but old versions are kept online to serve as a scrapbook.


Arabic:
gt: فعلى سبيل المثال، يقوم طلاب من مدرسة بينيت كل عام في ولاية كارولينا الشمالية بتصميم موقع إلكتروني حول رحلتهم إلى عاصمة الولاية، ويتم إعادة تصميم الموقع الإلكتروني كل سنة، ولكن يتم الاحتفاظ بالإصدارات القديمة على الإنترنت لتكون بمثابة سجل .
src_text: For example, each year students from Bennet School in North Carolina design a website about their trip to the State Capital, each year the website gets remodeled, but old versions are kept online to serve as a scrapbook.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Blogs can also help improve student writing. While students often begin their blog experience with sloppy grammar and spelling, the presence of an audience generally changes that.


Arabic:
gt: كما يمكن للمدونات المساعدة في تحسين كتابة الطلاب. في حين يبدأ الطلاب في الأغلب تجربتهم في المدونات بقواعد نحوية وإملائية غير متقنة، فإن وجود جمهور يغير ذلك بشكل عام.
src_text: Blogs can also help improve student writing. While students often begin their blog experience with sloppy grammar and spelling, the presence of an audience generally changes that.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since students are often the most critical audience, the blog writer begins to strive to improve writing to avoid criticism.


Arabic:
gt: وبما أن الطلاب هم الجمهور الأكثر انتقاداً في أغلب الأحيان، فإن كاتب المدونة يبدأ في السعي لتحسين الكتابة لتجنب الانتقاد.
src_text: Since students are often the most critical audience, the blog writer begins to strive to improve writing to avoid criticism.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Also blogging "forces students to become more savvy about the world around them." The need to feed the interest of the audience inspires students to be clever and interesting (Toto, 2004).


Arabic:
gt: كما أن المدونات "ترغم الطّلاب على أن يصبحوا أكثر ذكاء حول العالم من حولهم". إن الحاجة إلى تغذية اهتمام الجمهور تلهم الطلاب على أن يكونوا بارعين ومفيدين (Toto، 2004).
src_text: Also blogging "forces students to become more savvy about the world around them." The need to feed the interest of the audience inspires students to be clever and interesting (Toto, 2004).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Blogging is a tool that inspires collaboration, and encourages students to extend learning well beyond the traditional school day.


Arabic:
gt: التدوين هو أداة تلهم التعاون وتشجع الطلاب على توسيع نطاق التعلم إلى ما بعد اليوم الدراسي التقليدي.
src_text: Blogging is a tool that inspires collaboration, and encourages students to extend learning well beyond the traditional school day.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Appropriate use of blogs "can empower students to become more analytical and critical; through actively responding to Internet materials, students can define their positions in the context of others' writings as well as outline their own perspectives on particular issues (Oravec, 2002).


Arabic:
gt: إن الاستخدام المناسب للمدونات يمكن "أن يمكن الطلاب من أن يصبحوا أكثر تحليلاً ونقداً؛ ومن خلال الاستجابة الفعّالة للمواد على شبكة الإنترنت، يمكن للطلاب تحديد مواقفهم في سياق كتابات الآخرين بالإضافة إلى تحديد آرائهم الخاصة بشأن قضايا معينة (Oravec, 2002).
src_text: Appropriate use of blogs "can empower students to become more analytical and critical; through actively responding to Internet materials, students can define their positions in the context of others' writings as well as outline their own perspectives on particular issues (Oravec, 2002).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The modern city of Casablanca was founded by Berber fishermen in the 10th century BCE, and was used by the Phoenicians, Romans, and the Merenids as a strategic port called Anfa.


Arabic:
gt: استخدم الفينيقيون والرومان والمرينيد مدينة الدار البيضاء الحديثة كميناء استراتيجي يسمى "أنفا" وذلك بعد تأسيسها على يد الصيادين البربر في القرن العاشر قبل الميلاد.
src_text: The modern city of Casablanca was founded by Berber fishermen in the 10th century BCE, and was used by the Phoenicians, Romans, and the Merenids as a strategic port called Anfa.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Portuguese destroyed it and rebuilt it under the name Casa Branca, only to abandon it after an earthquake in 1755.


Arabic:
gt: قام البرتغاليون بتدميرها وإعادة بنائها تحت اسم "كازا برانكا"، فقط ليهجروها بعد زلزال 1755.
src_text: The Portuguese destroyed it and rebuilt it under the name Casa Branca, only to abandon it after an earthquake in 1755.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Moroccan sultan rebuilt the city as Daru l-Badya and it was given the name Casablanca by Spanish traders who established trading bases there.


Arabic:
gt: أعاد السلطان المغربي بناء المدينة باسم دارو لبادية، وأطلق التجار الأسبان عليها اسم الدار البيضاء الذين أسسوا قواعد تجارية هناك.
src_text: The Moroccan sultan rebuilt the city as Daru l-Badya and it was given the name Casablanca by Spanish traders who established trading bases there.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Casablanca is one of the least interesting places to shop in all of Morocco.


Arabic:
gt: تعد الدار البيضاء من الأماكن الأقل إثارة للتسوق في كل أنحاء المغرب.
src_text: Casablanca is one of the least interesting places to shop in all of Morocco.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Around the old Medina it's easy to find places selling traditional Moroccan goods, such as tagines, pottery, leather goods, hookahs, and a whole spectrum of geegaws, but it's all for the tourists.


Arabic:
gt: يسهل العثور على أماكن لبيع السلع المغربية التقليدية في جميع أنحاء المدينة القديمة، مثل الطواجن والفخار والسلع الجلدية والشيشة وجميع ألوان السلع الرخيصة، ولكن كل هذا مخصص للسياح.
src_text: Around the old Medina it's easy to find places selling traditional Moroccan goods, such as tagines, pottery, leather goods, hookahs, and a whole spectrum of geegaws, but it's all for the tourists.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Goma is a tourist city of the Democratic Republic of Congo in the extreme east near Rwanda.


Arabic:
gt: غوما هي مدينة سياحية في جمهورية الكونغو الديمقراطية تقع في أقصى الشرق بالقرب من رواندا.
src_text: Goma is a tourist city of the Democratic Republic of Congo in the extreme east near Rwanda.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 2002 Goma was destroyed by lava from the Nyiragongo volcano which buried most of the town’s streets, particularly the town centre.


Arabic:
gt: في سنة 2002 دمرت غوما بسبب حمم بركان نيراجونجو والتي طمرت معظم شوارع المدينة، ومركز المدينة بالخصوص.
src_text: In 2002 Goma was destroyed by lava from the Nyiragongo volcano which buried most of the town’s streets, particularly the town centre.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:While Goma is reasonably safe, any visits outside of Goma should be researched to understand the state of the fighting that persists in the North Kivu province.


Arabic:
gt: إن أي زيارات خارج "غوما" يجب البحث عنها لفهم حالة القتال المستمر في مقاطعة شمال "كيفو"، في حين أن "غوما" آمنة بشكل معقول.
src_text: While Goma is reasonably safe, any visits outside of Goma should be researched to understand the state of the fighting that persists in the North Kivu province.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The city is also the base to climb the Nyiragongo volcano along with some of the cheapest Mountain Gorilla tracking in Africa.


Arabic:
gt: كما تعد المدينة قاعدة لتسلق بركان نيراجونجو وبعض أرخص سبل تتبع الغوريلا الجبلية في إفريقيا.
src_text: The city is also the base to climb the Nyiragongo volcano along with some of the cheapest Mountain Gorilla tracking in Africa.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:You can use boda-boda (motorcycle taxi) to get around Goma. The normal (local) price is ~500 Congolese Francs for the short ride.


Arabic:
gt: تستطيع أن تركب البودا بودا (وهي درّاجة نارية تعمل كتاكسي) للتجول في مدينة غوما، والسعر المعتاد (محلياً) حوالي 500 فرنكٍ كونغوليٍ مقابل رحلة قصيرة.
src_text: You can use boda-boda (motorcycle taxi) to get around Goma. The normal (local) price is ~500 Congolese Francs for the short ride.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.


Arabic:
gt: إلى جانب صعوبة الوصول إليها نسبياً، أصبحت "تمبوكتو" تُستخدم كمجاز للأراضي الغريبة البعيدة.
src_text: Combined with its relative inaccessibility, "Timbuktu" has come to be used as a metaphor for exotic, distant lands.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Today, Timbuktu is an impoverished town, although its reputation makes it a tourist attraction, and it has an airport.


Arabic:
gt: تُعد مدينة تمبكتو في وقتنا الحاضر مدينة فقيرة، على الرغم من سمعتها التي تجعلها منطقة جذب سياحي، بالإضافة إلى وجود مطار بها.
src_text: Today, Timbuktu is an impoverished town, although its reputation makes it a tourist attraction, and it has an airport.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1990, it was added to the list of world heritage sites in danger, due to the threat of desert sands.


Arabic:
gt: في سنة 1990، تمت إضافتها إلى لائحة مواقع التراث العالمي المهددة بالخطر، نظراً لتهديد رمال الصحراء.
src_text: In 1990, it was added to the list of world heritage sites in danger, due to the threat of desert sands.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It was one of the major stops during Henry Louis Gates' PBS special Wonders of the African World.


Arabic:
gt: كانت إحدى المحطات الرئيسية لهنري لويس غيتس فى مسلسل PBS عن عجائب العالم الأفريقي الخاصة.
src_text: It was one of the major stops during Henry Louis Gates' PBS special Wonders of the African World.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The city is in stark contrast to the rest of the country's cities, because it has more of an Arabic flair than of an African.


Arabic:
gt: تتناقض المدينة بشكل صارخ مع بقية مدن الدولة، لأنها تتميز بطابع عربي أكثر منه إفريقي.
src_text: The city is in stark contrast to the rest of the country's cities, because it has more of an Arabic flair than of an African.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Kruger National Park (KNP) lies in the north-east of South Africa and runs along the border of Mozambique in the east, Zimbabwe in the north, and the southern border is the Crocodile River.


Arabic:
gt: يقع منتزه كروغر الوطني (KNP) في شمال شرق جنوب إفريقيا، ويمتد بمحاذاة حدود موزمبيق شرقاً، وزيمبابوي شمالاً، ويحدّه جنوباً نهر كروكودايل.
src_text: The Kruger National Park (KNP) lies in the north-east of South Africa and runs along the border of Mozambique in the east, Zimbabwe in the north, and the southern border is the Crocodile River.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The park covers 19,500 km² and is divided in 14 different ecozones, each supporting different wildlife.


Arabic:
gt: تبلغ مساحة المنتزه 19500 كم مربع وهو ينقسم إلى 14 منطقة بيئية مختلفة، يدعم كلّ منها حياةً بريةً مختلفةً.
src_text: The park covers 19,500 km² and is divided in 14 different ecozones, each supporting different wildlife.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is one of the main attractions of South Africa and it is considered the flagship of South African National Parks (SANParks).


Arabic:
gt: تُعتبر واحدة من المناطق الجذابة في جنوب إفريقيا، كما تعتبر منتزها رئيسياً من المنتزهات الوطنية في جنوب إفريقيا ( منتزهات جنوب إفريقيا الوطنية).
src_text: It is one of the main attractions of South Africa and it is considered the flagship of South African National Parks (SANParks).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As with all South African National Parks, there are daily conservation and entry fees for the park.


Arabic:
gt: يوجد رسوم يومية للحفاظ على المنتزه والدخول إليه،أسوة بجميع المتنزهات الوطنية في جنوب إفريقيا.
src_text: As with all South African National Parks, there are daily conservation and entry fees for the park.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It may also be beneficial for one to buy a Wild Card, which provides entry to either selections of parks in South Africa or all of the South African National Parks.


Arabic:
gt: من الممكن أن يكون مفيداً أن تشتري بطاقة Wild Card، فهي تسمح لك بالدخول إلى مجموعة مختارة من متنزهات جنوب إفريقيا أو جميع متنزهات جنوب إفريقيا الوطنية.
src_text: It may also be beneficial for one to buy a Wild Card, which provides entry to either selections of parks in South Africa or all of the South African National Parks.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Hong Kong Island gives the territory of Hong Kong its name and is the place that many tourists regard as the main focus.


Arabic:
gt: تمنح جزيرة هونج كونج إقليم هونج كونج اسمه وهي المكان الذي يعتبره العديد من السائحين قبلتهم.
src_text: Hong Kong Island gives the territory of Hong Kong its name and is the place that many tourists regard as the main focus.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The parade of buildings that make the Hong Kong skyline has been likened to a glittering bar chart that is made apparent by the presence of the waters of Victoria Harbour.


Arabic:
gt: تشبَّه المباني المصطفة التي ترسم أفق هونج كونج بمخطط بياني برّاق يظهر فوق مياه ميناء فيكتوريا.
src_text: The parade of buildings that make the Hong Kong skyline has been likened to a glittering bar chart that is made apparent by the presence of the waters of Victoria Harbour.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:To get the best views of Hong Kong, leave the island and head for the Kowloon waterfront opposite.


Arabic:
gt: لكي تحظى بأفضل المشاهد لهونج كونج، غادر الجزيرة واتجه إلى واجهة كولون البحرية في الجهة المقابلة.
src_text: To get the best views of Hong Kong, leave the island and head for the Kowloon waterfront opposite.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The great majority of Hong Kong Island's urban development is densely packed on reclaimed land along the northern shore.


Arabic:
gt: الغالبية العظمى من التنمية الحضرية لجزيرة هونج كونج متمركزةٌ بكثافةٍ على أراضٍ مستصلحة على طول الشاطئ الشمالي.
src_text: The great majority of Hong Kong Island's urban development is densely packed on reclaimed land along the northern shore.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This is the place the British colonisers took as their own and so if you are looking for evidence of the territory's colonial past, this is a good place to start.


Arabic:
gt: هذا هو المكان الذي اتّخَذَهُ المستعمرون البريطانيون كمكان خاص بهم، وبالتالي إذا كنت تبحث عن دليلٍ على الماضي الاستعماريِّ للمنطقة، فهذا مكانٌ جيدٌ للبدء.
src_text: This is the place the British colonisers took as their own and so if you are looking for evidence of the territory's colonial past, this is a good place to start.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Sundarbans are the largest littoral mangrove belt in the world, stretching 80 km (50 mi) into the Bangladeshi and Indian hinterland from the coast.


Arabic:
gt: يُعتبر سونداربانس أكبر حزام ساحلي للأيكة الساحلية في العالم، ويمتد لمسافة 80 كيلومتراً (50 ميلاً) في مناطق بنغلاديش والهند النائية من ناحية الساحل.
src_text: The Sundarbans are the largest littoral mangrove belt in the world, stretching 80 km (50 mi) into the Bangladeshi and Indian hinterland from the coast.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Sundarbans has been declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The part of the forest within Indian territory is called Sundarbans National Park.


Arabic:
gt: أُعلنت سونداربانس موقعاً للتراث العالمي لليونسكو. يُسمى جزء الغابة الموجود داخل الأراضي الهندية بمنتزه سونداربانس الوطني.
src_text: The Sundarbans has been declared a UNESCO World Heritage Site. The part of the forest within Indian territory is called Sundarbans National Park.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The forests aren't just mangrove swamps though — they include some of the last remaining stands of the mighty jungles which once covered the Gangetic plain.


Arabic:
gt: ولكن الغابات ليست مجرد مستنقعات لأشجار المانجروف؛ فبها بعضٌ من آخر الشواهد القائمة على الأدغال الكثيفة التي غطت في يومٍ ما سهل نهر الغانج.
src_text: The forests aren't just mangrove swamps though — they include some of the last remaining stands of the mighty jungles which once covered the Gangetic plain.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Sundarbans cover an area of 3,850 km², of which about one-third is covered in water/marsh areas.


Arabic:
gt: تغطي سونداربانس مساحة 3850 كيلومتر مربع، ثلثها تقريباً مغطى بالمياه/المستنقعات.
src_text: The Sundarbans cover an area of 3,850 km², of which about one-third is covered in water/marsh areas.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since 1966 the Sundarbans have been a wildlife sanctuary, and it is estimated that there are now 400 Royal Bengal tigers and about 30,000 spotted deer in the area.


Arabic:
gt: ومنذ عام 1966، كانت سونداربانس محمية للحياة البرية، وتشير التقديرات إلى أن هناك الآن 400 من نمور البنغال الملكية، ونحو 30 ألف غزال مُرقط في المنطقة.
src_text: Since 1966 the Sundarbans have been a wildlife sanctuary, and it is estimated that there are now 400 Royal Bengal tigers and about 30,000 spotted deer in the area.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Buses depart the inter-district bus station (across the river) throughout the day, though most, especially those heading to the east and Jakar/Bumthang leave between 06:30 and 07:30.


Arabic:
gt: تغادر الحافلات المحطة الداخلية بين المناطق (عبر النهر) في خلال اليوم على الرغم من أن معظمها وخاصة المتجهة منها إلى الشرق وجاكار/بومثانج تغادر بين 06:30 و 07:30.
src_text: Buses depart the inter-district bus station (across the river) throughout the day, though most, especially those heading to the east and Jakar/Bumthang leave between 06:30 and 07:30.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As the inter-district buses are often full, it is advisable to purchase a ticket a few days in advance.


Arabic:
gt: لأن حافلات ما بين الأحياء غالباً ما تكون ممتلئة، من الأفضل شراء التذاكر مسبقاً قبل بضعة أيام.
src_text: As the inter-district buses are often full, it is advisable to purchase a ticket a few days in advance.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most districts are served by small Japanese Coaster Buses, which are comfortable and sturdy.


Arabic:
gt: معظم المناطق تخدمها حافلات "كوستر" يابانية صغيرة وهي مريحة وقوية.
src_text: Most districts are served by small Japanese Coaster Buses, which are comfortable and sturdy.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Shared taxis are a quick and comfortable means to travel to nearby places, such as Paro (Nu 150) and Punakha (Nu 200).


Arabic:
gt: سيارات الأجرة المشتركة وسيلة سريعة ومريحة للتنقل إلى الأماكن المجاورة، مثل بارو (Nu 150) وبوناخا (Nu 200).
src_text: Shared taxis are a quick and comfortable means to travel to nearby places, such as Paro (Nu 150) and Punakha (Nu 200).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Oyapock River Bridge is a cable-stayed bridge. It spans the Oyapock River to link the cities of Oiapoque in Brazil and Saint-Georges de l'Oyapock in French Guiana.


Arabic:
gt: جسر نهر أويابوك هو جسر معلق. يمتد على نهر أويابوك لربط مدينتي أويابوك في البرازيل وسان جورج دو لويابوك في غيانا الفرنسية.
src_text: The Oyapock River Bridge is a cable-stayed bridge. It spans the Oyapock River to link the cities of Oiapoque in Brazil and Saint-Georges de l'Oyapock in French Guiana.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The two towers rise to a height of 83 meters, it's 378 meters long and it has two lanes of 3.50 m wide.


Arabic:
gt: يبلغ ارتفاع البرجين 83 متراً، ويبلغ طوله 378 متراً، وله مساران عرضهما 3.50 متراً.
src_text: The two towers rise to a height of 83 meters, it's 378 meters long and it has two lanes of 3.50 m wide.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The vertical clearance under the bridge is 15 meters. Construction was completed in August 2011, it didn't open to traffic until March 2017.


Arabic:
gt: المسافة الرأسية الخالية تحت الجسر ١٥ متراً. اكتمل البناء في آب ٢٠١١، ولم يُفْتَحْ أمام حركة المرور حتى آذار ٢٠١٧.
src_text: The vertical clearance under the bridge is 15 meters. Construction was completed in August 2011, it didn't open to traffic until March 2017.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The bridge is scheduled to be fully operational in September 2017, when the Brazilian customs checkpoints are expected to be finished.


Arabic:
gt: ومن المقرر أن يبدأ الجسر العمل بكامل طاقته في سبتمبر 2017، في نفس الوقت المتوقع عنده الانتهاء من نقاط التفتيش الجمركية البرازيلية.
src_text: The bridge is scheduled to be fully operational in September 2017, when the Brazilian customs checkpoints are expected to be finished.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Guaraní were the most significant indigenous group inhabiting what is now Eastern Paraguay, living as semi-nomadic hunters who also practised subsistence agriculture.


Arabic:
gt: كانت "الغواراني" أهم مجموعة أصلية تسكن ما يعرف الآن بباراغواي الشرقية، كان يعيش مجموعة "الغواراني" كصيادين شبه رحالة ويمارسون أيضاً زراعةَ الكفاف.
src_text: The Guaraní were the most significant indigenous group inhabiting what is now Eastern Paraguay, living as semi-nomadic hunters who also practised subsistence agriculture.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Chaco region was home to other groups of indigenous tribes such as the Guaycurú and Payaguá, who survived by hunting, gathering and fishing.


Arabic:
gt: كانت منطقة تشاكو موطنًا لمجموعات أخرى من القبائل الأصلية مثل Guaycurú وPayaguá، الذين عاشوا على صيد الحيوانات، وجمع النباتات، وصيد الأسماك.
src_text: The Chaco region was home to other groups of indigenous tribes such as the Guaycurú and Payaguá, who survived by hunting, gathering and fishing.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the 16th century Paraguay, formerly called "The Giant Province of the Indies", was born as a result of the encounter of Spanish conquerors with the native indigenous groups.


Arabic:
gt: في القرن السادس عشر، نشأت باراغواي، التي كانت تُعرف سابقًا باسم "المقاطعة العملاقة لجزر الهند" نتيجة مواجهة بين الغزاة الإسبان ومجموعات السكان الأصليين.
src_text: In the 16th century Paraguay, formerly called "The Giant Province of the Indies", was born as a result of the encounter of Spanish conquerors with the native indigenous groups.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Spaniards started the colonization period which lasted for three centuries.


Arabic:
gt: بدأ الإسبان الحقبة الاستعماريّة التي دامت لثلاثة قرون.
src_text: The Spaniards started the colonization period which lasted for three centuries.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since the foundation of Asunción in 1537, Paraguay has managed to keep a lot of its indigenous character and identity.


Arabic:
