gt: منذ تأسيس أسونسيون عام 1537، تمكنت باراغواي من الحفاظ على الكثير من طابعها الأصلي وهويته.
src_text: Since the foundation of Asunción in 1537, Paraguay has managed to keep a lot of its indigenous character and identity.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Argentina is well known for having one of the best polo teams and players in the world.


Arabic:
gt: تشتهر الأرجنتين بوجود أحد أفضل فرق ولاعبي البولو في العالم.
src_text: Argentina is well known for having one of the best polo teams and players in the world.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The largest tournament of the year takes place in December at the polo fields in Las Cañitas.


Arabic:
gt: تقام أكبر مسابقات العام في كانون الأول، على ملاعب بولو في لاس كانيتاس.
src_text: The largest tournament of the year takes place in December at the polo fields in Las Cañitas.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Smaller tournaments and matches can also be seen here at other times of the year.


Arabic:
gt: بالإضافة إلى ذلك يُمكن مشاهدة البطولات والمباريات الأصغر هنا في أوقات أخرى من السنة.
src_text: Smaller tournaments and matches can also be seen here at other times of the year.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For news on tournaments and where to buy tickets for polo matches, check Asociacion Argentina de Polo.


Arabic:
gt: للحصول على أخبار عن البطولات وأماكن شراء تذاكر مباريات البولو، تفقّد رابطة البولو الأرجنتينية.
src_text: For news on tournaments and where to buy tickets for polo matches, check Asociacion Argentina de Polo.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).


Arabic:
gt: عملة فوكلاند الرسمية هي الجنيه الفوكلاندي (FKP) الذي يتم تحديد قيمته معادلة بـقيمة الجنيه البريطاني (GBP).
src_text: The official Falklands currency is the Falkland pound (FKP) whose value is set equivalent to that of one British pound (GBP).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Money can be exchanged at the only bank in the islands which is located in Stanley across from the FIC West store.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن استبدال المال في البنك الوحيد بالجزر الذي يقع في ستانلي على الجانب الأخر من متجر FIC West.
src_text: Money can be exchanged at the only bank in the islands which is located in Stanley across from the FIC West store.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:British pounds will generally be accepted anywhere in the islands and within Stanley credit cards and United States dollars are also often accepted.


Arabic:
gt: يتم قبول الجنيه البريطاني بشكل عام في أي مكان في الجزر وداخل بطاقات ستانلي الائتمانية ودولار الولايات المتحدة الأمريكية في كثير من الأحيان.
src_text: British pounds will generally be accepted anywhere in the islands and within Stanley credit cards and United States dollars are also often accepted.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:On the outlying islands credit cards will probably not be accepted, although British and United States currency may be taken; check with the owners in advance to determine what is an acceptable payment method.


Arabic:
gt: في الجزر النائية هناك احتمالٌ ألا يتم قبول بطاقات الائتمان، على الرغم من أنه قد يتم قبول العملة البريطانية والعملة الأمريكية؛ تحقق مسبقًا مع المالكين لمعرفة طرق الدفع المقبولة.
src_text: On the outlying islands credit cards will probably not be accepted, although British and United States currency may be taken; check with the owners in advance to determine what is an acceptable payment method.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is nearly impossible to exchange Falklands currency outside of the islands, so exchange money prior to leaving the islands.


Arabic:
gt: إنه من المستحيل تقريباً صرف عملة فوكلاندس خارج الجزر، لذلك يجب صرف النقود قبل مغادرة الجزر.
src_text: It is nearly impossible to exchange Falklands currency outside of the islands, so exchange money prior to leaving the islands.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Since Montevideo is south of the Equator, it is summer there when it's winter in the Northern Hemisphere and vice versa.


Arabic:
gt: وبما أن مونتيفيديو تقع جنوب خط الاستواء، فإن فصل الصيف يكون هناك عندما يكون الشتاء في نصف الكرة الأرضية الشمالي والعكس صحيح.
src_text: Since Montevideo is south of the Equator, it is summer there when it's winter in the Northern Hemisphere and vice versa.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Montevideo is in the subtropics; in the summer months, temperatures above +30°C are common.


Arabic:
gt: تقع مونتفيديو في المناطق شبه الاستوائية؛ من الشائع أن تتعدى درجات الحرارة 30 درجة مئوية في أشهر الصيف.
src_text: Montevideo is in the subtropics; in the summer months, temperatures above +30°C are common.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The winter can be deceptively chilly: temperatures rarely go below freezing, but the wind and humidity combine to make it feel colder than what the thermometer says.


Arabic:
gt: رُبما يكون الشتاء بارداً بشكل مخادع: نادراً ما تنخفض درجات الحرارة إلى ما دون درجة التجمد، لكن الرياح والرطوبة تجتمعان لتجعل الجو أكثر برودة مما يُشير مقياس الحرارة.
src_text: The winter can be deceptively chilly: temperatures rarely go below freezing, but the wind and humidity combine to make it feel colder than what the thermometer says.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are no particular "rainy" and "dry" seasons: the amount of rain stays roughly the same throughout the year.


Arabic:
gt: تبقى كمية المطر ثابتة تقريباً على مدار العام، حيث لا توجد مواسم "ممطرة" وأخرى "جافة" محددة.
src_text: There are no particular "rainy" and "dry" seasons: the amount of rain stays roughly the same throughout the year.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Though many of the animals in the park are used to seeing humans, the wildlife is nonetheless wild and should not be fed or disturbed.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أن العديد من الحيوانات في الحديقة معتادة على رؤية البشر، إلا أن الحياة البريّةَ في نهاية الأمر بريّةٌ ولا ينبغي إطعامها أو إزعاجها.
src_text: Though many of the animals in the park are used to seeing humans, the wildlife is nonetheless wild and should not be fed or disturbed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:According to park authorities, stay at least 100 yards/meters away from bears and wolves and 25 yards/meters from all other wild animals!


Arabic:
gt: ووفقًا لسلطات المنتزه، ابقَ بعيداً عن الدّببة والذّئاب 100 ياردة/متر على الأقلّ، وعن كلّ الحيوانات البرّيّة الأخرى 25 ياردة/مترا!
src_text: According to park authorities, stay at least 100 yards/meters away from bears and wolves and 25 yards/meters from all other wild animals!

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:No matter how docile they may look, bison, elk, moose, bears, and nearly all large animals can attack.


Arabic:
gt: مهما كانت سهولة الانقياد التي تبدو عليهم، فإن البيسون، الأيائل، الموظ، والدببة، وكل الحيوانات الكبيرة تقريباً قد تهاجم.
src_text: No matter how docile they may look, bison, elk, moose, bears, and nearly all large animals can attack.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Each year, dozens of visitors are injured because they didn't keep a proper distance. These animals are large, wild, and potentially dangerous, so give them their space.


Arabic:
gt: يصاب عشرات الزوار كل عام بجروح لعدم بقائهم على مسافة آمنة. هذه الحيوانات كبيرة، ومتوحشة، و تعتبر مكمناً للخطر، ولهذا يجب إعطاؤها مجالها الخاص.
src_text: Each year, dozens of visitors are injured because they didn't keep a proper distance. These animals are large, wild, and potentially dangerous, so give them their space.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In addition, be aware that odors attract bears and other wildlife, so avoid carrying or cooking odorous foods and keep a clean camp.


Arabic:
gt: إضافةً إلى ذلك، انتبه لأن الروائح جاذبة للدببة وحيوانات برية أخرى، لذا تجنّب حمل أو طهي أطعمة ذات رائحة وحافظ على نظافة المخيم.
src_text: In addition, be aware that odors attract bears and other wildlife, so avoid carrying or cooking odorous foods and keep a clean camp.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Apia is the capital of Samoa. The town is on the island of Upolu and has a population of just under 40,000.


Arabic:
gt: إن عاصمة ساموا هي مدينة أبيا. وتقع هذه المدينة في جزيرة أبولو ويبلغ ويبلغ عدد سكانها أقل من 40,000 نسمة بقليل.
src_text: Apia is the capital of Samoa. The town is on the island of Upolu and has a population of just under 40,000.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Apia was founded in the 1850s and has been the official capital of Samoa since 1959.


Arabic:
gt: تأسست أبيا في خمسينيات القرن التاسع عشر وكانت العاصمة الرسمية لساموا منذ عام 1959.
src_text: Apia was founded in the 1850s and has been the official capital of Samoa since 1959.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The harbor was the site of an infamous naval standoff in 1889 when seven ships from Germany, the US, and Britain refused to leave the harbor.


Arabic:
gt: كان المرفأ موقعاً لمواجهاتٍ بحريةٍ سيئة السمعة في عام ١٨٨٩ عندما رفضت سبع سفن من ألمانيا والولايات المتحدة وبريطانيا مغادرة الميناء.
src_text: The harbor was the site of an infamous naval standoff in 1889 when seven ships from Germany, the US, and Britain refused to leave the harbor.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:All the ships were sunk, except for one British cruiser. Nearly 200 American and German lives were lost.


Arabic:
gt: لقد غرقت جميع السفن باستثناء طراد بريطاني واحد. وغرق وما يقرب من 200 شخص أمريكي وألماني.
src_text: All the ships were sunk, except for one British cruiser. Nearly 200 American and German lives were lost.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:During the struggle for independence organised by the Mau movement, a peaceful gathering in the town resulted in the killing of the paramount chief Tupua Tamasese Lealofi III.


Arabic:
gt: خلال الكفاح الذي نظمته حركة ماو من أجل الاستقلال، نتج عن تجمع مسالم في البلدة مقتل القائد الأعلى توبوا تماسيس ليلوفي الثالث.
src_text: During the struggle for independence organised by the Mau movement, a peaceful gathering in the town resulted in the killing of the paramount chief Tupua Tamasese Lealofi III.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are many beaches, due to Auckland's straddling of two harbours. The most popular ones are in three areas.


Arabic:
gt: نتيجة لوقوع "أوكلاند" بين مرفأين، هناك العديد من الشواطئ، يقع الأكثر شعبية في ثلاثة مناطق.
src_text: There are many beaches, due to Auckland's straddling of two harbours. The most popular ones are in three areas.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:North Shore beaches (in North Harbour district) are on the Pacific Ocean and stretch from Long Bay in the north to Devonport in the south.


Arabic:
gt: تقع شواطئ نورث شور (في منطقة نورث هاربور) على المحيط الهادئ وتمتد من لونج باي في الشمال إلى ديفونبورت في الجنوب.
src_text: North Shore beaches (in North Harbour district) are on the Pacific Ocean and stretch from Long Bay in the north to Devonport in the south.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They are almost all sandy beaches with safe swimming, and most have shade provided by pohutukawa trees.


Arabic:
gt: كل الشواطئ رملية تقريباً تسمح بسباحة آمنة، ومعظمها تظلها أشجار البوتوكوا.
src_text: They are almost all sandy beaches with safe swimming, and most have shade provided by pohutukawa trees.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Tamaki Drive beaches are on the Waitemata Harbour, in the upmarket suburbs of Mission Bay and St Heliers in Central Auckland.


Arabic:
gt: تقع شواطئ طرق تاماكي على مرفأ ويتيماتا، في ضواحي خليج ميشن وسانت هيليرز في وسط أوكلاند.
src_text: Tamaki Drive beaches are on the Waitemata Harbour, in the upmarket suburbs of Mission Bay and St Heliers in Central Auckland.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:These are sometimes-crowded family beaches with a good range of shops lining the shore. Swimming is safe.


Arabic:
gt: هذه الشواطئ العائلية مزدحمة في بعض الأحيان مع مجموعة جيدة من المتاجر التي تصطف على الشاطئ. السباحة آمنة.
src_text: These are sometimes-crowded family beaches with a good range of shops lining the shore. Swimming is safe.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The main local beer is 'Number One', it is not a complex beer, but pleasant and refreshing. The other local beer is called "Manta".


Arabic:
gt: تُعرف البيرة الشعبية الأساسية باسم "رقم واحد"، فهي ليست مشروبًا مركبًا، وإنما هي مشروبًا ممتعًا ومنعشًا. وتسمى البيرة المحلية الأخرى "مانتا".
src_text: The main local beer is 'Number One', it is not a complex beer, but pleasant and refreshing. The other local beer is called "Manta".

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are many French wines to be had, but the New Zealand and Australian wines might travel better.


Arabic:
gt: أنواع النبيذ الفرنسي متعددة، ولكن النبيذ النيوزيلندي والأسترالي قد يحظيا بانتشار أوسع.
src_text: There are many French wines to be had, but the New Zealand and Australian wines might travel better.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The local tap water is perfectly safe to drink, but bottled water is easy to find if you are fearful.


Arabic:
gt: مياه الصنبور المحلّيّة صالحة تماماً للشرب، ولكن من السهل إيجاد زجاجات المياه، إن كنت متخوّفاً.
src_text: The local tap water is perfectly safe to drink, but bottled water is easy to find if you are fearful.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For Australians, the idea of 'flat white' coffee is foreign. A short black is 'espresso', cappuccino comes heaped high with cream (not froth), and tea is served without milk.


Arabic:
gt: بالنسبة للأستراليين، تعد فكرة قهوة "فلات وايت" غريبة. القهوة الصغيرة السوداء هي "الإسبرسو"، أمّا الكابتشينو فتعلوه طبقة من القشدة (وليس الرغوة)، ويتم تقديم الشاي من دون حليب.
src_text: For Australians, the idea of 'flat white' coffee is foreign. A short black is 'espresso', cappuccino comes heaped high with cream (not froth), and tea is served without milk.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The hot chocolate is up to Belgian standards. Fruit juices are pricey but excellent.


Arabic:
gt: الشوكولاتة الساخنة متوافقة مع المعايير البلجيكية. عصائر الفاكهة ممتازة على الرغم من أنها باهظة الثمن.
src_text: The hot chocolate is up to Belgian standards. Fruit juices are pricey but excellent.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many trips to the reef are made all year around, and injuries due to any of these causes on the reef are rare.


Arabic:
gt: تُقام العديد من الرحلات إلى الشعاب المرجانية على مدار العام، ونادراً ما تحدث إصابات للشعاب المرجانية لأي من هذه الأسباب.
src_text: Many trips to the reef are made all year around, and injuries due to any of these causes on the reef are rare.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Still, take advice from authorities, obey all signs, and pay close attention to safety warnings.


Arabic:
gt: مع هذا، اطلب النصائح من السلطات، وامتثل لجميع الإشارات، وانتبه جيداً لتحذيرات السلامة.
src_text: Still, take advice from authorities, obey all signs, and pay close attention to safety warnings.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Box jellyfish occur near beaches and near river estuaries from October to April north of 1770. They can occasionally be found outside these times.


Arabic:
gt: يتواجد قنديل البحر الصندوقي بالقرب من الشواطئ ومصبات الأنهار من تشرين الأول إلى نيسان شمال 1770. ويمكن العثور عليه أحياناً في غير هذه الأوقات.
src_text: Box jellyfish occur near beaches and near river estuaries from October to April north of 1770. They can occasionally be found outside these times.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Sharks do exist, however they rarely attack humans. Most sharks are scared of humans and would swim away.


Arabic:
gt: أسماك القرش موجودة بالفعل، لكنها نادرًا ما تهاجم البشر. تخاف معظم أسماك القرش من البشر وتسبح بعيدًا إن رأت أحدهم.
src_text: Sharks do exist, however they rarely attack humans. Most sharks are scared of humans and would swim away.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Saltwater Crocodiles do not actively live in the ocean, their primary habitat is in river estuaries north from Rockhampton.


Arabic:
gt: لا تعيش تماسيح المياه المالحة عادةً في المحيط، موطنها الأساسي يقع في مصبّات الأنهار شمال روكهامبتون.
src_text: Saltwater Crocodiles do not actively live in the ocean, their primary habitat is in river estuaries north from Rockhampton.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Booking in advance gives the traveller peace of mind that they will have somewhere to sleep once they arrive at their destination.


Arabic:
gt: يُطمئن الحجزُ المُسبق المسافرَ بأنّه سيكونُ لديه مكانٌ للنوم بمجرّد وصوله إلى وجهتهِ المقصودةِ.
src_text: Booking in advance gives the traveller peace of mind that they will have somewhere to sleep once they arrive at their destination.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travel agents often have deals with specific hotels, although you may find it possible to book other forms of accommodation, like camping grounds, through a travel agent.


Arabic:
gt: على الرغم من أنك قد تجد أنه من الممكن حجز أشكال أخرى من الإقامة، مثل أماكن التخييم، من خلال وكيل السفر، إلا أنه غالباً ما يكون لدى وكلاء السفر صفقات مع فنادق معينة.
src_text: Travel agents often have deals with specific hotels, although you may find it possible to book other forms of accommodation, like camping grounds, through a travel agent.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travel agents usually offer packages that include breakfast, transportation arrangements to/from the airport or even combined flight and hotel packages.


Arabic:
gt: جرت العادة على تقديم وكلاء السفر باقات تشمل الإفطار، وترتيبات التنقل من وإلى المطار أو حتى باقات مجمّعة تشمل الطيران والفنادق.
src_text: Travel agents usually offer packages that include breakfast, transportation arrangements to/from the airport or even combined flight and hotel packages.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They can also hold the reservation for you if you need time to think about the offer or procure other documents for your destination (e.g. visa).


Arabic:
gt: كما يمكنهم الاحتفاظ بالحجز لك إذا كنت بحاجة إلى وقت للتفكير في العرض أو الحصول على مستندات أخرى لوجهتك (على سبيل المثال، التأشيرة).
src_text: They can also hold the reservation for you if you need time to think about the offer or procure other documents for your destination (e.g. visa).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Any amendments or requests though should be coursed through the travel agent first and not directly with the hotel.


Arabic:
gt: بالرغم من ذلك، يجب توجيه أي تعديلات أو طلبات عبر وكيل السفر أولاً وليس مباشرة إلى الفندق.
src_text: Any amendments or requests though should be coursed through the travel agent first and not directly with the hotel.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For some festivals, the vast majority of the attendants to music festivals decide to camp on site, and most attendants consider it a vital part of the experience.


Arabic:
gt: بالنسبة لبعض المهرجانات، فإن الغالبية العظمى من الحاضرين في المهرجانات الموسيقية يقررون التخييم في الموقع معتبرين ذلك جزءًا مهمًا من التجربة.
src_text: For some festivals, the vast majority of the attendants to music festivals decide to camp on site, and most attendants consider it a vital part of the experience.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you want to be close to the action you're going to have to get in early to get a camping site close to the music.


Arabic:
gt: إذا أردت أن تقترب من الأحداث، فيجب عليك أن تدخل باكراً وذلك للحصول على موقع تخييم قريب من الموسيقى.
src_text: If you want to be close to the action you're going to have to get in early to get a camping site close to the music.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Remember that even though music on the main stages may have finished, there may be sections of the festival that will keep playing music until late into the night.


Arabic:
gt: تذكر أنه على الرغم من أن الموسيقى في المنصات الرئيسية قد تكون انتهت، إلا أن هناك أقسام من المهرجان قد تستمر في تشغيل الموسيقى حتى وقت متأخر من الليل.
src_text: Remember that even though music on the main stages may have finished, there may be sections of the festival that will keep playing music until late into the night.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some festivals have special camping areas for families with young children.


Arabic:
gt: تضم البعض من المهرجانات مناطق تخييمٍ خاصةٍ للعائلات التي معها أولاد صغار.
src_text: Some festivals have special camping areas for families with young children.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If crossing the Northern Baltic in winter, check the cabin location, as going through ice causes quite horrible noise for those most affected.


Arabic:
gt: في حال كنت تعبر منطقة بحر البلطيق الشمالية في الشتاء، فيجب أن تفحص موقع الكابينة، إذ أن المرور عبر الجليد يسبب ضوضاء صاخبة للغاية للأشخاص الأكثر تضرراً.
src_text: If crossing the Northern Baltic in winter, check the cabin location, as going through ice causes quite horrible noise for those most affected.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Saint Petersburg cruises include time in town. Cruise passengers are exempted from visa requirements (check the terms).


Arabic:
gt: تشملُ رحلات سانت بطرسبرغ البحرية قضاء بعض الوقت في المدينة. يُعفى ركاب الرحلات البحرية من متطلبات الحصول على تأشيرة الدخول (راجع الشروط).
src_text: Saint Petersburg cruises include time in town. Cruise passengers are exempted from visa requirements (check the terms).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Casinos typically make many efforts to maximize time and money spent by guests. Windows and clocks are usually absent, and exits can be hard to find.


Arabic:
gt: تبذل الكازينوهات عادة الكثير من الجهود لزيادة الوقت والمال الذي ينفقه الضيوف. عادة ما تكون النوافذ والساعات غائبة، وقد يكون من الصعب العثور على مخارج.
src_text: Casinos typically make many efforts to maximize time and money spent by guests. Windows and clocks are usually absent, and exits can be hard to find.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They usually have special food, drink and entertainment offers, to keep guests in a good mood, and keep them at the premise.


Arabic:
gt: لديهم عادة وجبات خاصة، ومشروبات، وعروض ترفيهية، للحفاظ على مزاج الضيوف الجيد، وإبقائهم في المبنى.
src_text: They usually have special food, drink and entertainment offers, to keep guests in a good mood, and keep them at the premise.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some venues offer alcoholic beverages on the house. However, drunkenness impairs judgement, and all good gamblers know the importance of staying sober.


Arabic:
gt: تُقدِم بعض الأماكن مشروبات كحولية مجانًا، ولكن يعيق السُكْر الحُكم الصحيح على الأمور ويعلم جميع المقامرين الجيدين أهمية أن يبقى المقامر واعيًا.
src_text: Some venues offer alcoholic beverages on the house. However, drunkenness impairs judgement, and all good gamblers know the importance of staying sober.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Anyone who's going to drive at high latitudes or over mountain passes should consider the possibility of snow, ice, or freezing temperatures.


Arabic:
gt: يجب على كل من يقود سيارته على ارتفاعات عالية أو فوق الممرّات الجبليّة أن يأخذ بعين الاعتبار إمكانيّة تساقط الثّلوج أو الجليد أو درجات الحرارة تحت الصّفر.
src_text: Anyone who's going to drive at high latitudes or over mountain passes should consider the possibility of snow, ice, or freezing temperatures.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:On icy and snowy roadways, friction is low and you cannot drive as if you were on bare asphalt.


Arabic:
gt: على الطرق الجليدية والثلجية، يكون الاحتكاك منخفضاً ولا تتمكّن من القيادة كما لو كنت تقود على أسفلت ناعمٍ.
src_text: On icy and snowy roadways, friction is low and you cannot drive as if you were on bare asphalt.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:During blizzards, enough snow to get you stuck can fall in very little time.


Arabic:
gt: وأثناء العواصف الثلجية، قد تسقط كمية من الثلج تكون كافية لتوقفك لوقت قصير جداً.
src_text: During blizzards, enough snow to get you stuck can fall in very little time.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Visibility may also be restricted by falling or blowing snow or by condensation or ice on vehicle windows.


Arabic:
gt: قد يتسبب تساقط الجليد أو هبوب رياح جليدية أو عملية التكثّفِ أو وجودِ الجليد على نوافذ السيارات في محدودية الرؤية.
src_text: Visibility may also be restricted by falling or blowing snow or by condensation or ice on vehicle windows.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:On the other hand, icy and snowy conditions are normal in many countries, and traffic goes on mostly uninterrupted all year round.


Arabic:
gt: من ناحية أخرى، تعتبر الظروف الجليدية والثلجية طبيعية في العديد من البلدان، وتستمر حركة المرور في الغالب دون انقطاع على مدار السنة.
src_text: On the other hand, icy and snowy conditions are normal in many countries, and traffic goes on mostly uninterrupted all year round.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Safaris are perhaps the greatest tourism draw in Africa and the highlight for many visitors.


Arabic:
gt: ربما تكون رحلات السفاري هي أكبرُ عاملِ جذبٍ سياحيٍ في إفريقيا والأكثر بروزاً بالنسبة لكثيرٍ من الزوار.
src_text: Safaris are perhaps the greatest tourism draw in Africa and the highlight for many visitors.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.


Arabic:
gt: يُستخدم مصطلح رحلات السفاري عادةً للإشارة إلى السفر عبر البلاد لمشاهدة الحياة البرية المذهلة في أفريقيا، لا سيّما في السافانا.
src_text: The term safari in popular use refers to overland travel to view the stunning African wildlife, particularly on savanna.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some animals, such as elephants and giraffes, tend to approach closely to cars and standard equipment will allow good viewing.


Arabic:
gt: تميل بعض الحيوانات، مثل الفيلة والزراف، إلى الاقتراب بشكل وثيق من السيارات وسوف تسمح المعدات القياسية بالمشاهدة الجيدة.
src_text: Some animals, such as elephants and giraffes, tend to approach closely to cars and standard equipment will allow good viewing.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Lions, cheetahs and leopards are sometimes shy and you will see them better with binoculars.


Arabic:
gt: تشعر الأسود والفهود والنمور بالخجل أحياناً ويمكنكم رؤيتهم بشكل أفضل باستعمال المنظار.
src_text: Lions, cheetahs and leopards are sometimes shy and you will see them better with binoculars.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A walking safari (also called a "bush walk", "hiking safari", or going "footing") consists of hiking, either for a few hours or several days.


Arabic:
gt: السفاري سيراً على الأقدام (تسمى أيضاً "تنزه الأدغال" أو "التنزه سيراً على الأقدام" أو "التنزه") تتكون من المشي لمسافات طويلة، إما لبضع ساعات أو عدة أيام.
src_text: A walking safari (also called a "bush walk", "hiking safari", or going "footing") consists of hiking, either for a few hours or several days.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Paralympics will take place from 24 August to 5 September 2021. Some events will be held in other locations throughout Japan.


Arabic:
gt: ستقام دورة الألعاب الأولمبية للمعاقين في الفترة من 24 آب إلى 5 أيلول عام 2021، وستقام بعض أحداث الدورة في مواقع أخرى في أنحاء مختلفة من اليابان.
src_text: The Paralympics will take place from 24 August to 5 September 2021. Some events will be held in other locations throughout Japan.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Tokyo will be the only Asian city to have hosted two summer Olympics, having hosted the games in 1964.


Arabic:
gt: بعد استضافة مدينة طوكيو الألعاب الأولمبية عام 1964، ستصبح المدينة الآسيوية الوحيدة التي استضافت دورة الألعاب الأولمبية الصيفية مرتين.
src_text: Tokyo will be the only Asian city to have hosted two summer Olympics, having hosted the games in 1964.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you booked your flights and accommodation for 2020 before the postponement was announced, you may have a tricky situation.


Arabic:
gt: إذا حجزت رحلات الطيران والإقامة الخاصة بك لعام 2020 قبل الإعلان عن التأجيل، فربما تواجه موقفاً حرجاً.
src_text: If you booked your flights and accommodation for 2020 before the postponement was announced, you may have a tricky situation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Cancellation policies vary, but as of late March most coronavirus-based cancellation policies don't extend to July 2020, when the Olympics had been scheduled.


Arabic:
gt: تتفاوت سياسات الإلغاء، ولكن اعتباراً من أواخر آذار، لم تعد معظم سياسات الإلغاء المستندة إلى فيروس كورونا حتى تموز عام 2020، عندما كان من المقرر أن يتم تنظيم الألعاب الأوليمبية.
src_text: Cancellation policies vary, but as of late March most coronavirus-based cancellation policies don't extend to July 2020, when the Olympics had been scheduled.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It's expected that most event tickets will cost between ¥2,500 and ¥130,000, with typical tickets costing around ¥7,000.


Arabic:
gt: من المتوقع أن أغلب تذاكر الحدث ستبلغ تكلفتها بين 2,500 ين و 130,000 ين أما كلفة العادية النموذجية فستكون حوالي 7,000 ين.
src_text: It's expected that most event tickets will cost between ¥2,500 and ¥130,000, with typical tickets costing around ¥7,000.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Ironing damp clothes can help them dry. Many hotels have an iron and ironing board available for loan, even if one is not present in the room.


Arabic:
gt: يساعد كيّ الملابس المبلّلة على تجفيفها. توفّر العديد من الفنادق مكواة وطاولة كيّ للاستعارة، حتى إذا لم تكن موجودة بالغرفة.
src_text: Ironing damp clothes can help them dry. Many hotels have an iron and ironing board available for loan, even if one is not present in the room.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If an iron isn't available, or if you don't fancy wearing ironed socks, then you can try using a hairdryer, if available.


Arabic:
gt: في حالة عدم تواجد أي مكواة، أو إن كنت لا تفضل ارتداء الجوارب المكوية، إذن تستطيع أن تجرب استخدام مجفف الهواء، إذا كان متاحاً.
src_text: If an iron isn't available, or if you don't fancy wearing ironed socks, then you can try using a hairdryer, if available.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Be careful not to allow fabric to become too hot (which can cause shrinkage, or in extreme cases, scorch).


Arabic:
gt: لا تجعل القماش يصبح ساخنًا أكثر من اللازم (مما قد يؤدي إلى انكماشه أو احتراقه في أسوأ الحالات).
src_text: Be careful not to allow fabric to become too hot (which can cause shrinkage, or in extreme cases, scorch).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are different ways of purifying water, some more effective against specific threats.


Arabic:
gt: هناك طرق مختلفة لتنقية المياه، بعضها مجدية أكثر ضد تهديدات معينة.
src_text: There are different ways of purifying water, some more effective against specific threats.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In some areas boiling water for a minute is enough, in others several minutes are needed.


Arabic:
gt: في بعض المناطق يكفي غليان الماء لمدة دقيقة، وفي مناطق أخرى تحتاج إلى غليها لعدة دقائق.
src_text: In some areas boiling water for a minute is enough, in others several minutes are needed.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Filters vary in effectiveness, and should you have a concern, then you should consider buying your water in a sealed bottle from a reputable company.


Arabic:
gt: تختلف المرشحات من حيث الفاعلية، إذا كان لديك أي مخاوف، فعليك التفكير في شراء مياهك في زجاجات محكمة الغلق من شركة حسنة السمعة.
src_text: Filters vary in effectiveness, and should you have a concern, then you should consider buying your water in a sealed bottle from a reputable company.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travellers may encounter animal pests that they are not familiar with in their home regions.


Arabic:
gt: من المحتمل أن يواجه المسافرون آفات حيوانية ليسوا على دراية بها في مناطقهم الأصلية.
src_text: Travellers may encounter animal pests that they are not familiar with in their home regions.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Pests can spoil food, cause irritation, or in a worse case cause allergic reactions, spread venom, or transmit infections.


Arabic:
gt: قد تُفسد الآفات الطعام، وتسبب الإزعاج، أو تسبب ردود فعل تحسسية في الحالات الأسوأ، وتنشر السم، أو تنقل العدوى.
src_text: Pests can spoil food, cause irritation, or in a worse case cause allergic reactions, spread venom, or transmit infections.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Infectious diseases themselves, or dangerous animals that can injure or kill people by force, do not usually qualify as pests.


Arabic:
gt: فالأمراض المعدية ذاتها، أو الحيوانات الخطرة التي يمكن أن تصيب أو تقتل الناس بالقوة، لا توصف عادة بأنها آفات.
src_text: Infectious diseases themselves, or dangerous animals that can injure or kill people by force, do not usually qualify as pests.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Duty free shopping is the opportunity to buy goods exempted from taxes and excises at certain locations.


Arabic:
gt: التسوق في السوق الحرة فرصة لشراء بضائع معفاة من الضرائب والرسوم في أماكن محددة.
src_text: Duty free shopping is the opportunity to buy goods exempted from taxes and excises at certain locations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travellers bound for countries with heavy taxation can sometimes save a considerable amount of money, especially on products such as alcoholic beverages and tobacco.


Arabic:
gt: بإمكان المسافرين المتجهين إلى بلدان تفرض ضرائب مرتفعة، في بعض الأحيان، أن يوفروا مبلغ مالي كبير، وبالأخص فيما ينفقونه على منتجات كالمشروبات الكحولية والتبغ.
src_text: Travellers bound for countries with heavy taxation can sometimes save a considerable amount of money, especially on products such as alcoholic beverages and tobacco.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The stretch between Point Marion and Fairmont presents the most challenging driving conditions on the Buffalo-Pittsburgh Highway, passing frequently through isolated backwoods terrain.


Arabic:
gt: يحتوي الامتداد بين بوينت ماريون و فيرمونت على أصعب ظروف القيادة على طريق بافلو-بيتسبرغ السريع، حيث يمر بشكل منتظم عبر تضاريس غابات معزولة.
src_text: The stretch between Point Marion and Fairmont presents the most challenging driving conditions on the Buffalo-Pittsburgh Highway, passing frequently through isolated backwoods terrain.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you're not used to driving on country roads, keep your wits about you: steep grades, narrow lanes, and sharp curves predominate.


Arabic:
gt: إذا لم تكن معتاداً على القيادة على الطرق الريفية، فكن حذراً: يوجد دائماً منحدرات حادة وممرات ضيقة ومنحنيات حادة.
src_text: If you're not used to driving on country roads, keep your wits about you: steep grades, narrow lanes, and sharp curves predominate.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Posted speed limits are noticeably lower than in previous and subsequent sections — commonly 35-40 mph (56-64 km/h) — and strict obedience to them is even more important than otherwise.


Arabic:
gt: حدود السرعة المعلنة أقل بشكل ملحوظ مما كانت عليه في الأقسام السابقة واللاحقة — عادة 35-40 ميل في الساعة (56-64 كم / ساعة) — والطاعة الصارمة لهم أكثر أهمية من غير ذلك.
src_text: Posted speed limits are noticeably lower than in previous and subsequent sections — commonly 35-40 mph (56-64 km/h) — and strict obedience to them is even more important than otherwise.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Curiously, though, mobile phone service is much stronger here than along many other stretches of the route, e.g. the Pennsylvania Wilds.


Arabic:
gt: ومن الغريب أنه يبدو أن خدمة الهواتف النقالة أقوى هنا من كثير من المناطق الأخرى الممتدة على طول الطريق، على سبيل المثال غابات بنسلفانيا.
src_text: Curiously, though, mobile phone service is much stronger here than along many other stretches of the route, e.g. the Pennsylvania Wilds.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:German pastries are quite good, and in Bavaria, are quite rich and varied, similar to those of their southern neighbor, Austria.


Arabic:
gt: المعجنات الألمانية جيدة للغاية، وفي بافاريا هي غنية جداً ومتنوعة، تشبه معجنات جارتها الجنوبية، النمسا.
src_text: German pastries are quite good, and in Bavaria, are quite rich and varied, similar to those of their southern neighbor, Austria.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Fruit pastries are common, with apples cooked into pastries year round, and cherries and plums making their appearances during the summer.


Arabic:
gt: معجنات الفاكهة شائعة حيث يُطهى التفاح في المعجنات على مدار العام في حين يظهر الكرز والبرقوق خلال الصيف.
src_text: Fruit pastries are common, with apples cooked into pastries year round, and cherries and plums making their appearances during the summer.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Many German baked goods also feature almonds, hazelnuts, and other tree nuts. Popular cakes often pair particularly well with a cup of strong coffee.


Arabic:
gt: تحتوي العديد من المخبوزات الألمانية على اللوز، والبندق، وجوز الأشجار الأخرى. وغالبًا ما يتم تناول الكعك الشعبي خصيصاً مع فنجان من القهوة القوية.
src_text: Many German baked goods also feature almonds, hazelnuts, and other tree nuts. Popular cakes often pair particularly well with a cup of strong coffee.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you want some small though rich pastries, try what depending on region are called Berliner, Pfannkuchen or Krapfen.


Arabic:
gt: إذا أردت بعض المعجنات الصغيرة والغنية، جرّب ما يُسمّى ببيرلينر أو بفانكوكن أو كرابفن وذلك حسب المنطقة.
src_text: If you want some small though rich pastries, try what depending on region are called Berliner, Pfannkuchen or Krapfen.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A curry is a dish based on herbs and spices, together with either meat or vegetables.


Arabic:
gt: الكاري هو عبارة عن طبق من الأعشاب والبهار مع اللحوم أو الخضار.
src_text: A curry is a dish based on herbs and spices, together with either meat or vegetables.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A curry can be either "dry" or "wet" depending on the amount of liquid.


Arabic:
gt: قد يكون بهار الكاري "جافاً" أو "رطباً" حسب مقدار السائل.
src_text: A curry can be either "dry" or "wet" depending on the amount of liquid.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In inland regions of Northern India and Pakistan, yogurt is commonly used in curries; in Southern India and some other coastal regions of the subcontinent, coconut milk is commonly used.


Arabic:
gt: في المناطق الداخلية من شمال الهند وباكستان، ينتشر استخدام الزبادي في طبق الكاري، بينما في جنوب الهند وبعض المناطق الساحلية الأخرى في شبه القارة الهندية، ينتشر استخدام حليب جوز الهند.
src_text: In inland regions of Northern India and Pakistan, yogurt is commonly used in curries; in Southern India and some other coastal regions of the subcontinent, coconut milk is commonly used.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:With 17,000 islands to choose from, Indonesian food is an umbrella term covering a vast variety of regional cuisines found across the nation.


Arabic:
gt: يمثّل الطعام الإندونيسي مصطلحاً جامعاً يشمل مجموعة كبيرة من المطابخ الإقليمية المنتشرة في نواحي إندونيسيا، نظراً لوجود 17000 جزيرة في إندونيسيا لتفاضل بينهم.
src_text: With 17,000 islands to choose from, Indonesian food is an umbrella term covering a vast variety of regional cuisines found across the nation.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:But, if used without further qualifiers, the term tends to mean the food originally from the central and eastern parts of the main island Java.


Arabic:
gt: لكن إن تم استعماله من دون مصطلحات إضافية، فإن المصطلح يميل ليعني أن الطعام أصله من المناطق الوسطى والشرقية للجزيرة الرئيسية جافا.
src_text: But, if used without further qualifiers, the term tends to mean the food originally from the central and eastern parts of the main island Java.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Now widely available throughout the archipelago, Javanese cuisine features an array of simply seasoned dishes, the predominant flavorings the Javanese favor being peanuts, chillies, sugar (especially Javanese coconut sugar) and various aromatic spices.


Arabic:
gt: متوفرٌ الآن على نطاقٍ واسعٍ في جميع أنحاء جزر الأرخبيل، يتميّز المطبخ الجاويّ بمجموعةٍ من الأطباق المتبّلة ببساطةٍ، النكهات السّائدة التي يفضّلها الجاويّون هي الفول السوداني والفلفل والسّكر (خاصة سكر جوز الهند الجاوي) والتوابل العطرية المختلفة.
src_text: Now widely available throughout the archipelago, Javanese cuisine features an array of simply seasoned dishes, the predominant flavorings the Javanese favor being peanuts, chillies, sugar (especially Javanese coconut sugar) and various aromatic spices.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Stirrups are supports for the rider's feet that hang down on either side of the saddle.


Arabic:
gt: تعتبر الرّكائب دعاماتٍ لأقدام الفارس تتدلّى على جانبيّ السّرج.
src_text: Stirrups are supports for the rider's feet that hang down on either side of the saddle.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:They provide greater stability for the rider but can have safety concerns due to the potential for a rider's feet to get stuck in them.


Arabic:
gt: وهي توفر المزيد من الاستقرار للفارس ولكن يمكن أن تكون لها مخاوف أمان بسبب احتمال أن تعلق أقدام الفارس بها.
src_text: They provide greater stability for the rider but can have safety concerns due to the potential for a rider's feet to get stuck in them.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If a rider is thrown from a horse but has a foot caught in the stirrup, they could be dragged if the horse runs away. To minimize this risk, a number of safety precautions can be taken.


Arabic:
gt: إذا سقط الخيّال من فوق الحصان لكن بقيت قدمه عالقة في الطوق، قد يتم جره إذا ركض الحصان بعيداً. هناك عدد من الاحتياطات التي يمكن اتخاذها للحد من ذلك الخطر.
src_text: If a rider is thrown from a horse but has a foot caught in the stirrup, they could be dragged if the horse runs away. To minimize this risk, a number of safety precautions can be taken.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:First, most riders wear riding boots with a heel and a smooth, quite narrow, sole.


Arabic:
gt: أولاً، يرتدي معظم الخيالين أحذية ركوب الخيل ذات الكعب والنعل الناعم الضيق للغاية.
src_text: First, most riders wear riding boots with a heel and a smooth, quite narrow, sole.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Next, some saddles, particularly English saddles, have safety bars that allow a stirrup leather to fall off the saddle if pulled backwards by a falling rider.


Arabic:
gt: ثانيًا، تحتوي بعض السروج، وخاصة السروج الإنجليزية، على قضبان أمان تُتيح لفرو الركاب بالسقوط من السرج عند سحبه للخلف عند نزول الراكب.
src_text: Next, some saddles, particularly English saddles, have safety bars that allow a stirrup leather to fall off the saddle if pulled backwards by a falling rider.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Cochamó Valley - Chile's premier climbing destination, known as the Yosemite of South America, with a variety of granite big walls and crags.


Arabic:
gt: وادي كوشامو - وجهة التسلق الأولى في تشيلي، والمعروفة باسم يوسمايت في أمريكا الجنوبية، مع مجموعة متنوعة من الجدران وصخور الجرانيت الكبيرة.
src_text: Cochamó Valley - Chile's premier climbing destination, known as the Yosemite of South America, with a variety of granite big walls and crags.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Summits include breath-taking views from peaks. Climbers from all parts of the world are continually establishing new routes amongst its endless potential of walls.


Arabic:
gt: يقوم المتسلّقون من جميعِ أنحاءِ العالمِ باستمرار بإنشاء طرقٍ جديدةٍ بين الجدران المحتملةِ التي لا نهاية لها، حيث تشمل القمم مناظر خلابةٍ من فوقها.
src_text: Summits include breath-taking views from peaks. Climbers from all parts of the world are continually establishing new routes amongst its endless potential of walls.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Downhill snowsports, which include skiing and snowboarding, are popular sports involving sliding down snow-covered terrain with skis or a snowboard attached to your feet.


Arabic:
gt: الرياضات الثلجية على المنحدرات، والتي تشمل التزلج والتزحلق على الجليد، هي من الرياضات الشعبية التي تنطوي على الانزلاق إلى أسفل رقعة من الأرض المغطاة بالثلوج بواسطة الزلاجات أو لوح التزلج المثبتة في قدميك.
src_text: Downhill snowsports, which include skiing and snowboarding, are popular sports involving sliding down snow-covered terrain with skis or a snowboard attached to your feet.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Skiing is a major travelling activity with many enthusiasts, occasionally known as "ski bums," planning entire vacations around skiing at a particular location.


Arabic:
gt: يعتبر التزلج نشاطاً رئيسياً خلال السفر وله عدد كبير من المتحمسين، والذين يُعرفون أحياناً باسم "متشردي التزلج"، حيث يخططون لقضاء إجازات كاملة تتمركز حول التزلج في مكان معين.
src_text: Skiing is a major travelling activity with many enthusiasts, occasionally known as "ski bums," planning entire vacations around skiing at a particular location.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The idea of skiing is very old — cave paintings depicting skiers date back as far as 5000 BC!


Arabic:
gt: إن فكرة التزلج قديمة جداً — يعود تاريخ لوحات الكهوف التي تصور المتزلجين إلى سنة ٥٠٠٠ قبل الميلاد!
src_text: The idea of skiing is very old — cave paintings depicting skiers date back as far as 5000 BC!

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Downhill skiing as a sport goes back to at least the 17th century, and in 1861 the first recreational ski club was opened by Norwegians in Australia.


Arabic:
gt: يعود تاريخ التزلج على المنحدرات كرياضة إلى القرن السابع عشر على الأقل، وفي عام 1861 تم افتتاح أول نادي تزلج ترفيهي بواسطة النرويجيين في أستراليا.
src_text: Downhill skiing as a sport goes back to at least the 17th century, and in 1861 the first recreational ski club was opened by Norwegians in Australia.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Backpacking by ski: This activity is also called backcountry ski, ski touring or ski hiking.


Arabic:
gt: التزلج بحقيبة الظهر: يسمى هذا النشاط أيضاً التزلج في المناطق غير المأهولة، أو رحلات التزلج أو المشي لمسافات طويلة على الجليد.
src_text: Backpacking by ski: This activity is also called backcountry ski, ski touring or ski hiking.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is related to but usually not involving alpine style ski touring or mountaineering, the latter ones done in steep terrain and requiring much stiffer skis and boots.


Arabic:
gt: إنه مرتبط بجولات التزلج على جبال الألب أو تسلق الجبال، ولكنه لا ينطوي عادةً على جولات التزلج على الجليد أو تسلق الجبال، إذ يُمارسان في تضاريس منحدرة بشدة ويتطلبان زلاجات أكثر صلابة وأحذية طويلة.
src_text: It is related to but usually not involving alpine style ski touring or mountaineering, the latter ones done in steep terrain and requiring much stiffer skis and boots.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Think of the skiing route as of a similar hiking route.


Arabic:
gt: فكر في مسار التزلج على الجليد باعتباره مسارًا مماثل للمشي لمسافات طويلة.
src_text: Think of the skiing route as of a similar hiking route.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In good conditions you will be able to cover somewhat greater distances than walking – but only very seldom you will get the speeds of cross country skiing without a heavy backpack in groomed tracks.


Arabic:
gt: في الظروف الجيدة، ستستطيع قطع مسافات أطول إلى حد ما من المشي، ولكن نادراً ما ستصل لسرعات تزلج المسافات الطويلة بلا حقيبة ظهر ثقيلة وفي مسارات مجهّزة.
src_text: In good conditions you will be able to cover somewhat greater distances than walking – but only very seldom you will get the speeds of cross country skiing without a heavy backpack in groomed tracks.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Europe is a continent that is relatively small but with many independent countries. Under normal circumstances, travelling through multiple countries would mean having to go through visa applications and passport control multiple times.


Arabic:
gt: أوروبا قارة صغيرة نسبياً ولكن فيها العديد من الدول المستقلة. وفي ظل الظروف العادية، فإن السفر عبر عدة بلدان يعني اضطرارك إلى المرور عبر طلبات الحصول على التأشيرة ومراقبة جوازات السفر عدة مرات.
src_text: Europe is a continent that is relatively small but with many independent countries. Under normal circumstances, travelling through multiple countries would mean having to go through visa applications and passport control multiple times.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The Schengen zone, however, works somewhat like one country in this respect.


Arabic:
gt: وبالرغم من ذلك، فإن منطقة شنغن تعمل إلى حد ما كدولة واحدة في هذا الشأن.
src_text: The Schengen zone, however, works somewhat like one country in this respect.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As long as you stay in this zone, you can generally cross borders without going through passport control checkpoints again.


Arabic:
gt: طالما أنكم باقون في هذه المنطقة، يمكنكم عبور الحدود بشكل عام من دون الحاجة للمرور بنقاط تفتيش جوزات السفر مرة أخرى.
src_text: As long as you stay in this zone, you can generally cross borders without going through passport control checkpoints again.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Similarly, by having a Schengen visa, you do not need to apply for visas to each of the Schengen member countries separately, hence saving time, money and paperwork.


Arabic:
gt: وعلى نحو مماثل، فمن خلال الحصول على تأشيرة شنغن، لن تكون في احتياج إلى التقدم بطلب للحصول على تأشيرات الدخول لكل دولة من البلدان الأعضاء في شنغن على حدة، وبالتالي توفير الوقت والمال والأعمال الورقية.
src_text: Similarly, by having a Schengen visa, you do not need to apply for visas to each of the Schengen member countries separately, hence saving time, money and paperwork.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There is no universal definition for which manufactured items are antiques. Some tax agencies define goods older than 100 years as antiques.


Arabic:
gt: تضع بعض وكالات الضرائب تعريفاً للتحف بأنها بضائع زاد عمرها عن مائة عام، ولكن ليس هناك تعريف جامع لما نعتبره تحفاً من العناصر المصنّعة.
src_text: There is no universal definition for which manufactured items are antiques. Some tax agencies define goods older than 100 years as antiques.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The definition has geographic variations, where the age limit might be shorter in places such as North America than in Europe.


Arabic:
gt: للتعريف اختلافات جغرافية، حيث قد يكون الحد العمري أقصر في أماكن مثل أمريكا الشمالية منه في أوروبا.
src_text: The definition has geographic variations, where the age limit might be shorter in places such as North America than in Europe.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Handicraft products might be defined as antiques, though they are younger than similar mass-produced goods.


Arabic:
gt: قد تعرف منتجات الحرف اليدوية على أنها تحف رغم أنها أحدث من السلع المماثلة التي أنتجت جماعيًا في الماضي البعيد.
src_text: Handicraft products might be defined as antiques, though they are younger than similar mass-produced goods.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Reindeer husbandry is an important livelihood among the Sámi and the culture surrounding the trade is important also for many with other professions.


Arabic:
gt: تُعد تربية الرنة مصدر رزق مهم بالنسبة للصاميين، كما أن الثقافة المحيطة بالتجارة مهمة أيضاً للعديد من أصحاب المهن الأخرى.
src_text: Reindeer husbandry is an important livelihood among the Sámi and the culture surrounding the trade is important also for many with other professions.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Even traditionally, though, not all Sámi have been involved in big scale reindeer husbandry, but lived from fishing, hunting and similar, having reindeer mostly as draft animals.


Arabic:
gt: وحتى تقليدياً، وعلى الرغم من ذلك، لم يشترك جميع قومية سامي في تربية الرنة على نطاق واسع، لكنهم كانوا يعيشون من صيد الأسماك والصيد وما شابه ذلك، واستخدموا الرنة في الغالب كحيوانات للجر.
src_text: Even traditionally, though, not all Sámi have been involved in big scale reindeer husbandry, but lived from fishing, hunting and similar, having reindeer mostly as draft animals.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Today many Sámi work in modern trades. Tourism is an important income in Sápmi, the Sámi area.


Arabic:
gt: يعمل العديد من الساميين اليوم في الحرف الحديثة. وتُعد السياحة دخلًا مهماً في سابمي، منطقة الساميين.
src_text: Today many Sámi work in modern trades. Tourism is an important income in Sápmi, the Sámi area.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.


Arabic:
gt: بالرغم من انتشار استخدام كلمة "غجر" وخاصةً في أوساط غير الرومن، إلا أنها تعتبر كلمة مسيئة لارتباطها بصور نمطية سلبية وتصورات غير دقيقة عن الرومن.
src_text: Though it is widely used, especially among non-Romani, the word "Gypsy" is often considered offensive because of its associations with negative stereotypes and inaccurate perceptions of Romani people.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.


Arabic:
gt: إذا أصبحت الدولة التي ستزورها خاضعة لمشورة تتعلق بالسفر، فقد يتأثر التأمين الصحي للسفر أو تأمين إلغاء الرحلة.
src_text: If the country you will be visiting becomes subject to a travel advisory, your travel health insurance or your trip cancellation insurance may be affected.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.


Arabic:
gt: ربما ترغب أيضاً في طلب المشورة من حكومات غير حكومتك، ولكن نصيحة تلك الحكومات صادرة خصيصاً لمواطنيها.
src_text: You may also wish to consult the advice of governments other than your own, but their advice is designed for their citizens.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.


Arabic:
gt: على ذكر مثال واحد، قد يواجه المواطنون الأمريكيون في الشرق الأوسط مواقف تختلف عما يواجهه الأوروبيون أو العرب.
src_text: As one example, American citizens in the Middle East might face different situations from Europeans or Arabs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.


Arabic:
gt: تحذيرات السفر هي مجرد ملخصٍ للوضعِ السياسيِّ في بلد ما.
src_text: Advisories are merely a brief summary of the political situation in one country.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.


Arabic:
gt: غالباً ما تكون الآراء المقدّمة سريعةً وعامةً ومبسطةً مقارنةً بالمعلومات الأكثر تفصيلاً المتوفرة في أماكن أخرى.
src_text: The views presented are often cursory, general and oversimplified compared to the more detailed information available elsewhere.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.


Arabic:
gt: الطقس القاسي هو المصطلح العام لأي ظاهرة مناخية خطيرة قد تسبب ضررًا أو اضطرابًا اجتماعيًا خطيرًا، أو خسارة في الأرواح.
src_text: Severe weather is the generic term for any dangerous weather phenomenon with the potential to cause damage, serious social disruption, or loss of human life.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.


Arabic:
gt: قد يحدث الطقس القاسي في أي مكان في العالم، وتوجد أنواع مختلفة منه اعتمادًا على الجغرافيا، والطبوغرافيا، والظروف الجوية.
src_text: Severe weather can occur anywhere in the world, and there are different types of it, which can depend on geography, topography, and atmospheric conditions.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.


Arabic:
gt: إن الرياح الشديدة والبَرَد والتهطال المفرط والحرائق البرية هي أشكال وآثار الطقس الشديد، وكذلك العواصف الرعدية والأعاصير والفيضانات والأعاصير الحلزونية.
src_text: High winds, hail, excessive precipitation, and wildfires are forms and effects of severe weather, as are thunderstorms, tornadoes, waterspouts, and cyclones.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.


Arabic:
gt: تشمل الظواهر المناخية الإقليمية والموسمية الشديدة: العواصف الثلجية والجليدية والترابية.
src_text: Regional and seasonal severe weather phenomena include blizzards, snowstorms, ice storms, and dust storms.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.


Arabic:
gt: يُنصح المسافرون بشدة أن يلّموا بأي مخاطر لوقوع أحداث طقس قاسية في الأماكن التي يزورونها لما لذلك من تأثير على خطط سفرهم.
src_text: Travellers are strongly advised to be aware of any risk of severe weather affecting their area as they may affect any travel plans.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.


Arabic:
gt: وكل من يخطط لزيارة دولة قد تعتبر منطقة حرب فلابد وأن يحصل على تدريب مهني.
src_text: Anyone planning a visit to a country that could be considered a war zone should get professional training.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.


Arabic:
gt: قد يُفضي البحث على الإنترنت عن "دورة البيئة العدائية" إلى عنوان شركة محلية.
src_text: A search of the Internet for 'Hostile environment course' will probably provide the address of a local company.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.


Arabic:
gt: عادةً ما تشمل الدورة جميع المشاكل التي تتم مناقشتها هنا بتفصيلٍ أكبر بكثيرٍ وعادةً ما يكون من خلال التجربة العملية.
src_text: A course will normally cover all the issues discussed here in far greater detail, usually with practical experience.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.


Arabic:
gt: تستمر الدورة عادةً من 2 إلى 5 أيام وتتضمن لعب الأدوار والكثير من الإسعافات الأولية وفي بعض الأحيان التدرب على الأسلحة.
src_text: A course will normally be from 2-5 days and will involve role play, a lot of first aid and sometimes weapons training.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.


Arabic:
gt: يوجد العديد من الكتب والمجلات التي تتناول البقاء على قيد الحياة في البرية بينما المطبوعات التي تتناول مناطق الحرب قليلة.
src_text: Books and magazines dealing with wilderness survival are common, but publications dealing with war zones are few.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.


Arabic:
gt: يجب على المسافرين الذين يخططون لإجراء جراحة إعادة تحديد الجنس في الخارج التأكّد من أنهم يحملون وثائق صالحة لرحلة العودة.
src_text: Voyagers planning sex reassignment surgery abroad must ensure they're carrying valid documents for the return trip.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.


Arabic:
gt: يتفاوت استعداد الحكومات لإصدار جوازات سفر بلا ذكر لنوع الجنس (X) أو إصدار مستندات محدثة لتناسب اسم أو نوع جنس مرغوب فيهما.
src_text: The willingness of governments to issue passports with gender not stated (X) or documents updated to match a desired name and gender varies.

Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.


Arabic:
gt: يختلف استعداد الحكومات الأجنبية في احترامها لهذه الوثائق إلى حدٍ بعيد.
src_text: Willingness of foreign governments to honour these documents is just as widely variable.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.


Arabic:
gt: وأصبحت عمليات التفتيش في نقاط التفتيش الأمنية أكثر تعدياً على الخصوصيات بكثير في حقبة ما بعد 11 سبتمبر عام 2001.
src_text: Searches at security checkpoints have also become far more intrusive in the post-September 11, 2001 era.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.


Arabic:
gt: يجب ألا يتوقع المتحولين جنسياً قبل الجراحة المرور عبر الماسحات مع الحفاظ على خصوصيتهم و كرامتهم.
src_text: Pre-operative transgender people should not expect to pass through the scanners with their privacy and dignity intact.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.


Arabic:
gt: تيارات السحب هي التدفق العائد من الأمواج التي تقطع الشاطئ، غالباً عند الشعاب المرجانية أو شيءٍ من ذلك القبيل.
src_text: Rip currents are the returning flow from waves breaking off the beach, often at a reef or similar.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.


Arabic:
gt: نظراً للتّضاريس تحت المياه، يتركّز التّدفق العائد في بضعة أقسام عميقةٍ، وقد يتشكّل تيارٌ سريعٌ إلى المياه العميقة هناك.
src_text: Due to the underwater topology the return flow is concentrated at a few deeper sections, and a fast current to deep water may form there.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.


Arabic:
gt: تنتجُ معظمُ الوفيّاتِ عن الإرهاقِ في محاولةِ السّباحة عكس التيّار، وهو ما قد يكونُ مستحيلاً.
src_text: Most deaths happen as result of fatigue trying to swim back against the current, which may be impossible.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.


Arabic:
gt: حالما تسبح خارج التيار ستكون السباحة في العودة لا تقل سهولة عن المعتاد.
src_text: As soon as you get out of the current, swimming back is no more difficult than normally.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.


Arabic:
gt: حاول استهداف مكان لا يسيطر عليك التيار فيه مرة أخرى أو، على حسب مهاراتك وما إذا لاحظ وجودك أحدهم، قد يكون انتظار الإنقاذ اختيار آخر.
src_text: Try aiming somewhere where you are not caught again or, depending on your skills and on whether you have been noticed, you might want to wait for rescue.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.


Arabic:
gt: تحدث صدمة العودة إلى الوطن الأم أسرع من الصدمة الثقافية (تقصر مرحلة شهر العسل)، وتستمر لفترة أطول، ويمكن أن تكون أكثر حدة.
src_text: Re-entry shock comes on sooner than culture shock (there's less of a honeymoon phase), lasts longer, and can be more severe.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.


Arabic:
gt: في بعض الأحيان، يواجه المسافرون الذين يجدون سهولة في التكيف مع الثقافة الجديدة صعوبة خاصة في إعادة التكيف مع ثقافتهم الأصلية.
src_text: Travellers who had an easy time adjusting to the new culture sometimes have a particularly hard time readjusting to their native culture.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.


Arabic:
gt: عند العودة إلى الوطن بعد العيش في الخارج، تكون قد تكيفت مع الثقافة الجديدة وفقدت بعضاً من عاداتك من ثقافة وطنك.
src_text: When returning home after living abroad, you've adapted to the new culture and lost some of your habits from your home culture.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.


Arabic:
gt: عندما سافرت إلى الخارج في البداية، ربما كان الناس صبورين ومتفهمين، مع العلم أن المسافرين في بلد جديد بحاجة إلى التكيف.
src_text: When you went abroad at first, people were probably patient and understanding, knowing that travellers in a new country need to adapt.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.


Arabic:
gt: قد لا يتوقع الناس أن الصبر والتفاهم ضروريان أيضاً للمسافرين العائدين إلى ديارهم.
src_text: People may not anticipate that patience and understanding are also necessary for travellers returning home.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.


Arabic:
gt: إن عرض الصوت والضوء الهرمي واحد من أمتع الأشياء الموجودة بالمنطقة للأطفال.
src_text: The pyramid sound and light show is one of the most interesting things in the area for kids.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.


Arabic:
gt: بإمكانك أن ترى الأهرام في الظلام وفي صمت قبل أن يبدأ العرض.
src_text: You can see the pyramids in the dark and you can see them in silence before the show begins.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.


Arabic:
gt: يمكنك أن تسمع صوت السيّاح والبائعين هنا دائماً عادةً. فقصة الصوت والضوء تشبه قصة كتابٍ.
src_text: Usually you always here the sound of tourists and vendors. The story of the sound and light is just like a story book.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: وُضع أبو الهول كخلفيّة وراوٍ لقصّة طويلة.
src_text: The Sphinx is set as the backdrop and the narrator of a long story.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.


Arabic:
gt: يتم عرض المشاهد على الأهرامات و تضاء الأهرامات المختلفة.
src_text: The scenes are displayed on the pyramids and the different pyramids are lit up.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:South Shetland Islands, discovered in 1819, are claimed by several nations and have the most bases, with sixteen active in 2020.


Arabic:
gt: جزر شيتلاند الجنوبية، المكتشفة في 1819، تدعي ملكيتها العديد من الدول، وعليها أكثر القواعد، التي بلغ عدد الفاعل منها 16 في 2020.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: يقع الأرخبيل علي بعد 120 كيلومتر من شمال شبه الجزيرة. الأكبر هي جزيرة الملك جورج وبها مستوطنة فيلا لاس إستريلاس.

Translate the following English source text to Arabic:

Arabic:
gt: ومن بين أماكن أخرى جزيرة ليفينغستون، وديسبشن حيث توفر كالديرا، المغمورة ببركان لا يزال نشطًا، ميناءً طبيعيًا خلاباً.

prompt:

gt: تُعد أرض إلسوورث هي المنطقة الواقعة جنوب بينينسولا، ويحدها بحر بلنغهاوزن.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The mountains of the Peninsula here merge into the plateau, then re-emerge to form the 360 km chain of the Ellsworth Mountains, bisected by the Minnesota Glacier.


Arabic:
gt: وتندمج جبال شبه الجزيرة هنا في الهضبة، ثم تعود إلى الظهور لتشكيل سلسلة جبال إلسورث، التي تمتد لمسافة 360 كم، والتي يقسمها نهر مينيسوتا جلاسير.
