prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.


Arabic:
gt: يحتوي الجزء الشمالي أو سلسلة سانتينيل على أعلى جبال في القارة القطبية الجنوبية، فينسون ماسيف حيث تبلغ ذروته ما يعادل 4892 متر جبل فينسون.
src_text: The northern part or Sentinel Range has Antarctica's highest mountains, the Vinson Massif, peaking at 4892 m Mount Vinson.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.


Arabic:
gt: في المواقع البعيدة، مع غياب تغطية الهاتف الخلوي، قد يكون الهاتف المتصل بالقمر الصناعي هو الخيار الوحيد.
src_text: In remote locations, without cell phone coverage, a satellite phone may be your only option.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.


Arabic:
gt: الهاتف الذي يعمل بالأقمار الصناعية لا يعد عموماً بديلاً عن الهاتف المحمول، إذ يجب أن تكون في الخارج في وجود خط رؤية واضح مع القمر الصناعي لإجراء مكالمةٍ هاتفيةٍ.
src_text: A satellite phone is not generally a replacement for a mobile phone, as you have to be outdoors with clear line of sight to the satellite to make a phone call.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.


Arabic:
gt: تُستخدم الخدمة بشكل متكرر من خلال الشحن، بما في ذلك زوارق التنزه، وكذلك البعثات الاستكشافية التي لديها احتياجات للبيانات والصوت عن بعد.
src_text: The service is frequently used by shipping, including pleasure craft, as well as expeditions who have remote data and voice needs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.


Arabic:
gt: لابد من وجود مزوِّد خدمة هاتف محلي قادر على تقديم مزيد من المعلومات عن طرق الاتصال بهذه الخدمة.
src_text: Your local telephone service provider should be able to give more information about connecting to this service.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.


Arabic:
gt: يعد السفر والتعلم خياراً أكثر شيوعاً لأولئك الذين يخططون لسنة الاستراحة.
src_text: An increasingly more popular option for those planning a gap-year is to travel and learn.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.


Arabic:
gt: يتمتع الأمر بشعبية خصوصاً بين من أنهى مرحلة التعليم المدرسي، فهو يسمح لهم بقضاء عام قبل الالتحاق بالجامعة، بلا مخاطرة بتعليمهم.
src_text: This is especially popular with school leavers, allowing them to take a year out before university, without compromising their education.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.


Arabic:
gt: في الكثير من الأحيان، يمكن أن يحسّن التسجيل في دورة تدريبية لمدة عام خارج البلاد فرصك في الالتحاق بالتعليم العالي في بلدك الأم عند عودتك.
src_text: In many cases, enrolling on a gap-year course abroad can actually improve your chances of moving into higher education back in your home country.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.


Arabic:
gt: عادة ما تكون هناك رسوم للتسجيل في تلك البرامج التعليمية.
src_text: Typically there will be a tuition fee to enroll in these educational programs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.


Arabic:
gt: تعتبر فنلندا وجهةً رائعةً لركوب القوارب. تحتوي "أرض الألف بحيرة" أيضاً على الآلاف من الجزر، في البحيرات وفي الأرخبيل الساحلي كليهما.
src_text: Finland is a great boating destination. The "Land of a thousand lakes" has thousands of islands too, in the lakes and in the coastal archipelagos.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.


Arabic:
gt: لا تحتاج إلى يخت في الأرخبيل والبحيرات.
src_text: In the archipelagos and lakes you do not necessarily need a yacht.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.


Arabic:
gt: مع أنّ الأرخبيلات الساحلية وأكبر البحيرات كبيرة بما يكفي لأي يخت، إلا أن القوارب الصغيرة أو حتى قوارب الكاياك تقدم تجربة مختلفة.
src_text: Although the coastal archipelagos and the biggest lakes are indeed big enough for any yacht, smaller boats or even a kayak offer a different experience.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.


Arabic:
gt: القوارب هي هواية وطنية في فنلندا، حيث أنه يوجد قاربٌ لكل سبعةِ أو ثمانيةِ أشخاصٍ.
src_text: Boating is a national pastime in Finland, with a boat to every seven or eight people.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).


Arabic:
gt: هذا يقابله النرويج، والسويد ونيوزيلندا، ولكنه فريد تماماً (على سبيل المثال في هولندا، الرقم من واحد إلى أربعين).
src_text: This is matched by Norway, Sweden and New Zealand, but otherwise quite unique (e.g. in the Netherlands the figure is one to forty).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.


Arabic:
gt: تتميز معظم رحلات البلطيق المتميزة بإقامة طويلة في سانت بطرسبرغ، روسيا.
src_text: Most of the distinct Baltic Cruises feature an extended stay in St. Petersburg, Russia.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.


Arabic:
gt: هذا يعني أنه يمكنك زيارة المدينة التاريخية لبضعةِ أيام كاملة أثناء العودة والنوم على متن السفينةِ ليلًا.
src_text: This means you can visit the historic city for a couple of full days while returning and sleeping on the ship at night.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).


Arabic:
gt: إذا كنت ستسافر ضمن الرحلات الاستكشافية الساحلية على متن السفن، فلن تحتاج إلى تأشيرة منفصلة (اعتباراً من سنة 2009).
src_text: If you only go ashore using shipboard excursions you will not need a separate visa (as of 2009).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.


Arabic:
gt: تُميز بعض الرحلات مدينة برلين الألمانية في الكتيبات؛ فكما ترون من الخريطة أعلاه، فإن برلين ليست مكانًا بالقرب من البحر ولا يشمل سعر الرحلة زيارة المدينة.
src_text: Some cruises feature Berlin, Germany in the brochures. As you can see from the map above Berlin is no where near the sea and a visit to the city is not included in the price of the cruise.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.


Arabic:
gt: يمكن أن يكون السفر بالطائرة تجربة مرعبة للأشخاص من جميع الأعمار والخلفيات، خاصةً إذا لم يسافروا من قبل أو تعرضوا لحادثٍ مؤلمٍ.
src_text: Travelling by plane can be a scary experience for people of all ages and backgrounds, particularly if they've not flown before or have experienced a traumatic event.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.


Arabic:
gt: إنه ليس أمراً يُخجل منه: فهو لا يختلف كثيراُ عن المخاوف الشخصية و الأشياء الأخرى المكروهة و التي يمتلكها الكثير من الناس.
src_text: It is not something to be ashamed of: it is no different from the personal fears and dislikes of other things that very many people have.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.


Arabic:
gt: قد يساعد فهم شيء ما حول كيفية عمل الطائرات وما يحدث أثناء الرحلة البعض في التغلب على الخوف الذي ينبع من المجهول أو من عدم السيطرة.
src_text: For some, understanding something about how aircraft work and what happens during a flight may help to overcome a fear which is based on the unknown or on not being in control.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.


Arabic:
gt: يتم دفع مبالغ جيدة لشركات الشحن لإيصال الأشياء بسرعة. عادة ما يكون الوقت مهماً للغاية فيما يتعلق بمستندات العمل، البضائع وقطع الغيار للإصلاحات العاجلة.
src_text: Courier companies are well paid for delivering things quickly. Frequently, time is very important with business documents, merchandise or spare parts for an urgent repair.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.


Arabic:
gt: تمتلك الشركات الأكبر طائراتها الخاصة، في بعض الخطوط، ولكن كانت هناك مشكلة للخطوط الأخرى والشركات الأصغر.
src_text: On some routes, the larger companies have their own planes, but for other routes and smaller firms there was a problem.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.


Arabic:
gt: في حالة إرسالهم الأشياء عن طريق الشحن الجوي، فربما يستغرق الأمر عدة أيام في بعض الطرق للتفريغ والجمارك.
src_text: If they sent things by air freight, on some routes it may have taken days to get through unloading and customs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.


Arabic:
gt: إرسال الطرود كأمتعة يتم فحصها كان الطريق الأوحد لتستلمها سريعاً، ولكن لا تسمح القوانين الداخلية لشركات الطيران بإرسال أمتعة بلا راكب، لذا يأتي دورك في هذه المرحلة.
src_text: The only way to get it through faster was to send it as checked luggage. Airline regulations will not allow them to send luggage without a passenger, which is where you come in.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).


Arabic:
gt: الطريق البديهي لتتمكن من السفر على الدرجة الأولى أو درجة رجال الأعمال هي تخصيص مبلغ مالي كبير لتحصل على هذا الامتياز (أو أفضل لك أن تنيب شركتك في القيام بذلك).
src_text: The obvious way of flying in first or business class is to fork out a thick wad of money for the privilege (or, better yet, get your company to do it for you).

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!


Arabic:
gt: مع ذلك، فإن هذا لا يأتي بثمن بخس: كقواعد الإبهام الصارمة، يمكنك أن تتوقع أن تدفع ما يصل إلى أربعة أضعاف الأجرة الاقتصادية العادية للأعمال التجارية، وأحد عشر ضعفاً للدرجة الأولى!
src_text: However, this does not come cheap: as rough rules of thumb, you can expect to pay up to four times the normal economy fare for business, and eleven times for first class!

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.


Arabic:
gt: بصفة عامة، لا جدوى من البحث عن خصومات لمقاعد فئة رجال الأعمال أو الدرجة الأولى على الرحلات المباشرة من A إلى B.
src_text: Generally speaking, there is no point in even looking for discounts for business or first-class seats on direct flights from A to B.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.


Arabic:
gt: تعلم الخطوط الجوية جيداً أن هناك مجموعة رئيسية محددة من المسافرين مستعدون لدفع الكثير من المال مقابل أفضلية الوصول إلى مكان ما بسرعة وفي راحة، وتتم محاسبتهم وفقاً لذلك.
src_text: Airlines know well that there is a certain core group of flyers who are willing to pay top dollar for the privilege of getting somewhere fast and in comfort, and charge accordingly.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.


Arabic:
gt: عاصمة مولدوفا كيشيناو. اللغة المحلية هي الرومانية لكن الروسية مستخدمة على نطاق واسع.
src_text: The capital of Moldova is Chişinău. The local language is Romanian, but Russian is widely used.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.


Arabic:
gt: مولدوفا جمهورية متعددة الأعراق عانت من صراع عرقي.
src_text: Moldova is a multi-ethnic republic that has suffered from ethnic conflict.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.


Arabic:
gt: في سنة 1994 أدى هذا النزاع إلى إنشاء جمهورية ترانسنيستريا التي نصبت نفسها بنفسها في شرق مولدوفا، والتي لها حكومتها و عملتها الخاصة غير أنه غير معترف بها من قبل أي دولة عضو في الأمم المتحدة.
src_text: In 1994, this conflict led to the creation of the self-proclaimed Transnistria Republic in eastern Moldova, which has its own government and currency but is not recognised by any UN member country.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.


Arabic:
gt: ولقد أعيد تأسيس الروابط الاقتصاديّة بين هذين الجزأين من مولدوفا على الرّغم من الفشل في المفاوضات السياسيّة.
src_text: Economic links have been re-established between these two parts of Moldova despite the failure in political negotiations.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.


Arabic:
gt: الديانة الرئيسية في "مولدوفا" هي المسيحية الأرثوذكسية.
src_text: The major religion in Moldova is Orthodox Christian.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.


Arabic:
gt: تعد مدينة إزمير ثالث أكبر مدينة في تركيا ويبلغ عدد سكانها حوالي 3.7 مليون نسمة، وبها ثاني أكبر ميناء بعد اسطنبول، كما تعد مركزاً متميزاً للنقل.
src_text: İzmir is the third largest city in Turkey with a population of around 3.7 million, the second biggest port after Istanbul, and a very good transport hub.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.


Arabic:
gt: كانت مدينة سميرنا القديمة ذات يوم، وهي الآن مركز تجاري حديث ومتطور ومزدحم، يقع حول خليج ضخم محاط بالجبال.
src_text: Once the ancient city of Smyrna, it is now a modern, developed, and busy commercial center, set around a huge bay and surrounded by mountains.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.


Arabic:
gt: تتميز الشوارع الواسعة والمباني ذات الواجهة الزجاجية ومراكز التسوق الحديثة بأسقف تقليدية من القرميد الأحمر وسوق القرن الثامن عشر والمساجد والكنائس القديمة، على الرغم من أن المدينة تتمتع بجو أكثر من أوروبا المتوسطية مقارنة بتركيا التقليدية.
src_text: The broad boulevards, glass-fronted buildings and modern shopping centers are dotted with traditional red-tiled roofs, the 18th century market, and old mosques and churches, although the city has an atmosphere more of Mediterranean Europe than traditional Turkey.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.


Arabic:
gt: توفر قرية هالدارسفيك إطلالات على جزيرة إيستروي القريبة وتحتوي على كنيسة فريدة بتصميم ثماني.
src_text: The village of Haldarsvík offer views of the nearby island Eysturoy and has an unusual octagonal church.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.


Arabic:
gt: في باحة الكنيسة، توجد تماثيل رخامية بديعة للحمام فوق بعض المقابر.
src_text: In the churchyard, there are interesting marble sculptures of doves over some tombs.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.


Arabic:
gt: يستحق الأمر نصف ساعة من التجوّل في القرية المثيرة للاهتمام.
src_text: It's worth half an hour to stroll about the intriguing village.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.


Arabic:
gt: تقع مدينة سنترا الرومانتيكية ذات الجمال الخلاب ناحية الشمال في مكان يسهل الوصول إليه، وهي المدينة التي ذاع صيتها وسط الأجانب بعد سرد اللورد بايرن المبهر لروائعها.
src_text: To the north and within easy reach is the romantic and fascinating town of Sintra and which was made famous to foreigners after a glowing account of its splendours recorded by Lord Byron.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.


Arabic:
gt: تسافر حافلة "سكوترب 403" بانتظام إلى "سينترا"، وتتوقف في "كابو دا روكا".
src_text: Scotturb Bus 403 travels regularly to Sintra, stopping at Cabo da Roca.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.


Arabic:
gt: إضافة إلى ذلك من ناحية الشمال يمكنك زيارة حرم السيدة فاطمة العظيم (ضريح مقدس)، وهو مكان الظهورات المريمية الشهيرة على مستوى العالم.
src_text: Also to the north visit the great Sanctuary of Our Lady of Fatima (Shrine), a place of worldwide famous Marian apparitions.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.


Arabic:
gt: من فضلك تذكر أنك في الأساس في موقع مقبرة جماعية، بالإضافة إلى أنه موقع له معنى يكاد يكون غير متناهي بالنسبة لجزء هائل من سكان العالم.
src_text: Please remember that you are essentially visiting a mass grave site, as well as a site that has an almost incalculable meaning to a significant portion of the world's population.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.


Arabic:
gt: لا يزال هناك العديد من الرجال والنساء على قيد الحياة من ممن نجوا من وقتهم هنا، والعديد من الأشخاص الآخرين الذين كان عندهم أحباء قُتلوا أو عملوا حتى الموت هناك، من اليهود وغير اليهود على حد سواء.
src_text: There are still many men and women alive who survived their time here, and many more who had loved ones who were murdered or worked to death there, Jews and non-Jews alike.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.


Arabic:
gt: يرجى التّعامل مع الموقع بكل ما يستحقه من كرامة ووقار واحترام. لا تطلقوا النكات عن الهولوكوست أو النازيين.
src_text: Please treat the site with all of the dignity, solemnity and respect it deserves. Do not make jokes about the Holocaust or Nazis.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.


Arabic:
gt: لا تشوه الموقع بوضع علامات أو الكتابات الخادشة على الجدران في المباني.
src_text: Do not deface the site by marking or scratching graffiti into structures.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.


Arabic:
gt: لمدينة برشلونة لغتين رسميتين هما الكتالونية والإسبانية. يُفضل حوالي نصف السكان التحدث بالكتالونية، ويفهمها الغالبية العظمى، ويعرف الجميع تقريبًا الإسبانية.
src_text: Barcelona's official languages are Catalan and Spanish. About a half prefer to speak Catalan, a vast majority understands it, and virtually everyone knows Spanish.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:However, most signs are indicated only in Catalan because it is established by law as the first official language.


Arabic:

prompt:

prompt:

src_text: Most of the monasteries do provide wraps for women who come unprepared, but if you bring your own, especially one with bright colors, you'll get a smile from the monk or nun at the entrance.

prompt:

prompt:

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.


Arabic:
gt: إذا قررت زيارة منطقة القطب الشمالي أو القطب الجنوبي في الشتاء، فسوف تجرب الليل القطبي، وهو يعني أن الشمس لا ترتفع فوق الأفق.
src_text: If you visit the Arctic or Antarctic areas in the winter you will experience the polar night, which means that the sun doesn't rise above the horizon.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.


Arabic:
gt: يُوفّر ذلك فرصةً جيدةً لمشاهدةِ الشفقِ القطبيِّ ، حيث ستكون السماء مظلمةً بصورةٍ أكثر أو أقل على مدار الساعة.
src_text: This offers a good opportunity to see the Aurora borealis, as the sky will be dark more or less around the clock.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.


Arabic:
gt: بما أن المناطق مأهولة قليلاً والتلوث الضوئي على الأغلب ليس مشكلة، فسوف تتمكن أيضاً من الاستمتاع بمراقبة بالنجوم.
src_text: As the areas are sparsely populated, and light pollution therefore often not a problem, you will also be able to enjoy the stars.

prompt:

gt: ثقافة العمل اليابانية أكثر هرمية ورسمية مما اعتاد عليه الغربيون.
src_text: Japanese work culture is more hierarchical and formal that what Westerners may be used to.

prompt:

prompt:

English:Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.


Arabic:
gt: و يُعد الانسجام في مكان العمل أمراَ بالغ الأهمية، حيث يؤكد على الجهد الجماعي بدلاً من الإشادة بالإنجازات الفردية.
src_text: Workplace harmony is crucial, emphasizing group effort rather than praising individual accomplishments.

prompt:
Translate the following English source text to Arabic:
English:Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.

gt: يُتوقع من العمال الامتثال لتعليمات رؤسائهم دون نقاش، كما يجب أن يحصلوا في أغلب الأحيان على موافقة رؤسائهم على أي قرارات يتخذونها.
src_text: Workers must often get their superiors' approval for any decisions they make, and are expected to obey their superiors' instructions without question.
